    if macroLoader then
        macroLoader("function LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(f) return f end\nfunction LPH_JIT(f) return f end\nfunction LPH_JIT_MAX(f) return f end\nfunction LPH_NO_UPVALUES(f) return f end\n")()
    end
end

local SENSITIVE_CONFIG_KEYS = {
    AllowPlainAutorunFallback = true,
    TeleportScriptKey = true,
    TeleportAutorunFile = true,
    TeleportLoaderUrl = true,
    TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile = true,
}

local RUN_KEY = "x_" .. tostring(math.random(100000, 999999))
local AIM_BIND_NAME = RUN_KEY .. "_Cam"
-- Cleanup previous instances with known keys
local OLD_KEYS = {
    "XenoPrivate_v4",
    "XenoSilentAimPrivate_v3",
    "XenoCleanDrawingESP_v1",
    "XenoPrivateDummyESP_v1",
    "XenoPrivateDummyESP_v2",
    "IronFrost_IronFrost_v2",
    "IronFrostOverkillSilentRemoteHook",
    "XenoSilentAimPrivate",
}
local Environment = (type(getgenv) == "function" and getgenv()) or _G
for _, key in ipairs(OLD_KEYS) do
    local old = rawget(Environment, key) or rawget(_G, key)
    if type(old) == "table" and type(old.Cleanup) == "function" then
        pcall(old.Cleanup)
    end
    pcall(function() Environment[key] = nil end)
    pcall(function() rawset(_G, key, nil) end)
end
for key, old in pairs(_G) do
    if type(old) == "table"
        and type(rawget(old, "Cleanup")) == "function"
        and type(rawget(old, "Config")) == "table"
        and rawget(old.Config, "AimAssistEnabled") ~= nil then
        pcall(old.Cleanup)
        pcall(function() rawset(_G, key, nil) end)
    end
end
-- Also clean current RUN_KEY if somehow re-executing
if _G[RUN_KEY] and type(_G[RUN_KEY].Cleanup) == "function" then
    _G[RUN_KEY].Cleanup()
end

do
    local teleportDisabledFile = tostring(Config.TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile or "IronFrost/IronFrost/teleport_autoload_disabled.txt")

    local function teleportFileExists(path)
        if type(isfile) == "function" then
            local okFile, exists = pcall(isfile, path)
            return okFile and exists == true
        elseif type(readfile) == "function" then
            return pcall(readfile, path)
        end
        return false
    end

    local function teleportAutoloadDisabled()
        if teleportDisabledFile == "" then
            return false
        end
        if type(readfile) == "function" then
            local okRead, value = pcall(readfile, teleportDisabledFile)
            if okRead then
                return tostring(value) ~= "enabled"
            end
        end
        return teleportFileExists(teleportDisabledFile)
    end

    local function getTeleportClearFn()
        local env = (type(getgenv) == "function" and getgenv()) or _G
        local clearFn = rawget(env, "clear_teleport_queue")
            or rawget(env, "clearqueueonteleport")
            or rawget(env, "clearteleportqueue")
            or rawget(env, "clear_queue_on_teleport")
        local synTable = rawget(env, "syn") or rawget(_G, "syn")
        if type(clearFn) ~= "function" and type(synTable) == "table" then
            clearFn = synTable.clear_teleport_queue
                or synTable.clearqueueonteleport
                or synTable.clearteleportqueue
                or synTable.clear_queue_on_teleport
        end
        return clearFn
    end

    local function clearTeleportAutorunQueue(reason)
        local env = (type(getgenv) == "function" and getgenv()) or _G
        local clearFn = getTeleportClearFn()
        if type(clearFn) ~= "function" then
            env.__IronFrostTeleportQueueStatus = "clear unavailable: " .. tostring(reason or "manual")
            return false, "clear unavailable"
        end
        local okClear, clearError = pcall(clearFn)
        env.__IronFrostTeleportQueueStatus = okClear and ("cleared: " .. tostring(reason or "manual")) or ("clear failed: " .. tostring(clearError))
        return okClear, clearError
    end

    local function setTeleportAutoloadDisabled(disabled, reason)
        if teleportDisabledFile == "" then
            return false, "no disabled file"
        end
        if disabled then
            pcall(function()
                if type(makefolder) == "function" then
                    if type(isfolder) ~= "function" or not isfolder("IronFrost") then makefolder("IronFrost") end
                    if type(isfolder) ~= "function" or not isfolder("IronFrost/IronFrost") then makefolder("IronFrost/IronFrost") end
                end
            end)
            if type(writefile) == "function" then
                pcall(writefile, teleportDisabledFile, tostring(reason or "disabled"))
            end
            clearTeleportAutorunQueue(reason or "disabled")
            Environment.__IronFrostTeleportQueueStatus = "disabled: " .. tostring(reason or "manual")
            return true
        end
        if type(delfile) == "function" and teleportFileExists(teleportDisabledFile) then
            pcall(delfile, teleportDisabledFile)
        elseif type(writefile) == "function" then
            pcall(writefile, teleportDisabledFile, "enabled")
        end
        return true
    end

    local function queueTeleportAutorun()
        if Config.AutoQueueOnTeleport ~= true then
            return false, "disabled"
        end
        if teleportAutoloadDisabled() then
            Environment.__IronFrostTeleportQueueStatus = "disabled by file"
            return false, "disabled by file"
        end

        local env = (type(getgenv) == "function" and getgenv()) or _G
        local queueFn = rawget(env, "queue_on_teleport") or rawget(env, "queueonteleport")
        local synTable = rawget(env, "syn") or rawget(_G, "syn")
        if type(queueFn) ~= "function" and type(synTable) == "table" and type(synTable.queue_on_teleport) == "function" then
            queueFn = synTable.queue_on_teleport
        end
        if type(queueFn) ~= "function" then
            Environment.__IronFrostTeleportQueueStatus = "queue_on_teleport unavailable"
            return false, "queue unavailable"
        end

        local currentEnv = (type(getfenv) == "function" and getfenv()) or nil
        local currentEnvScriptKey = type(currentEnv) == "table" and rawget(currentEnv, "script_key") or nil
        local loaderUrl = tostring(rawget(env, "IronFrostLoaderUrl") or rawget(_G, "IronFrostLoaderUrl") or Config.TeleportLoaderUrl or "")
        local scriptKey = tostring(rawget(env, "script_key") or rawget(_G, "script_key") or currentEnvScriptKey or "")
        pcall(function()
            env.IronFrostLoaderUrl = loaderUrl
            _G.IronFrostLoaderUrl = loaderUrl
            if scriptKey ~= "" then
                env.IronFrostTeleportScriptKey = scriptKey
                _G.IronFrostTeleportScriptKey = scriptKey
            else
                env.IronFrostTeleportScriptKey = nil
                _G.IronFrostTeleportScriptKey = nil
            end
        end)
        local autorunFile = ""
        local allowPlainAutorun = Config.AllowPlainAutorunFallback == true
        local hasAutorunFile = false
        if allowPlainAutorun then
            autorunFile = tostring(Config.TeleportAutorunFile or "IronFrost/IronFrost/autorun.lua")
            if type(isfile) == "function" then
                local okFile, exists = pcall(isfile, autorunFile)
                hasAutorunFile = okFile and exists == true
            elseif type(readfile) == "function" then
                hasAutorunFile = pcall(readfile, autorunFile)
            end
        end

        if (scriptKey == "" or loaderUrl == "") and not hasAutorunFile then
            Environment.__IronFrostTeleportQueueStatus = "no protected loader payload"
            return false, "no payload"
        end

        local payloadTemplate = table.concat({
    "\116\097\115\107\046\115\112\097\119\110\040\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\040\041\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\115\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\032\061\032\037\113\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\108\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\032\061\032\037\113\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\097\117\116\111\114\117\110\070\105\108\101\032\061\032\037\113\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\097\108\108\111\119\080\108\097\105\110\065\117\116\111\114\117\110\032\061\032\037\115\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\100\105\115\097\098\108\101\100\070\105\108\101\032\061\032\037\113\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\116\101\109\112\108\097\116\101\032\061\032\037\113\010\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\032\103\101\116\081\117\101\117\101\070\110\040\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\101\110\118\032\061\032\040\116\121\112\101\040\103\101\116\103\101\110\118\041\032\061\061\032\034\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\034\032\097\110\100\032\103\101\116\103\101\110\118\040\041\041\032\111\114\032\095\071\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\113\117\101\117\101\070\110\032\061\032\114\097\119\103\101\116\040\101\110\118\044\032\034\113\117\101\117\101\095\111\110\095\116\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\034\041\032\111\114\032\114\097\119\103\101\116\040\101\110\118\044\032\034\113\117\101\117\101\111\110\116\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\034\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\115\121\110\084\097\098\108\101\032\061\032\114\097\119\103\101\116\040\101\110\118\044\032\034\115\121\110\034\041\032\111\114\032\114\097\119\103\101\116\040\095\071\044\032\034\115\121\110\034\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\105\102\032\116\121\112\101\040\113\117\101\117\101\070\110\041\032\126\061\032\034\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\034\032\097\110\100\032\116\121\112\101\040\115\121\110\084\097\098\108\101\04     "\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\114\101\116\117\114\110\032\116\111\115\116\114\105\110\103\040\118\097\108\117\101\041\032\126\061\032\034\101\110\097\098\108\101\100\034\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\105\102\032\116\121\112\101\040\105\115\102\105\108\101\041\032\061\061\032\034\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\034\032\116\104\101\110\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\111\107\070\105\108\101\044\032\101\120\105\115\116\115\032\061\032\112\099\097\108\108\040\105\115\102\105\108\101\044\032\100\105\115\097\098\108\101\100\070\105\108\101\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\114\101\116\117\114\110\032\111\107\070\105\108\101\032\097\110\100\032\101\120\105\115\116\115\032\061\061\032\116\114\117\101\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\114\101\116\117\114\110\032\102\097\108\115\101\010\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\010\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\032\114\101\113\117\101\117\101\040\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\105\102\032\100\105\115\097\098\108\101\100\040\041\032\116\104\101\110\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\101\110\118\032\061\032\040\116\121\112\101\040\103\101\116\103\101\110\118\041\032\061\061\032\034\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\034\032\097\110\100\032\103\101\116\103\101\110\118\040\041\041\032\111\114\032\095\071\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\118\046\095\095\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\084\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\081\117\101\117\101\083\116\097\116\117\115\032\061\032\034\100\105\115\097\098\108\101\100\032\098\121\032\102\105\108\101\034\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\114\101\116\117\114\110\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\10     "\115\032\061\032\111\107\081\117\101\117\101\032\097\110\100\032\034\113\117\101\117\101\100\034\032\111\114\032\040\034\113\117\101\117\101\032\102\097\105\108\101\100\058\032\034\032\046\046\032\116\111\115\116\114\105\110\103\040\113\117\101\117\101\069\114\114\111\114\041\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\118\046\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\084\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\083\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\032\061\032\115\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\118\046\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\076\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\032\061\032\108\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\095\071\046\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\084\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\083\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\032\061\032\115\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\095\071\046\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\076\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\032\061\032\108\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\010\032\032\032\032\114\101\112\101\097\116\032\116\097\115\107\046\119\097\105\116\040\041\032\117\110\116\105\108\032\103\097\109\101\058\073\115\076\111\097\100\101\100\040\041\010\032\032\032\032\105\102\032\100\105\115\097\098\108\101\100\040\041\032\116\104\101\110\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\099\097\108\032\101\110\118\032\061\032\040\116\121\112\101\040\103\101\116\103\101\110\118\041\032\061\061\032\034\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\034\032\097\110\100\032\103\101\116\103\101\110\118\040\041\041\032\111\114\032\095\071\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\118\046\095\095\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\084\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\081\117\101\117\101\083\116\097\116\117\115\032\061\032\034\100\105\115\097\098\108\101\100\032\098\121\032\102\105\108\101\034\010\032\032\032\03     "\061\032\108\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\095\071\046\115\099\114\105\112\116\095\107\101\121\032\061\032\115\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\095\071\046\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\084\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\083\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\032\061\032\115\099\114\105\112\116\075\101\121\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\095\071\046\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\076\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\032\061\032\108\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\097\100\115\116\114\105\110\103\040\103\097\109\101\058\072\116\116\112\071\101\116\040\108\111\097\100\101\114\085\114\108\041\041\040\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\114\101\116\117\114\110\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\105\102\032\097\108\108\111\119\080\108\097\105\110\065\117\116\111\114\117\110\032\097\110\100\032\116\121\112\101\040\114\101\097\100\102\105\108\101\041\032\061\061\032\034\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\034\032\097\110\100\032\116\121\112\101\040\108\111\097\100\115\116\114\105\110\103\041\032\061\061\032\034\102\117\110\099\116\105\111\110\034\032\116\104\101\110\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\108\111\097\100\115\116\114\105\110\103\040\114\101\097\100\102\105\108\101\040\097\117\116\111\114\117\110\070\105\108\101\041\041\040\041\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\041\010\032\032\032\032\105\102\032\110\111\116\032\111\107\032\116\104\101\110\010\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\032\119\097\114\110\040\034\091\073\114\111\110\070\114\111\115\116\093\032\116\101\108\101\112\111\114\116\032\097\117\116\111\114\117\110\032\102\097\105\108\101\100\058\032\034\032\046\046\032\116\111\115\116\114\105\110\103\040\101\114\114\041\041\010\032\032\032\032\101\110\100\010\101\110\100\041",
})
        local payload = string.format(payloadTemplate, scriptKey, loaderUrl, autorunFile, allowPlainAutorun and "true" or "false", teleportDisabledFile, payloadTemplate)

        clearTeleportAutorunQueue("refresh")
        local okQueue, queueError = pcall(queueFn, payload)
        Environment.__IronFrostTeleportQueueStatus = okQueue and "queued" or ("queue failed: " .. tostring(queueError))
        return okQueue, queueError
    end

    Environment.__IronFrostSetTeleportAutoloadDisabled = setTeleportAutoloadDisabled
    Environment.__IronFrostClearTeleportQueue = clearTeleportAutorunQueue
    Environment.__IronFrostQueueTeleportAutorun = queueTeleportAutorun
    pcall(queueTeleportAutorun)
end

local function normalizeWorldShaderPreset(value)
    value = tostring(value or "None")
    for _, presetName in ipairs(WORLD_SHADER_PRESET_NAMES) do
        if presetName == value then
            return presetName
        end
    end
    return "None"
end

local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local LocalMouse = LocalPlayer:GetMouse()
local unpackArgs = table.unpack or unpack

-- Cache Chickynoid ClientModule once to avoid per-frame require() calls.
-- This is the #1 cause of obfuscation lag: obfuscators break require() caching,
-- so each per-frame require() does a full module resolve. By caching here,
-- all per-frame functions use a direct table reference instead.
local _cachedChickynoidCM = nil
local getChickynoidCM = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if _cachedChickynoidCM then return _cachedChickynoidCM end
    local ok, cm = pcall(function()
        return require(ReplicatedFirst.Packages.Chickynoid.Client.ClientModule)
    end)
    if ok and type(cm) == "table" then
        _cachedChickynoidCM = cm
    end
    return _cachedChickynoidCM
end)
-- Warm the cache immediately
task.defer(getChickynoidCM)
-- Expose to IIFE sections so they share the cache
_G.__IronFrost_getChickynoidCM = getChickynoidCM

local SKINCHANGER_RUN_KEY = "XenoSkinChangerUI_v1"
local function getSkinchangerState()
    local changer = rawget(Environment, SKINCHANGER_RUN_KEY) or rawget(_G, SKINCHANGER_RUN_KEY)
    if type(changer) == "table" and changer.Alive ~= false then
        return changer
    end
    return nil
end

function State.GetSkinchangerConfigPayload()
    local changer = getSkinchangerState()
    if type(changer) == "table" then
        if type(changer.SaveConfig) == "function" then
            pcall(changer.SaveConfig)
        end
        if type(changer.ExportConfigPayload) == "function" then
            local okExport, payload = pcall(changer.ExportConfigPayload)
            if okExport and type(payload) == "table" then
                payload.visible = Config.SkinchangerUI == true
                return payload
            end
        end
    end

    local path = "IronFrost/IronFrost/skinchanger_config.json"
    if type(isfile) == "function" and type(readfile) == "function" and isfile(path) then
        local okRead, raw = pcall(readfile, path)
        if okRead and type(raw) == "string" and raw ~= "" then
            local okDecode, payload = pcall(function()
                return HttpService:JSONDecode(raw)
            end)
            if okDecode and type(payload) == "table" then
                payload.visible = Config.SkinchangerUI == true
                return payload
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function State.WriteSkinchangerConfigPayload(payload)
    if type(payload) ~= "table" or type(writefile) ~= "function" then
        return false
    end
    pcall(function()
        if type(isfolder) ~= "function" or not isfolder("IronFrost") then makefolder("IronFrost") end
        if type(isfolder) ~= "function" or not isfolder("IronFrost/IronFrost") then makefolder("IronFrost/IronFrost") end
    end)
    local okWrite = pcall(function()
        writefile("IronFrost/IronFrost/skinchanger_config.json", HttpService:JSONEncode(payload))
    end)
    return okWrite == true
end

function State.EnsureSkinchangerLoaded(shown)
    local changer = getSkinchangerState()
    if type(changer) == "table" then
        return changer
    end

    local shouldShow = shown == true
    rawset(_G, "IronFrostSkinChangerDesiredVisible", shouldShow)
    pcall(function()
        Environment.IronFrostSkinChangerDesiredVisible = shouldShow
    end)

    local loader = loadstring or load
    if type(loader) ~= "function" then
        State.LastError = "skinchanger loadstring unavailable"
        return nil
    end

    local fn, loadError = loader(IRONFROST_SKINCHANGER_SOURCE)
    if type(fn) ~= "function" then
        State.LastError = "skinchanger compile failed: " .. tostring(loadError)
        return nil
    end

    local okRun, runError = pcall(fn)
    if not okRun then
        State.LastError = "skinchanger load failed: " .. tostring(runError)
        return nil
    end

    changer = getSkinchangerState()
    if type(changer) ~= "table" then
        State.LastError = "skinchanger state missing"
        return nil
    end
    return changer
end

function State.ApplySkinchangerConfigPayload(payload)
    if type(payload) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    State.PendingSkinchangerConfigPayload = payload
    State.WriteSkinchangerConfigPayload(payload)

    local changer = getSkinchangerState()
    if type(changer) ~= "table" then
        changer = State.EnsureSkinchangerLoaded(Config.SkinchangerUI == true)
    end
    if type(changer) == "table" and type(changer.ApplyConfigPayload) == "function" then
        local okApply = pcall(changer.ApplyConfigPayload, payload)
        if okApply then
            State.PendingSkinchangerConfigPayload = nil
            if type(changer.SaveConfig) == "function" then
                pcall(changer.SaveConfig)
            end
            if type(changer.Refresh) == "function" then
                pcall(changer.Refresh)
            end
            return true
        end
    end
    return true
end

function State.SetSkinchangerUIVisible(visible)
    local shown = visible == true
    Config.SkinchangerUI = shown

    local changer = getSkinchangerState()
    if not changer and not shown then
        return true
    end

    if not changer then
        changer = State.EnsureSkinchangerLoaded(shown)
    end

    if type(changer) == "table" then
        local pendingPayload = State.PendingSkinchangerConfigPayload
        if type(pendingPayload) == "table" and type(changer.ApplyConfigPayload) == "function" then
            if pcall(changer.ApplyConfigPayload, pendingPayload) then
                State.PendingSkinchangerConfigPayload = nil
            end
        end
        if type(changer.SetVisible) == "function" then
            pcall(changer.SetVisible, shown)
        elseif changer.Root then
            pcall(function()
                changer.Root.Visible = shown
            end)
        end
        return true
    end

    State.LastError = "skinchanger state missing"
    return false
end

function State.SyncSkinchangerUI()
    return State.SetSkinchangerUIVisible(Config.SkinchangerUI == true)
end

local okMouseOverrideNone, mouseOverrideNone = pcall(function()
    return Enum.OverrideMouseIconBehavior.None
end)
local okMouseOverrideForceShow, mouseOverrideForceShow = pcall(function()
    return Enum.OverrideMouseIconBehavior.ForceShow
end)

local function setMouseOverride(value)
    if value ~= nil then
        pcall(function()
            UserInputService.OverrideMouseIconBehavior = value
        end)
    end
end

local function textLooksWeaponLike(value)
    local lower = string.lower(tostring(value or ""))
    if lower == "" then
        return false
    end
    return lower:find("gun", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("rifle", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("pistol", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("shotgun", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("sniper", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("revolver", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("weapon", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("ak", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("m4", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("m16", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("deagle", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("smg", 1, true) ~= nil
        or lower:find("lmg", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function workspaceHasWeaponViewmodel()
    local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
    if not camera then
        return false
    end
    for _, child in ipairs(camera:GetChildren()) do
        local lower = string.lower(tostring(child.Name or ""))
        if lower:find("viewmodel", 1, true)
            or lower:find("arms", 1, true)
            or lower:find("weapon", 1, true)
            or textLooksWeaponLike(lower)
        then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

local function localCharacterHasWeaponTool()
    local character = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character
    if typeof(character) ~= "Instance" then
        return false
    end
    for _, child in ipairs(character:GetChildren()) do
        if child:IsA("Tool") and textLooksWeaponLike(child.Name) then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

local function cameraIsFirstPerson()
    local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
    if not camera then
        return false
    end
    local lockedMouse = false
    pcall(function()
        lockedMouse = UserInputService.MouseBehavior == Enum.MouseBehavior.LockCenter
            or UserInputService.MouseBehavior == Enum.MouseBehavior.LockCurrentPosition
    end)
    if lockedMouse then
        return true
    end
    local focusDistance = (camera.CFrame.Position - camera.Focus.Position).Magnitude
    if focusDistance <= 1.25 then
        return true
    end
    local character = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character
    local head = character and character:FindFirstChild("Head")
    return head and head:IsA("BasePart") and (camera.CFrame.Position - head.Position).Magnitude <= 1.5
end

local function gameplayShouldOwnMouseIcon()
    if Config.AutoHideMouseInFirstPersonWeapon == false then
        return false
    end
    if not cameraIsFirstPerson() then
        return false
    end
    return workspaceHasWeaponViewmodel() or localCharacterHasWeaponTool()
end

local function guiObjectIsVisible(value)
    return typeof(value) == "Instance" and value:IsA("GuiObject") and value.Visible == true
end

local function linoriaMenuIsVisible()
    if State.LinoriaLoaded ~= true then
        return false
    end

    local window = State.LinoriaWindow
    if type(window) == "table" then
        for _, key in ipairs({ "Holder", "MainFrame", "Root", "Main", "Container" }) do
            if guiObjectIsVisible(window[key]) then
                return true
            end
        end
    end

    local library = State.LinoriaLibrary
    if type(library) == "table" then
        for _, key in ipairs({ "Holder", "MainFrame", "Root", "Main", "Container" }) do
            if guiObjectIsVisible(library[key]) then
                return true
            end
        end
    end

    return State.LinoriaMenuVisible == true and Config.ShowUI == true
end

local function readMouseOverride()
    local ok, value = pcall(function()
        return UserInputService.OverrideMouseIconBehavior
    end)
    if ok then
        return value
    end
    return nil
end

local function robloxMenuIsOpen()
    local ok, open = pcall(function()
        return GuiService.MenuIsOpen
    end)
    return ok and open == true
end

State.IronFrostMouseOwnsIcon = false
State.IronFrostMouseSnapshot = nil

local function captureIronFrostMouse()
    if State.IronFrostMouseOwnsIcon == true then
        return
    end
    State.IronFrostMouseOwnsIcon = true
    State.IronFrostMouseSnapshot = {
        MouseIconEnabled = UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled,
        OverrideMouseIconBehavior = readMouseOverride(),
    }
end

local function releaseIronFrostMouse()
    if State.IronFrostMouseOwnsIcon ~= true then
        return false
    end

    local snapshot = State.IronFrostMouseSnapshot
    State.IronFrostMouseOwnsIcon = false
    State.IronFrostMouseSnapshot = nil

    if snapshot then
        if snapshot.OverrideMouseIconBehavior ~= nil then
            setMouseOverride(snapshot.OverrideMouseIconBehavior)
        elseif okMouseOverrideNone then
            setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideNone)
        end
        if snapshot.MouseIconEnabled ~= nil then
            pcall(function()
                UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled = snapshot.MouseIconEnabled == true
            end)
        end
    elseif okMouseOverrideNone then
        setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideNone)
    end

    return true
end

State.LastMouseVisibilityFix = 0
State.RestoreGameMouseIcon = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(force)
    local clock = os.clock()
    if not force and clock - (tonumber(State.LastMouseVisibilityFix) or 0) < 0.15 then
        return
    end
    State.LastMouseVisibilityFix = clock

    if robloxMenuIsOpen() then
        releaseIronFrostMouse()
        if okMouseOverrideNone then
            setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideNone)
        end
        if UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled ~= true then
            UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled = true
        end
        return
    end

    local linoriaMenuOpen = linoriaMenuIsVisible()
    if linoriaMenuOpen then
        releaseIronFrostMouse()
        if okMouseOverrideNone then
            setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideNone)
        end
        return
    end

    local fallbackMenuOpen = Config.ShowUI == true and State.LinoriaLoaded ~= true and State.Window and State.Window.Visible == true
    if Config.ForceMouseVisible ~= false and fallbackMenuOpen then
        captureIronFrostMouse()
        if okMouseOverrideForceShow then
            setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideForceShow)
        end
        if UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled ~= true then
            UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled = true
        end
        return
    end

    if releaseIronFrostMouse() then
        return
    end

    if Config.ForceMouseVisible == false then
        if okMouseOverrideNone then
            setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideNone)
        end
        return
    end

    if gameplayShouldOwnMouseIcon() then
        if okMouseOverrideNone then
            setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideNone)
        end
        return
    end

    if okMouseOverrideNone then
        setMouseOverride(mouseOverrideNone)
    end
    return

end)

local releaseShootForAntiKatana = nil

local function antiKatanaShootBlocked()
    return Config.AntiKatana == true
        and State.Alive == true
        and os.clock() < (tonumber(State.KatanaBlockUntil) or 0)
end

local function setAntiKatanaShootBlock(reason, durationOverride)
    if Config.AntiKatana ~= true then
        return
    end
    local duration = math.clamp(tonumber(durationOverride) or tonumber(Config.AntiKatanaBlockSeconds) or 0.45, 0.05, 5)
    State.KatanaBlockUntil = math.max(tonumber(State.KatanaBlockUntil) or 0, os.clock() + duration)
    State.KatanaBlockReason = tostring(reason or "katana")
    State.LastError = "anti-katana shoot lock: " .. State.KatanaBlockReason
    if type(releaseShootForAntiKatana) == "function" then
        pcall(releaseShootForAntiKatana)
    end
end

local function disableLegacyRayHookFlags()
    Config.GenericRayHooks = false
    if type(getgc) ~= "function" then
        return
    end
    pcall(function()
        for _, obj in ipairs(getgc(true)) do
            if type(obj) == "table" then
                if rawget(obj, "GenericRayHook") ~= nil then obj.GenericRayHook = false end
                if rawget(obj, "GenericRayHooks") ~= nil then obj.GenericRayHooks = false end
            end
        end
    end)
end
disableLegacyRayHookFlags()

local function now()
    return os.clock()
end

local function setError(text)
    State.LastError = tostring(text or "")
end

local normalizeBindMode = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(mode)
    mode = tostring(mode or "Always")
    if mode ~= "Always" and mode ~= "Toggle" and mode ~= "Hold" then
        return "Always"
    end
    return mode
end)

local normalizeBindKey = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(value, fallback)
    if typeof(value) == "EnumItem" then
        if value == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
            return "MB1"
        elseif value == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then
            return "MB2"
        end
        return value.Name
    end

    value = tostring(value or fallback or "MB2")
    if value == "" then
        return tostring(fallback or "MB2")
    end
    return value

end)

local syncFeatureKeyPickerConfig = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local aimbotPicker = State.AimbotKeyPicker
    if aimbotPicker then
        Config.AimbotKeybind = normalizeBindKey(aimbotPicker.Value, Config.AimbotKeybind)
        Config.AimbotKeyMode = normalizeBindMode(aimbotPicker.Mode)
    end
end)

local featureKeyActive = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(enabled, picker, mode)
    if enabled ~= true then
        return false
    end
    if picker and type(picker.GetState) == "function" then
        local ok, active = pcall(picker.GetState, picker)
        if ok then
            return active == true
        end
    end
    return normalizeBindMode(mode) == "Always"
end)

local silentAimActive = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    return Config.Enabled == true
end)

local aimbotKeyActive = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if not Config.AimAssistEnabled then
        State.AimbotKeyState = false
        return false
    end

    local clock = os.clock()
    if clock < (tonumber(State.AimbotToggleQuietUntil) or 0) then
        State.AimbotKeyState = false
        return false
    end

    local pollRate = math.max(0.015, tonumber(Config.AimAssistKeyPollRate) or 0.04)
    if clock - (tonumber(State.AimbotKeyStateAt) or 0) < pollRate then
        return State.AimbotKeyState == true
    end
    State.AimbotKeyStateAt = clock

    local active = false
    if State.AimbotKeyPicker then
        active = featureKeyActive(true, State.AimbotKeyPicker, Config.AimbotKeyMode)
        State.AimbotKeyState = active == true
        return State.AimbotKeyState
    end
    -- Fallback UI has no Linoria key picker. Its input state is maintained
    -- below so Always, Hold, and Toggle work identically in both UIs.
    local fallback = State.AimFallback
    local mode = normalizeBindMode(Config.AimbotKeyMode)
    if mode == "Always" then
        active = true
    elseif fallback then
        active = mode == "Hold" and fallback.Held == true or fallback.Toggled == true
    end
    State.AimbotKeyState = active == true
    return State.AimbotKeyState
end)

local onAimAssistToggle = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(enabled)
    local clock = os.clock()
    State.AimbotToggleChangedAt = clock
    State.AimbotToggleQuietUntil = clock + math.max(0, tonumber(Config.AimAssistToggleQuietTime) or 0.18)
    State.AimbotKeyState = false
    State.AimbotKeyStateAt = 0
    syncFeatureKeyPickerConfig()

    if not enabled then
        local suppliedAim = rawget(_G, "XenoSilentAimPrivate")
        if type(suppliedAim) == "table" then
            suppliedAim.CurrentTarget = nil
            suppliedAim.ShotTarget = nil
            suppliedAim.ShotTargetUntil = 0
            suppliedAim.FireRewriteUntil = 0
        end
    end
end)

local getPlayerByUserIdMap = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local clock = os.clock()
    if State.PlayerByUserId and clock - (tonumber(State.PlayerByUserIdAt) or 0) < 0.5 then
        return State.PlayerByUserId
    end

    local map = {}
    for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        map[player.UserId] = player
        map[tostring(player.UserId)] = player
    end
    State.PlayerByUserId = map
    State.PlayerByUserIdAt = clock
    return map
end)

local function connect(signal, callback)
    local connection = signal:Connect(callback)
    table.insert(State.Connections, connection)
    return connection
end

local function clampGuiPositionToViewport(guiObject, position, headerHeight)
    if typeof(guiObject) ~= "Instance" or not guiObject:IsA("GuiObject") then
        return position
    end

    local camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
    local viewport = camera and camera.ViewportSize or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)
    local size = guiObject.AbsoluteSize
    if size.X <= 0 or size.Y <= 0 then
        return position
    end

    local anchor = guiObject.AnchorPoint
    local x = (position.X.Scale * viewport.X) + position.X.Offset
    local y = (position.Y.Scale * viewport.Y) + position.Y.Offset

    local minVisibleX = math.min(180, math.max(48, size.X * 0.2))
    local minX = minVisibleX - (size.X * (1 - anchor.X))
    local maxX = viewport.X - minVisibleX + (size.X * anchor.X)
    if maxX >= minX then
        x = math.clamp(x, minX, maxX)
    end

    local header = math.clamp(tonumber(headerHeight) or 42, 24, math.max(24, size.Y))
    local top = y - (size.Y * anchor.Y)
    local minTop = 4
    local maxTop = math.max(minTop, viewport.Y - header)
    top = math.clamp(top, minTop, maxTop)
    y = top + (size.Y * anchor.Y)

    return UDim2.fromOffset(math.floor(x + 0.5), math.floor(y + 0.5))
end

local unlockAllCleanup

do
local function unlockAllSafeRequire(instance)
    if typeof(instance) ~= "Instance" or not instance:IsA("ModuleScript") then
        return nil
    end

    local ok, result = pcall(require, instance)
    if ok then
        return result
    end

    State.UnlockAll.LastStatus = "require failed: " .. tostring(instance.Name)
    return nil
end

local function unlockAllGetPath(root, parts)
    local cursor = root
    for _, name in ipairs(parts) do
        cursor = cursor and cursor:FindFirstChild(name)
        if not cursor then
            return nil
        end
    end
    return cursor
end

local function unlockAllDeepCopy(source, seen)
    if type(source) ~= "table" then
        return source
    end

    seen = seen or {}
    if seen[source] then
        return seen[source]
    end

    local copy = {}
    seen[source] = copy
    for key, value in pairs(source) do
        copy[unlockAllDeepCopy(key, seen)] = unlockAllDeepCopy(value, seen)
    end
    return copy
end

local function unlockAllTrackRestore(callback)
    local restores = State.UnlockAll.Restores
    restores[#restores + 1] = callback
    return callback
end

local function unlockAllNewWeakKeyTable()
    return setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
end

local function unlockAllResetGenerated()
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    unlock.Generated = {
        Skins = {},
        Wraps = {},
        Charms = {},
        Finishers = {},
    }
    unlock.AppliedData = unlockAllNewWeakKeyTable()
end

local function unlockAllMarkDirty(reason)
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    unlock.Dirty = true
    unlock.GuiDirty = true
    unlock.LastStatus = reason and ("dirty: " .. tostring(reason)) or unlock.LastStatus
    unlockAllResetGenerated()
end

local function unlockAllBuildSignature()
    return table.concat({
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchWeapons == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchSkins == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchWraps == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchCharms == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchFinishers == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchCurrency == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchBattlepass == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllPatchGuiLocks == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllOwnedWeaponsOnly == true),
        tostring(Config.UnlockAllFakeCrowns),
        tostring(State.UnlockAll.OwnedSignature or ""),
    }, "|")
end

local function unlockAllFolderMap(instance, wrapInAll)
    local required = unlockAllSafeRequire(instance)
    if type(required) == "table" then
        return required
    end

    local map = {}
    if typeof(instance) == "Instance" then
        for _, child in ipairs(instance:GetDescendants()) do
            if child:IsA("ModuleScript") then
                local item = unlockAllSafeRequire(child)
                if type(item) == "table" then
                    local id = item.ID or item.id or item.Name or child.Name
                    if id ~= nil then
                        map[tostring(id)] = item
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    if wrapInAll then
        return { all = map }
    end
    return map
end

local function unlockAllGetDirectory()
    local milk = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Milk")
    local direct = milk and unlockAllSafeRequire(milk:FindFirstChild("Directory"))
    if type(direct) == "table" then
        return direct
    end

    local milkModule = milk and unlockAllSafeRequire(milk)
    if type(milkModule) == "table" then
        pcall(function()
            if type(milkModule.Init) == "function" then
                milkModule:Init()
            end
        end)
        if type(milkModule.Directory) == "table" then
            return milkModule.Directory
        end
    end

    return {}
end

local function unlockAllNormalizeItems(directory)
    local items = type(directory) == "table" and directory.Items or nil
    if type(items) == "table" and type(items.all) == "table" then
        return items
    end

    local folder = unlockAllGetPath(ReplicatedStorage, { "Milk", "Directory", "Items" })
    items = unlockAllFolderMap(folder, true)
    if type(items) == "table" and type(items.all) == "table" then
        return items
    end

    return { all = {} }
end

local function unlockAllNormalizeCosmetics(directory, key)
    local source = type(directory) == "table" and directory[key] or nil
    if type(source) == "table" then
        return source
    end

    local folder = unlockAllGetPath(ReplicatedStorage, { "Milk", "Directory", key })
    return unlockAllFolderMap(folder, false)
end

local function unlockAllGetLocalData()
    local dataHandler = State.UnlockAll.Modules.DataHandler
    if type(dataHandler) ~= "table" or type(dataHandler.GetDataAsync) ~= "function" then
        return nil
    end

    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    local previousSuppress = unlock.SuppressDataPatch
    unlock.SuppressDataPatch = true
    local ok, data = pcall(function()
        return dataHandler:GetDataAsync(LocalPlayer)
    end)
    unlock.SuppressDataPatch = previousSuppress
    if ok and type(data) == "table" then
        return data
    end
    return nil
end

local function unlockAllRememberPath(root, path)
    local originals = State.UnlockAll.Originals.Data
    local node = originals
    for index = 1, #path - 1 do
        local key = path[index]
        node[key] = node[key] or {}
        node = node[key]
    end

    local leaf = path[#path]
    if node[leaf] ~= nil then
        return
    end

    local cursor = root
    for _, key in ipairs(path) do
        if type(cursor) ~= "table" then
            cursor = nil
            break
        end
        cursor = cursor[key]
    end

    node[leaf] = {
        exists = cursor ~= nil,
        value = unlockAllDeepCopy(cursor),
    }
end

local function unlockAllSetRemembered(root, path, value)
    if type(root) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    unlockAllRememberPath(root, path)
    local cursor = root
    for index = 1, #path - 1 do
        local key = path[index]
        if type(cursor[key]) ~= "table" then
            cursor[key] = {}
        end
        cursor = cursor[key]
    end
    local finalKey = path[#path]
    cursor[finalKey] = value
end

local function unlockAllRestoreRemembered(root, originals)
    if type(root) ~= "table" or type(originals) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    for key, value in pairs(originals) do
        if type(value) == "table" and value.exists ~= nil then
            if value.exists then
                root[key] = value.value
            else
                root[key] = nil
            end
        elseif type(root[key]) == "table" then
            unlockAllRestoreRemembered(root[key], value)
        end
    end
end

local function unlockAllRestoreData()
    local data = unlockAllGetLocalData()
    if type(data) == "table" then
        unlockAllRestoreRemembered(data, State.UnlockAll.Originals.Data)
    end
    State.UnlockAll.Originals.Data = {}
end

local function unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId)
    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    return type(items) == "table"
        and type(items.all) == "table"
        and type(items.all[tostring(weaponId)]) == "table"
end

local function unlockAllCosmeticExists(source, cosmeticId)
    return type(source) == "table" and type(source[tostring(cosmeticId)]) == "table"
end

local function unlockAllSkinExists(weaponId, skinId)
    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    local weapon = type(items) == "table" and type(items.all) == "table" and items.all[tostring(weaponId)] or nil
    return type(weapon) == "table"
        and type(weapon.skins) == "table"
        and type(weapon.skins[tostring(skinId or "base")]) == "table"
end

local function unlockAllFakeEntry(id)
    return {
        serial = "IRONFROST-" .. tostring(id),
        localUnlock = true,
    }
end

local function unlockAllCaptureRealOwnedWeapons(force)
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    local now = os.clock()
    if not force and now - (tonumber(unlock.LastOwnedRefresh) or 0) < 8 then
        local count = 0
        for _ in pairs(unlock.RealOwnedWeapons) do
            count += 1
        end
        return count
    end
    unlock.LastOwnedRefresh = now

    local items = unlock.Modules.Items
    local data = unlockAllGetLocalData()
    local ownedItems = type(data) == "table" and data.Items or nil
    if type(ownedItems) ~= "table" or type(items) ~= "table" or type(items.all) ~= "table" then
        return 0
    end

    local realOwnedWeapons = {}
    local realOwnedNIDs = {}
    local ownedKeys = {}
    for nid, row in pairs(ownedItems) do
        if row ~= nil then
            local nidKey = tostring(nid)
            realOwnedNIDs[nidKey] = true
            ownedKeys[#ownedKeys + 1] = nidKey
        end
    end

    local count = 0
    for weaponId, weapon in pairs(items.all) do
        if type(weapon) == "table" and weapon.nID ~= nil and realOwnedNIDs[tostring(weapon.nID)] then
            realOwnedWeapons[tostring(weaponId)] = true
            count += 1
        end
    end
    table.sort(ownedKeys)
    local signature = table.concat(ownedKeys, ",")
    if signature ~= unlock.OwnedSignature then
        unlock.OwnedSignature = signature
        unlock.RealOwnedWeapons = realOwnedWeapons
        unlock.RealOwnedNIDs = realOwnedNIDs
        unlockAllMarkDirty("inventory changed")
    else
        unlock.RealOwnedWeapons = realOwnedWeapons
        unlock.RealOwnedNIDs = realOwnedNIDs
    end
    return count
end

local function unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId)
    weaponId = tostring(weaponId or "")
    if weaponId == "" or not unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) then
        return false
    end
    if Config.UnlockAllOwnedWeaponsOnly ~= true then
        return true
    end
    return State.UnlockAll.RealOwnedWeapons[weaponId] == true
end

local function unlockAllUnownedWeaponList()
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    if unlock.Generated.UnownedSignature == unlock.OwnedSignature and type(unlock.Generated.UnownedWeapons) == "table" then
        return unlock.Generated.UnownedWeapons
    end

    local missing = {}
    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    if type(items) ~= "table" or type(items.all) ~= "table" then
        return missing
    end

    for weaponId in pairs(items.all) do
        weaponId = tostring(weaponId)
        if not unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) then
            missing[#missing + 1] = weaponId
        end
    end
    unlock.Generated.UnownedSignature = unlock.OwnedSignature
    unlock.Generated.UnownedWeapons = missing
    return missing
end

local function unlockAllAllSkinsForWeapon(weaponId)
    weaponId = tostring(weaponId)
    local cache = State.UnlockAll.Generated.Skins
    if type(cache) == "table" and type(cache[weaponId]) == "table" then
        return cache[weaponId]
    end

    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    local weapon = type(items) == "table" and type(items.all) == "table" and items.all[weaponId] or nil
    local owned = {}
    if type(weapon) == "table" and type(weapon.skins) == "table" then
        for skinId in pairs(weapon.skins) do
            skinId = tostring(skinId)
            if skinId ~= "base" then
                owned[skinId] = unlockAllFakeEntry(tostring(weaponId) .. "-" .. skinId)
            end
        end
    end
    State.UnlockAll.Generated.Skins[weaponId] = owned
    return owned
end

local function unlockAllAllCosmetics(source, weaponId)
    weaponId = tostring(weaponId or "global")
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    local cacheName = nil
    if source == unlock.Modules.Wraps then
        cacheName = "Wraps"
    elseif source == unlock.Modules.Charms then
        cacheName = "Charms"
    elseif source == unlock.Modules.Finishers then
        cacheName = "Finishers"
    end
    local cache = cacheName and unlock.Generated[cacheName] or nil
    if type(cache) == "table" and type(cache[weaponId]) == "table" then
        return cache[weaponId]
    end

    local owned = {}
    if type(source) == "table" then
        for cosmeticId in pairs(source) do
            owned[tostring(cosmeticId)] = unlockAllFakeEntry(weaponId .. "-" .. tostring(cosmeticId))
        end
    end
    if type(cache) == "table" then
        cache[weaponId] = owned
    end
    return owned
end

local function unlockAllApplyCurrency(data)
    if Config.UnlockAllPatchCurrency then
        unlockAllSetRemembered(data, { "Currency", "crowns" }, Config.UnlockAllFakeCrowns)
    end
end

local function unlockAllApplyBattlepass(data)
    if not Config.UnlockAllPatchBattlepass then
        return
    end

    local constants = nil
    local milk = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Milk")
    if milk then
        constants = unlockAllSafeRequire(milk:FindFirstChild("Constants"))
    end
    local active = type(constants) == "table" and constants.ActiveBattlepass or "Active"
    unlockAllSetRemembered(data, { "Battlepasses", active, "PremiumOwned" }, true)
end

local function unlockAllApplyWeaponUnlocks(data)
    if not Config.UnlockAllPatchWeapons then
        return
    end

    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    if type(items) ~= "table" or type(items.all) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    for _, weapon in pairs(items.all) do
        if type(weapon) == "table" and weapon.nID ~= nil then
            unlockAllSetRemembered(data, { "Items", weapon.nID }, data.Items and data.Items[weapon.nID] or {})
        end
    end
end

local function unlockAllApplySkinUnlocks(data)
    if not Config.UnlockAllPatchSkins then
        return
    end

    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    if type(items) ~= "table" or type(items.all) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    for weaponId, weapon in pairs(items.all) do
        if unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId)
            and type(weapon) == "table"
            and weapon.nID ~= nil
            and type(weapon.skins) == "table"
        then
            unlockAllSetRemembered(data, { "Skins", weapon.nID }, unlockAllAllSkinsForWeapon(weaponId))
        end
    end
end

local function unlockAllApplyPerWeaponCosmetics(data, key, source)
    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    if type(items) ~= "table" or type(items.all) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    for weaponId, weapon in pairs(items.all) do
        if unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and type(weapon) == "table" and weapon.nID ~= nil then
            unlockAllSetRemembered(data, { key, weapon.nID }, unlockAllAllCosmetics(source, weaponId))
        end
    end
end

local function unlockAllApplyShopData(data, force)
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    if unlock.ApplyingData then
        return
    end

    data = data or unlockAllGetLocalData()
    if type(data) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    local signature = unlockAllBuildSignature()
    if not force and unlock.Dirty ~= true and unlock.AppliedData and unlock.AppliedData[data] == signature then
        unlock.LastStatus = "applied cached"
        return
    end

    unlock.ApplyingData = true
    local ok, err = pcall(function()
        if Config.UnlockAll ~= true then
            unlockAllRestoreRemembered(data, unlock.Originals.Data)
            unlock.Originals.Data = {}
            unlock.AppliedData = unlockAllNewWeakKeyTable()
            return
        end

        unlockAllApplyCurrency(data)
        unlockAllApplyBattlepass(data)
        unlockAllApplyWeaponUnlocks(data)
        unlockAllApplySkinUnlocks(data)

        if Config.UnlockAllPatchWraps then
            unlockAllApplyPerWeaponCosmetics(data, "Wraps", unlock.Modules.Wraps)
        end
        if Config.UnlockAllPatchCharms then
            unlockAllApplyPerWeaponCosmetics(data, "Charms", unlock.Modules.Charms)
        end
        if Config.UnlockAllPatchFinishers then
            unlockAllApplyPerWeaponCosmetics(data, "Finishers", unlock.Modules.Finishers)
        end
    end)
    unlock.ApplyingData = false

    if ok then
        unlock.Dirty = false
        if Config.UnlockAll == true then
            unlock.AppliedData[data] = signature
        end
        unlock.LastStatus = "applied"
    else
        unlock.LastStatus = "apply failed: " .. tostring(err)
    end
end

local function unlockAllPatchInventoryHandler()
    local inventoryHandler = State.UnlockAll.Modules.InventoryHandler
    if type(inventoryHandler) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    local methods = {
        "OwnsItem",
        "OwnsSkin",
        "GetOwnedSkins",
        "OwnsCharm",
        "GetOwnedCharms",
        "GetCharmSerial",
        "OwnsWrap",
        "GetOwnedWraps",
        "GetWrapSerial",
        "OwnsFinisher",
        "GetOwnedFinishers",
        "GetFinisherSerial",
        "GetUnownedWeaponsForWrap",
        "GetUnownedWeaponsForCharm",
        "GetUnownedWeaponsForFinisher",
    }

    local original = {}
    for _, method in ipairs(methods) do
        if type(inventoryHandler[method]) == "function" then
            original[method] = inventoryHandler[method]
        end
    end

    if original.OwnsItem then
        inventoryHandler.OwnsItem = function(self, weaponId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchWeapons and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) then
                return true
            end
            return original.OwnsItem(self, weaponId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.OwnsSkin then
        inventoryHandler.OwnsSkin = function(self, weaponId, skinId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchSkins and unlockAllSkinExists(weaponId, skinId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId)
            end
            return original.OwnsSkin(self, weaponId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.OwnsWrap then
        inventoryHandler.OwnsWrap = function(self, weaponId, wrapId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchWraps and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Wraps, wrapId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId)
            end
            return original.OwnsWrap(self, weaponId, wrapId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.OwnsCharm then
        inventoryHandler.OwnsCharm = function(self, weaponId, charmId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchCharms and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Charms, charmId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId)
            end
            return original.OwnsCharm(self, weaponId, charmId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.OwnsFinisher then
        inventoryHandler.OwnsFinisher = function(self, weaponId, finisherId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchFinishers and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Finishers, finisherId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId)
            end
            return original.OwnsFinisher(self, weaponId, finisherId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetOwnedSkins then
        inventoryHandler.GetOwnedSkins = function(self, weaponId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchSkins and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and unlockAllAllSkinsForWeapon(weaponId) or {}
            end
            return original.GetOwnedSkins(self, weaponId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetOwnedWraps then
        inventoryHandler.GetOwnedWraps = function(self, weaponId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchWraps and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and unlockAllAllCosmetics(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Wraps, weaponId) or {}
            end
            return original.GetOwnedWraps(self, weaponId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetOwnedCharms then
        inventoryHandler.GetOwnedCharms = function(self, weaponId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchCharms and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and unlockAllAllCosmetics(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Charms, weaponId) or {}
            end
            return original.GetOwnedCharms(self, weaponId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetOwnedFinishers then
        inventoryHandler.GetOwnedFinishers = function(self, weaponId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchFinishers and unlockAllWeaponExists(weaponId) then
                return unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and unlockAllAllCosmetics(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Finishers, weaponId) or {}
            end
            return original.GetOwnedFinishers(self, weaponId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetWrapSerial then
        inventoryHandler.GetWrapSerial = function(self, weaponId, wrapId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchWraps and unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Wraps, wrapId) then
                return "IRONFROST-WRAP-" .. tostring(wrapId)
            end
            return original.GetWrapSerial(self, weaponId, wrapId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetCharmSerial then
        inventoryHandler.GetCharmSerial = function(self, weaponId, charmId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchCharms and unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Charms, charmId) then
                return "IRONFROST-CHARM-" .. tostring(charmId)
            end
            return original.GetCharmSerial(self, weaponId, charmId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetFinisherSerial then
        inventoryHandler.GetFinisherSerial = function(self, weaponId, finisherId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchFinishers and unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Finishers, finisherId) then
                return "IRONFROST-FINISHER-" .. tostring(finisherId)
            end
            return original.GetFinisherSerial(self, weaponId, finisherId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetUnownedWeaponsForWrap then
        inventoryHandler.GetUnownedWeaponsForWrap = function(self, wrapId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchWraps and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Wraps, wrapId) then
                return unlockAllUnownedWeaponList()
            end
            return original.GetUnownedWeaponsForWrap(self, wrapId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetUnownedWeaponsForCharm then
        inventoryHandler.GetUnownedWeaponsForCharm = function(self, charmId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchCharms and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Charms, charmId) then
                return unlockAllUnownedWeaponList()
            end
            return original.GetUnownedWeaponsForCharm(self, charmId, ...)
        end
    end

    if original.GetUnownedWeaponsForFinisher then
        inventoryHandler.GetUnownedWeaponsForFinisher = function(self, finisherId, ...)
            if Config.UnlockAll and Config.UnlockAllPatchFinishers and unlockAllCosmeticExists(State.UnlockAll.Modules.Finishers, finisherId) then
                return unlockAllUnownedWeaponList()
            end
            return original.GetUnownedWeaponsForFinisher(self, finisherId, ...)
        end
    end

    unlockAllTrackRestore(function()
        for method, callback in pairs(original) do
            if inventoryHandler[method] ~= callback then
                inventoryHandler[method] = callback
            end
        end
    end)
end

local function unlockAllPatchDataHandler()
    local dataHandler = State.UnlockAll.Modules.DataHandler
    if type(dataHandler) ~= "table" or type(dataHandler.GetDataAsync) ~= "function" then
        return
    end

    local oldGetDataAsync = dataHandler.GetDataAsync
    dataHandler.GetDataAsync = function(self, player, ...)
        local data = oldGetDataAsync(self, player, ...)
        if Config.UnlockAll
            and State.UnlockAll.SuppressDataPatch ~= true
            and (player == nil or player == LocalPlayer or player == LocalPlayer.Character)
        then
            unlockAllApplyShopData(data, false)
        end
        return data
    end

    unlockAllTrackRestore(function()
        if dataHandler.GetDataAsync ~= oldGetDataAsync then
            dataHandler.GetDataAsync = oldGetDataAsync
        end
    end)
end

local unlockAllWeaponImageToId = nil

local function unlockAllNormalizeAssetKey(value)
    local text = tostring(value or "")
    local id = text:match("%d+")
    return id and tostring(id) or nil
end

local function unlockAllAddWeaponImageKey(index, image, weaponId)
    local key = unlockAllNormalizeAssetKey(image)
    if key and key ~= "" then
        index[key] = tostring(weaponId)
    end
end

local function unlockAllGetWeaponImageIndex()
    if unlockAllWeaponImageToId then
        return unlockAllWeaponImageToId
    end

    local index = {}
    local items = State.UnlockAll.Modules.Items
    if type(items) == "table" and type(items.all) == "table" then
        for weaponId, weapon in pairs(items.all) do
            if type(weapon) == "table" then
                unlockAllAddWeaponImageKey(index, weapon.icon, weaponId)
                unlockAllAddWeaponImageKey(index, weapon.flippedIcon, weaponId)
                if type(weapon.skins) == "table" then
                    for _, skin in pairs(weapon.skins) do
                        if type(skin) == "table" then
                            unlockAllAddWeaponImageKey(index, skin.icon, weaponId)
                            unlockAllAddWeaponImageKey(index, skin.flippedIcon, weaponId)
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    unlockAllWeaponImageToId = index
    return unlockAllWeaponImageToId
end

local function unlockAllWeaponIdFromGuiImage(gui)
    if not (gui:IsA("ImageLabel") or gui:IsA("ImageButton")) then
        return nil
    end
    local key = unlockAllNormalizeAssetKey(gui.Image)
    return key and unlockAllGetWeaponImageIndex()[key] or nil
end

local function unlockAllWeaponIdFromGuiContext(instance)
    local cursor = instance
    while cursor do
        if unlockAllWeaponExists(cursor.Name) then
            return tostring(cursor.Name)
        end

        for _, attributeName in ipairs({ "WeaponId", "weaponId", "WeaponID", "weaponID", "ItemId", "itemId", "ItemID", "itemID", "ID", "Id", "id" }) do
            local ok, value = pcall(function()
                return cursor:GetAttribute(attributeName)
            end)
            if ok and value ~= nil and unlockAllWeaponExists(value) then
                return tostring(value)
            end
        end

        if cursor:IsA("ImageLabel") or cursor:IsA("ImageButton") then
            local weaponId = unlockAllWeaponIdFromGuiImage(cursor)
            if weaponId then
                return weaponId
            end
        end

        cursor = cursor.Parent
    end
    return nil
end

local function unlockAllRememberGui(instance, property)
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    unlock.GuiOriginals = unlock.GuiOriginals or setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
    local saved = unlock.GuiOriginals[instance]
    if not saved then
        saved = {}
        unlock.GuiOriginals[instance] = saved
    end
    if saved[property] == nil then
        saved[property] = instance[property]
    end
end

local function unlockAllSetGui(instance, property, value)
    local ok = pcall(function()
        unlockAllRememberGui(instance, property)
        instance[property] = value
    end)
    return ok
end

local function unlockAllRestoreGui()
    local originals = State.UnlockAll.GuiOriginals
    if type(originals) ~= "table" then
        return
    end

    for instance, props in pairs(originals) do
        if typeof(instance) == "Instance" and instance.Parent ~= nil then
            for property, value in pairs(props) do
                pcall(function()
                    instance[property] = value
                end)
            end
        end
    end
    State.UnlockAll.GuiOriginals = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" })
end

local function unlockAllIsShopArmoryGui(instance)
    local cursor = instance
    while cursor do
        if cursor.Name == "Shop" or cursor.Name == "Armory" then
            local parent = cursor.Parent
            while parent do
                if parent.Name == "Lobby" then
                    return true
                end
                parent = parent.Parent
            end
        end
        cursor = cursor.Parent
    end
    return false
end

local function unlockAllInstallGuiWatcher()
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    if unlock.GuiWatcherInstalled then
        return
    end

    local playerGui = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
    if not playerGui then
        return
    end

    unlock.GuiWatcherInstalled = true
    local connection = playerGui.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(instance)
        if Config.UnlockAll == true and unlockAllIsShopArmoryGui(instance) then
            unlock.GuiDirty = true
        end
    end)
    unlockAllTrackRestore(function()
        pcall(function()
            connection:Disconnect()
        end)
        unlock.GuiWatcherInstalled = false
    end)
end

local function unlockAllPatchGuiLocks(force)
    if Config.UnlockAll ~= true or Config.UnlockAllPatchGuiLocks ~= true then
        return
    end

    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    local now = os.clock()
    if not force then
        if unlock.GuiDirty ~= true and now - (tonumber(unlock.LastGuiPatchClock) or 0) < 12 then
            return
        end
        if now - (tonumber(unlock.LastGuiPatchClock) or 0) < 0.8 then
            return
        end
    end
    unlock.LastGuiPatchClock = now
    unlock.GuiDirty = false

    local playerGui = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
    local lobby = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild("Lobby")
    if not lobby then
        unlock.GuiDirty = true
        return
    end

    local changed = 0
    for _, rootName in ipairs({ "Shop", "Armory" }) do
        local root = lobby:FindFirstChild(rootName)
        if root then
            for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
                if descendant:IsA("GuiObject") then
                    local weaponId = unlockAllWeaponIdFromGuiContext(descendant)
                    local ownsWeapon = weaponId and unlockAllActuallyOwnsWeapon(weaponId) or false
                    local lower = string.lower(tostring(descendant.Name or ""))

                    if ownsWeapon and (lower == "owned" or lower == "lock" or lower == "locked" or lower:find("lock", 1, true)) then
                        if descendant.Visible ~= false and unlockAllSetGui(descendant, "Visible", false) then
                            changed += 1
                        end
                    elseif ownsWeapon and (lower == "render" or lower == "icon" or lower == "viewportframe" or lower == "weapontemplate") then
                        if descendant:IsA("ImageLabel") or descendant:IsA("ImageButton") then
                            if unlockAllSetGui(descendant, "ImageColor3", Color3.new(1, 1, 1)) then
                                changed += 1
                            end
                            if descendant.ImageTransparency > 0.25 then
                                unlockAllSetGui(descendant, "ImageTransparency", 0)
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    State.UnlockAll.LastGuiPatch = "patched gui: " .. tostring(changed)
end

local function unlockAllEnsureInitialized()
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    if unlock.Initialized then
        return true
    end
    if unlock.Initializing then
        return false
    end

    unlock.Initializing = true
    local ok, err = pcall(function()
        local directory = unlockAllGetDirectory()
        local items = unlockAllNormalizeItems(directory)
        local wraps = unlockAllNormalizeCosmetics(directory, "Wraps")
        local charms = unlockAllNormalizeCosmetics(directory, "Charms")
        local finishers = unlockAllNormalizeCosmetics(directory, "Finishers")
        local dataHandler = unlockAllSafeRequire(unlockAllGetPath(ReplicatedStorage, { "Modules", "Handlers", "DataHandler" }))
        local inventoryHandler = unlockAllSafeRequire(unlockAllGetPath(ReplicatedStorage, { "Modules", "Handlers", "InventoryHandler" }))

        if type(items) ~= "table" or type(items.all) ~= "table" or next(items.all) == nil then
            error("items directory missing")
        end
        if type(dataHandler) ~= "table" or type(dataHandler.GetDataAsync) ~= "function" then
            error("DataHandler missing")
        end
        if type(inventoryHandler) ~= "table" then
            error("InventoryHandler missing")
        end

        unlock.Modules.Directory = directory
        unlock.Modules.Items = items
        unlock.Modules.Wraps = wraps or {}
        unlock.Modules.Charms = charms or {}
        unlock.Modules.Finishers = finishers or {}
        unlock.Modules.DataHandler = dataHandler
        unlock.Modules.InventoryHandler = inventoryHandler

        unlockAllCaptureRealOwnedWeapons(true)
        unlockAllPatchInventoryHandler()
        unlockAllPatchDataHandler()
        unlockAllInstallGuiWatcher()
        unlock.Initialized = true
        unlock.LastStatus = "ready"
    end)
    unlock.Initializing = false

    if not ok then
        unlock.LastStatus = "init failed: " .. tostring(err)
        return false
    end
    return true
end

local function unlockAllUpdate(force)
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    if Config.UnlockAll ~= true then
        if unlock.WasEnabled then
            pcall(unlockAllRestoreData)
            pcall(unlockAllRestoreGui)
            unlock.WasEnabled = false
            unlock.Dirty = true
            unlock.GuiDirty = true
            unlock.AppliedData = unlockAllNewWeakKeyTable()
            unlockAllResetGenerated()
            unlock.LastStatus = "disabled"
        end
        return false
    end

    if not unlockAllEnsureInitialized() then
        return false
    end

    local t = os.clock()
    local refresh = math.max(2.0, tonumber(Config.UnlockAllRefreshRate) or 5)
    if not force and unlock.Dirty ~= true and t - (tonumber(unlock.LastApply) or 0) < refresh then
        return true
    end

    unlock.WasEnabled = true
    unlock.LastApply = t
    unlockAllCaptureRealOwnedWeapons(force == true)
    unlockAllApplyShopData(nil, force == true)
    unlockAllPatchGuiLocks(force == true)
    return true
end

State.RefreshUnlockAll = function(force)
    if force and Config.UnlockAll == true then
        unlockAllMarkDirty("manual refresh")
    end
    return unlockAllUpdate(force == true)
end

unlockAllCleanup = function()
    local unlock = State.UnlockAll
    pcall(unlockAllRestoreData)
    pcall(unlockAllRestoreGui)
    for index = #unlock.Restores, 1, -1 do
        pcall(unlock.Restores[index])
    end
    table.clear(unlock.Restores)
    unlock.Initialized = false
    unlock.WasEnabled = false
    unlock.LastStatus = "cleaned"
    unlock.Dirty = true
    unlock.GuiDirty = true
    unlock.AppliedData = unlockAllNewWeakKeyTable()
    unlockAllResetGenerated()
end

task.spawn(function()
    while State.Alive do
        pcall(unlockAllUpdate)
        task.wait(Config.UnlockAll and math.max(2.0, tonumber(Config.UnlockAllRefreshRate) or 5) or 0.5)
    end
end)
end

local function hasHookSupport()
    return type(hookmetamethod) == "function"
        and type(newcclosure) == "function"
        and type(getnamecallmethod) == "function"
end

local function isExecutorCaller()
    if type(checkcaller) == "function" then
        local ok, result = pcall(checkcaller)
        return ok and result == true
    end
    return false
end

local function safeGuiParent()
    if type(gethui) == "function" then
        local ok, result = pcall(gethui)
        if ok and result then
            return result
        end
    end

    local playerGui = LocalPlayer:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
    if playerGui then
        return playerGui
    end

    return CoreGui
end

local updateUIControls
local clearESP

local function addCorner(parent, radius)
    local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(0, radius or 6)
    corner.Parent = parent
    return corner
end

local function addStroke(parent, color, transparency)
    local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    stroke.Color = color or Color3.fromRGB(70, 86, 105)
    stroke.Transparency = transparency or 0.35
    stroke.Thickness = 1
    stroke.Parent = parent
    return stroke
end

local function makeText(parent, name, text, size, color)
    local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
    label.Name = name
    label.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    label.BorderSizePixel = 0
    label.Font = Enum.Font.GothamMedium
    label.Text = text
    label.TextColor3 = color or Color3.fromRGB(230, 238, 248)
    label.TextSize = size or 13
    label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
    label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Center
    label.Parent = parent
    return label
end

local function makeButton(parent, text)
    local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
    button.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(24, 31, 42)
    button.BorderSizePixel = 0
    button.AutoButtonColor = true
    button.Font = Enum.Font.GothamMedium
    button.Text = text
    button.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(235, 242, 250)
    button.TextSize = 13
    button.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 30)
    button.Parent = parent
    addCorner(button, 6)
    addStroke(button, Color3.fromRGB(65, 82, 100), 0.45)
    return button
end

local function createPage(name)
    local page = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame")
    page.Name = name .. "Page"
    page.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    page.BorderSizePixel = 0
    page.ScrollBarThickness = 4
    page.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 0)
    page.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
    page.Visible = false
    page.Parent = State.PageHost

    local layout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
    layout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 8)
    layout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
    layout.Parent = page

    local padding = Instance.new("UIPadding")
    padding.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 10)
    padding.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 10)
    padding.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 10)
    padding.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, 10)
    padding.Parent = page

    connect(layout:GetPropertyChangedSignal("AbsoluteContentSize"), function()
        page.CanvasSize = UDim2.fromOffset(0, layout.AbsoluteContentSize.Y + 20)
    end)

    State.Pages[name] = page
    return page
end

local function switchTab(name)
    for pageName, page in pairs(State.Pages) do
        page.Visible = pageName == name
    end
    for tabName, button in pairs(State.Buttons.__tabs or {}) do
        button.BackgroundColor3 = tabName == name and Color3.fromRGB(36, 90, 118)
            or Color3.fromRGB(24, 31, 42)
    end
end

local function makeSection(parent, title)
    local frame = Instance.new("Frame")
    frame.Name = title .. "Section"
    frame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(14, 18, 25)
    frame.BorderSizePixel = 0
    frame.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 10)
    frame.AutomaticSize = Enum.AutomaticSize.Y
    frame.Parent = parent
    addCorner(frame, 6)
    addStroke(frame, Color3.fromRGB(55, 70, 88), 0.55)

    local padding = Instance.new("UIPadding")
    padding.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 10)
    padding.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 10)
    padding.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 8)
    padding.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, 10)
    padding.Parent = frame

    local layout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
    layout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 7)
    layout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
    layout.Parent = frame

    local label = makeText(frame, "Title", title, 13, Color3.fromRGB(120, 220, 255))
    label.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 18)
    return frame
end

local function setButtonVisual(button, enabled, label)
    button.Text = string.format("%s: %s", label, enabled and "ON" or "OFF")
    button.BackgroundColor3 = enabled and Color3.fromRGB(28, 92, 72)
        or Color3.fromRGB(45, 31, 36)
end

local function addToggle(parent, label, key)
    local button = makeButton(parent, "")
    State.Buttons[key] = { Button = button, Label = label, Key = key }
    connect(button.MouseButton1Click, function()
        Config[key] = not Config[key]
