        if key == "AimAssistEnabled" then
            onAimAssistToggle(Config[key] == true)
        end
        if key == "ShowUI" and State.Window then
            State.Window.Visible = Config.ShowUI
        end
        if key == "SkinchangerUI" and type(State.SetSkinchangerUIVisible) == "function" then
            task.defer(function()
                State.SetSkinchangerUIVisible(Config.SkinchangerUI == true)
            end)
        end
        if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
    end)
    return button
end

local function addAction(parent, label, callback)
    local button = makeButton(parent, label)
    connect(button.MouseButton1Click, callback)
    return button
end

local function addCycle(parent, label, key, values)
    local button = makeButton(parent, "")
    State.CycleButtons[key] = {
        Button = button,
        Label = label,
        Values = values,
    }
    connect(button.MouseButton1Click, function()
        local current = tostring(Config[key] or values[1])
        local index = table.find(values, current) or 1
        Config[key] = values[index % #values + 1]
        if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
    end)
    return button
end

local function addSlider(parent, label, key, minValue, maxValue, step)
    local holder = Instance.new("Frame")
    holder.Name = key .. "Slider"
    holder.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    holder.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 46)
    holder.Parent = parent

    local title = makeText(holder, "Label", "", 12, Color3.fromRGB(222, 232, 242))
    title.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 18)

    local bar = Instance.new("Frame")
    bar.Name = "Bar"
    bar.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(28, 37, 49)
    bar.BorderSizePixel = 0
    bar.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 26)
    bar.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 10)
    bar.Parent = holder
    addCorner(bar, 5)

    local fill = Instance.new("Frame")
    fill.Name = "Fill"
    fill.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 180, 220)
    fill.BorderSizePixel = 0
    fill.Size = UDim2.fromScale(0, 1)
    fill.Parent = bar
    addCorner(fill, 5)

    local button = Instance.new("TextButton")
    button.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    button.Text = ""
    button.Size = UDim2.fromScale(1, 1)
    button.Parent = holder

    local dragging = false
    local function setFromX(x)
        local pct = math.clamp((x - bar.AbsolutePosition.X) / math.max(1, bar.AbsoluteSize.X), 0, 1)
        local raw = minValue + (maxValue - minValue) * pct
        if step and step > 0 then
            raw = math.floor(raw / step + 0.5) * step
        end
        Config[key] = raw
        if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
    end

    connect(button.InputBegan, function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
            dragging = true
            setFromX(input.Position.X)
        end
    end)
    connect(button.InputEnded, function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
            dragging = false
        end
    end)
    connect(UserInputService.InputChanged, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(input)
        if dragging and input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
            setFromX(input.Position.X)
        end
    end))

    State.Sliders[key] = {
        Label = label,
        Key = key,
        Min = minValue,
        Max = maxValue,
        Step = step,
        Title = title,
        Fill = fill,
    }
    return holder
end

local function addAimKeybind(parent)
    local button = makeButton(parent, "")
    State.AimFallback = State.AimFallback or { Held = false, Toggled = false, Capturing = false }
    local function refresh()
        local mode = normalizeBindMode(Config.AimbotKeyMode)
        button.Text = State.AimFallback.Capturing
            and "Aim Key: press any key / mouse button"
            or string.format("Aim Key: %s [%s]", normalizeBindKey(Config.AimbotKeybind, "MB2"), mode)
    end
    State.RefreshAimKeybind = refresh
    connect(button.MouseButton1Click, function()
        State.AimFallback.Capturing = true
        refresh()
    end)
    refresh()
    return button
end

local function addAimKeyMode(parent)
    local button = makeButton(parent, "")
    local modes = { "Always", "Hold", "Toggle" }
    local function refresh()
        button.Text = "Aim Mode: " .. normalizeBindMode(Config.AimbotKeyMode)
    end
    connect(button.MouseButton1Click, function()
        local current = normalizeBindMode(Config.AimbotKeyMode)
        local index = table.find(modes, current) or 1
        Config.AimbotKeyMode = modes[index % #modes + 1]
        if State.AimFallback then
            State.AimFallback.Held = false
            State.AimFallback.Toggled = false
        end
        State.AimbotKeyState = false
        State.AimbotKeyStateAt = 0
        refresh()
        if State.RefreshAimKeybind then State.RefreshAimKeybind() end
    end)
    refresh()
    return button
end

local function makeStatusLabel(parent, key, text)
    local label = makeText(parent, key, text, 12, Color3.fromRGB(216, 226, 238))
    label.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 19)
    State.Labels[key] = label
    return label
end

local function createTabButton(parent, name)
    local button = makeButton(parent, name)
    button.Size = UDim2.new(0, 76, 1, 0)
    button.TextSize = 12
    button.Parent = parent
    State.Buttons.__tabs[name] = button
    connect(button.MouseButton1Click, function()
        switchTab(name)
    end)
    return button
end

local function createMainWindow(gui)
    State.Buttons.__tabs = {}

    local window = Instance.new("Frame")
    window.Name = "ControlWindow"
    window.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 0.5)
    window.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(8, 11, 16)
    window.BorderSizePixel = 0
    window.Position = UDim2.new(1, -22, 0.5, 0)
    -- Seven tabs need more than the original 430px width; otherwise the World
    -- button is clipped and the fallback UI has no reachable World page.
    window.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(720, 520)
    window.Visible = Config.ShowUI
    window.Parent = gui
    addCorner(window, 8)
    addStroke(window, Color3.fromRGB(70, 90, 110), 0.2)
    State.Window = window

    local header = Instance.new("Frame")
    header.Name = "Header"
    header.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(12, 17, 24)
    header.BorderSizePixel = 0
    header.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 42)
    header.Parent = window
    addCorner(header, 8)

    local title = makeText(header, "Title", "IronFrost Internal", 15, Color3.fromRGB(238, 246, 255))
    title.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(12, 0)
    title.Size = UDim2.new(1, -84, 1, 0)

    local hide = makeButton(header, "Hide")
    hide.Position = UDim2.new(1, -66, 0, 8)
    hide.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(54, 26)
    hide.TextSize = 12
    connect(hide.MouseButton1Click, function()
        Config.ShowUI = false
        if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
    end)

    local dragging = false
    local dragStart = nil
    local startPosition = nil
    connect(header.InputBegan, function(input)
        if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
            dragging = true
            dragStart = input.Position
            startPosition = window.Position
            connect(input.Changed, function()

                if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
                    dragging = false
                end
            end)
        end
    end)
    connect(UserInputService.InputChanged, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(input)
        if dragging and input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
            local delta = input.Position - dragStart
            local nextPosition = UDim2.new(
                startPosition.X.Scale,
                startPosition.X.Offset + delta.X,
                startPosition.Y.Scale,
                startPosition.Y.Offset + delta.Y
            )
            window.Position = clampGuiPositionToViewport(window, nextPosition, header.AbsoluteSize.Y)
        end
    end))

    local tabBar = Instance.new("Frame")
    tabBar.Name = "TabBar"
    tabBar.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    tabBar.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(10, 50)
    tabBar.Size = UDim2.new(1, -20, 0, 32)
    tabBar.Parent = window
    State.TabBar = tabBar

    local tabLayout = Instance.new("UIListLayout")
    tabLayout.FillDirection = Enum.FillDirection.Horizontal
    tabLayout.Padding = UDim.new(0, 7)
    tabLayout.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder
    tabLayout.Parent = tabBar

    local pageHost = Instance.new("Frame")
    pageHost.Name = "PageHost"
    pageHost.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    pageHost.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(0, 90)
    pageHost.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 1, -96)
    pageHost.ClipsDescendants = true
    pageHost.Parent = window
    State.PageHost = pageHost

    createTabButton(tabBar, "Main")
    createTabButton(tabBar, "Aim")
    createTabButton(tabBar, "ESP")
    createTabButton(tabBar, "World")
    createTabButton(tabBar, "Gun")
    createTabButton(tabBar, "Misc")
    createTabButton(tabBar, "Status")
    createTabButton(tabBar, "Config")

    local mainPage = createPage("Main")
    local aimPage = createPage("Aim")
    local espPage = createPage("ESP")
    local worldPage = createPage("World")
    local gunPage = createPage("Gun")
    local miscPage = createPage("Misc")
    local statusPage = createPage("Status")
    local configPage = createPage("Config")

    local mainCore = makeSection(mainPage, "Core")
    addToggle(mainCore, "Silent Targeting", "Enabled")
    addToggle(mainCore, "FOV Circle", "ShowFOV")
    addToggle(mainCore, "Mouse-Centered FOV", "FOVFromMouse")
    addSlider(mainCore, "FOV Circle", "FOVRadius", 30, 1200, 5)
    addSlider(mainCore, "Max Distance", "MaxDistance", 100, 8000, 50)

    local targets = makeSection(mainPage, "Targets")
    addToggle(targets, "NPCs / Dummies", "TargetNPCs")
    addToggle(targets, "Target Real Players", "TargetPlayers")
    addToggle(targets, "Team Check", "TeamCheck")
    addToggle(targets, "Line of Sight", "VisibilityCheck")

    local antiK = makeSection(mainPage, "Anti-Katana")
    addToggle(antiK, "Anti-Katana Shoot Lock", "AntiKatana")
    addSlider(antiK, "Detection Range", "AntiKatanaRange", 5, 500, 1)
    addSlider(antiK, "Block Time", "AntiKatanaBlockSeconds", 0.15, 2, 0.05)

    local aimAssist = makeSection(aimPage, "Aim Assist")
    addToggle(aimAssist, "Camera Assist", "AimAssistEnabled")
    addToggle(aimAssist, "Hold RMB Required", "AimAssistRequireHold")
    addAimKeybind(aimAssist)
    addAimKeyMode(aimAssist)
    addSlider(aimAssist, "Assist Smoothness", "AimAssistSmoothness", 1, 100, 1)
    addSlider(aimAssist, "Assist Speed", "AimAssistMaxStep", 1, 10, 0.1)
    addSlider(aimAssist, "Aim FOV Circle", "AimFOVRadius", 30, 1200, 5)
    addSlider(aimAssist, "Hit Chance %", "HitChance", 1, 100, 1)

    local silentAim = makeSection(aimPage, "Silent / Wallbang")
    addToggle(silentAim, "Wallbang Test", "WallbangTest")

    do
    local triggerSection = makeSection(aimPage, "Triggerbot")
    addToggle(triggerSection, "Triggerbot", "TriggerbotTest")
    addSlider(triggerSection, "Triggerbot FOV", "TriggerbotFOV", 10, 200, 5)
    addSlider(triggerSection, "Reaction Time", "TriggerReactionMs", 0, 250, 10)
    addSlider(triggerSection, "Forget Time", "TriggerForgetTime", 0, 3, 0.1)
    end -- release triggerbot registers

    local silentNote = makeText(silentAim, "SilentNote", "Best path is automatic command angle control.", 11, Color3.fromRGB(165, 177, 190))
    silentNote.TextWrapped = true
    silentNote.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)

    -- ESP controls for fallback UI
    do
    local espCore = makeSection(espPage, "ESP Core")
    addToggle(espCore, "ESP Enabled", "ESPEnabled")
    addToggle(espCore, "Show Players", "ESPPlayers")
    addToggle(espCore, "Show NPCs / Dummies", "ESPNPCs")
    addToggle(espCore, "Only Show ESP In Matches", "ESPOnlyInMatches")
    addToggle(espCore, "Box ESP", "ESPBoxes")
    addToggle(espCore, "Health Bars", "ESPHealthBars")
    addToggle(espCore, "Skeleton", "ESPSkeleton")
    addToggle(espCore, "Names", "ESPNames")
    addToggle(espCore, "Distance", "ESPDistance")
    addToggle(espCore, "Health Text", "ESPHealth")
    addToggle(espCore, "Tracers", "ESPTracers")
    addToggle(espCore, "Head Dots", "ESPHeadDots")
    addToggle(espCore, "Offscreen Arrows", "ESPOffscreenArrows")
    addToggle(espCore, "Look Direction", "ESPDirectionLines")
    addToggle(espCore, "Chams", "ChamsEnabled")
    addToggle(espCore, "Player Outline", "ESPPlayerOutline")

    local espHighlightFB = makeSection(espPage, "Target Highlight")
    addToggle(espHighlightFB, "Highlight Target", "ESPTargetHighlight")

    local espSettingsFB = makeSection(espPage, "ESP Settings")
    addSlider(espSettingsFB, "Max Distance", "ESPMaxDistance", 100, 50000, 100)
    addSlider(espSettingsFB, "Player Distance", "ESPPlayerMaxDistance", 50, 3000, 10)
    addSlider(espSettingsFB, "Text Size", "ESPTextSize", 8, 32, 1)
    addSlider(espSettingsFB, "Refresh Rate", "ESPRefreshRate", 0.05, 1, 0.05)
    end -- release ESP tab registers

    -- The world implementation already exists below (applyWorldVisuals), but
    -- the fallback UI never created a page for its configuration controls.
    local worldColor = makeSection(worldPage, "Color Correction")
    addToggle(worldColor, "Enabled", "WorldColorCorrectionEnabled")
    addSlider(worldColor, "Saturation", "WorldSaturation", -1, 1, 0.01)
    addSlider(worldColor, "Contrast", "WorldContrast", -1, 1, 0.01)
    addSlider(worldColor, "Brightness", "WorldBrightness", -1, 1, 0.01)

    local worldLighting = makeSection(worldPage, "Lighting")
    addToggle(worldLighting, "Global Shadows", "WorldGlobalShadows")
    addToggle(worldLighting, "FOV Changer", "WorldFOVChanger")
    addSlider(worldLighting, "Field Of View", "WorldFOV", 40, 120, 1)
    addSlider(worldLighting, "Blur", "WorldBlur", 0, 24, 1)

    local worldBloom = makeSection(worldPage, "Bloom")
    addToggle(worldBloom, "Enabled", "WorldBloomEnabled")
    addSlider(worldBloom, "Intensity", "WorldBloomIntensity", 0, 5, 0.05)
    addSlider(worldBloom, "Size", "WorldBloomSize", 0, 100, 1)
    addSlider(worldBloom, "Threshold", "WorldBloomThreshold", 0, 5, 0.05)

    local worldShaders = makeSection(worldPage, "Shaders")
    addToggle(worldShaders, "Enabled", "WorldShaderEnabled")
    addCycle(worldShaders, "Shader Preset", "WorldShaderPreset", WORLD_SHADER_PRESET_NAMES)
    addSlider(worldShaders, "Strength", "WorldShaderStrength", 0, 100, 1)

    local gun = makeSection(gunPage, "Gun Test Mods")
    addToggle(gun, "Force Aim / ADS", "GunForceAim")
    addToggle(gun, "No Recoil Test", "GunNoRecoilTest")
    addToggle(gun, "No Spread Test", "GunNoSpreadTest")
    addToggle(gun, "Auto Fire Test", "GunAutoFireTest")
    addToggle(gun, "Rapid Fire", "GunRapidFireTest")
    addSlider(gun, "Rapid Fire Scale", "GunRapidFireScale", 1, 16, 0.25)
    addToggle(gun, "Force Primary Fire", "ForcePrimaryFire")
    addToggle(gun, "Sniper Scope Check", "SniperScopeCheck")
    addSlider(gun, "Scope Delay (ms)", "SniperScopeDelayMs", 0, 5000, 10)

    local gunNote = makeText(gun, "GunNote", "These are local private-test switches; server damage still depends on your own combat system.", 11, Color3.fromRGB(165, 177, 190))
    gunNote.TextWrapped = true
    gunNote.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 34)

    local misc = makeSection(miscPage, "Misc")
    addToggle(misc, "Ironfrost Skinchanger", "SkinchangerUI")

    local live = makeSection(statusPage, "Live Status")
    makeStatusLabel(live, "Target", "Target: none")
    makeStatusLabel(live, "Hooks", "Hooks: waiting")
    makeStatusLabel(live, "Command", "Command: none")
    makeStatusLabel(live, "Weapon", "Weapon: none")
    makeStatusLabel(live, "Counters", "Counters: 0")
    makeStatusLabel(live, "Unlock", "Unlock: off")
    makeStatusLabel(live, "Error", "Error: none")

    -- Config page controls for fallback UI
    do
    local configSection = makeSection(configPage, "Configuration")
    local configNameLabel = makeText(configSection, "ConfigNameLabel", "Config: " .. tostring(Config.SettingsConfigName), 12, Color3.fromRGB(216, 226, 238))
    configNameLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 19)
    State.Labels.ConfigName = configNameLabel

    local autoloadLabel = makeText(configSection, "AutoloadLabel", "Autoload: " .. (Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig ~= "" and Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or "none"), 12, Color3.fromRGB(216, 226, 238))
    autoloadLabel.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 19)
    State.Labels.AutoloadConfig = autoloadLabel

    local configNote = makeText(configSection, "ConfigNote", "Config save/load/autoload requires Linoria UI. Toggle via Settings tab if available.", 11, Color3.fromRGB(165, 177, 190))
    configNote.TextWrapped = true
    configNote.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 32)
    end -- release Config tab registers

    local actions = makeSection(statusPage, "Actions")
    addAction(actions, "Reset Counters", function()
        State.Stats.TargetsSeen = 0
        State.Stats.Rewrites = 0
        State.Stats.RayRedirects = 0
        State.Stats.MouseRedirects = 0
        State.Stats.LastRewrite = 0
        if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
    end)
    addAction(actions, "Cleanup / Unload", function()
        State.Cleanup()
    end)

    switchTab("Main")
end

local function linoriaEnvironment()
    if type(getgenv) == "function" then
        local ok, env = pcall(getgenv)
        if ok and type(env) == "table" then
            return env
        end
    end
    return _G
end

local function patchLinoriaDragging(library)
    if type(library) ~= "table" or type(library.MakeDraggable) ~= "function" or library.__IronFrostDragPatch == true then
        return
    end

    library.__IronFrostDragPatch = true
    library.MakeDraggable = function(_, instance, cutoff)
        if typeof(instance) ~= "Instance" or not instance:IsA("GuiObject") then
            return
        end

        instance.Active = true
        local dragging = false
        local dragStart = nil
        local startPosition = nil

        connect(instance.InputBegan, function(input)
            if input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
                return
            end

            local relativeY = input.Position.Y - instance.AbsolutePosition.Y
            if relativeY > (tonumber(cutoff) or 40) then
                return
            end

            dragging = true
            dragStart = input.Position
            startPosition = instance.Position

            connect(input.Changed, function()
                if input.UserInputState == Enum.UserInputState.End then
                    dragging = false
                end
            end)
        end)

        connect(UserInputService.InputChanged, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(input)
            if not dragging or input.UserInputType ~= Enum.UserInputType.MouseMovement then
                return
            end

            local delta = input.Position - dragStart
            local nextPosition = UDim2.new(
                startPosition.X.Scale,
                startPosition.X.Offset + delta.X,
                startPosition.Y.Scale,
                startPosition.Y.Offset + delta.Y
            )
            instance.Position = clampGuiPositionToViewport(instance, nextPosition, tonumber(cutoff) or 40)
        end))
    end
end

local function createLinoriaWindow()
    if type(loadstring) ~= "function" or type(game.HttpGet) ~= "function" then
        setError("Linoria unavailable: loadstring/HttpGet missing")
        return false
    end

    local repo = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/violin-suzutsuki/LinoriaLib/main/"
    local ok, library
    local lastLoadError = ""
    for attempt = 1, 3 do
        ok, library = pcall(function()
            local source = game:HttpGet(repo .. "Library.lua")
            source = source:gsub(
                "Size = UDim2%.new%(%s*0,%s*216,%s*1,%s*0%s*%);",
                "Size = UDim2.new(0, 172, 1, 0);",
                1
            )
            return loadstring(source)()
        end)
        if ok and type(library) == "table" and type(library.CreateWindow) == "function" then
            break
        end
        lastLoadError = tostring(library)
        task.wait(0.35)
    end
    if not ok or type(library) ~= "table" or type(library.CreateWindow) ~= "function" then
        setError("Linoria load failed: " .. lastLoadError)
        return false
    end

    State.LinoriaLibrary = library
    State.LinoriaLoaded = true
    patchLinoriaDragging(library)
    library.NotifyOnError = true
    pcall(function()
        library:SetWatermarkVisibility(true)
        library:SetWatermark("IronFrost Internal | Linoria")
    end)

    local window = library:CreateWindow({
        Title = "IronFrost Internal",
        Center = true,
        AutoShow = false,
        Size = UDim2.fromOffset(520, 735),
        TabPadding = 6,
        MenuFadeTime = 0.15,
    })
    State.LinoriaWindow = window

    if type(library.Toggle) == "function" and State.LinoriaToggleWrapped ~= true then
        local originalToggle = library.Toggle
        State.LinoriaToggleWrapped = true
        library.Toggle = function(self, ...)
            local results = { pcall(originalToggle, self, ...) }
            local ok = table.remove(results, 1)
            if not ok then
                error(results[1])
            end
            local holder = window.Holder or window.MainFrame or window.Root
            local visible = typeof(holder) == "Instance" and holder:IsA("GuiObject") and holder.Visible == true
            State.LinoriaMenuVisible = visible
            Config.ShowUI = visible
            State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(true)
            if updateUIControls then
                task.defer(updateUIControls)
            end
            return unpackArgs(results)
        end
    end

    if Config.ShowUI == true and type(library.Toggle) == "function" then
        library:Toggle()
    else
        State.LinoriaMenuVisible = false
        State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(true)
    end

    local env = linoriaEnvironment()
    local toggles = env.Toggles or {}
    local options = env.Options or {}
    local toggleIds = {}
    local sliderIds = {}
    local dropdownIds = {}
    local colorIds = {}
    local keybindIds = {}
    local autoloadStatusLabel = nil

    local function bindToggle(group, id, text, key, tooltip, afterChanged)
        group:AddToggle(id, {
            Text = text,
            Default = Config[key] == true,
            Tooltip = tooltip,
        })
        toggleIds[key] = id
        local toggle = toggles[id]
        if toggle and type(toggle.OnChanged) == "function" then
            toggle:OnChanged(function(value)
                Config[key] = value == true
                if key == "AimAssistEnabled" then
                    onAimAssistToggle(Config[key] == true)
                end
                if afterChanged then
                    afterChanged(value == true)
                end
            end)
        end
        return toggle
    end

    local function bindFeatureKeyPicker(toggle, id, text, keyKey, modeKey, stateKey)
        if not toggle or type(toggle.AddKeyPicker) ~= "function" then
            return nil
        end

        toggle:AddKeyPicker(id, {
            Default = normalizeBindKey(Config[keyKey], "MB2"),
            Mode = normalizeBindMode(Config[modeKey]),
            Text = "",
            NoUI = true,
            SyncToggleState = false,
            Callback = function()
                syncFeatureKeyPickerConfig()
                State.AimbotKeyStateAt = 0
            end,
            ChangedCallback = function()
                task.defer(function()
                    syncFeatureKeyPickerConfig()
                    State.AimbotKeyStateAt = 0
                end)
            end,
        })

        keybindIds[id] = {
            Key = keyKey,
            Mode = modeKey,
        }

        local option = options[id]
        if option then
            State[stateKey] = option
            if type(option.OnChanged) == "function" then
                option:OnChanged(function()
                    task.defer(function()
                        syncFeatureKeyPickerConfig()
                        State.AimbotKeyStateAt = 0
                    end)
                end)
            end
        end
        return option
    end

    local function bindSlider(group, id, text, key, minValue, maxValue, rounding, suffix, afterChanged)
        group:AddSlider(id, {
            Text = text,
            Default = tonumber(Config[key]) or minValue,
            Min = minValue,
            Max = maxValue,
            Rounding = rounding or 0,
            Suffix = suffix or "",
            Compact = false,
        })
        sliderIds[key] = id
        local option = options[id]
        if option and type(option.OnChanged) == "function" then
            option:OnChanged(function(value)
                Config[key] = tonumber(value) or Config[key]
                if afterChanged then
                    afterChanged(Config[key])
                end
            end)
        end
        return option
    end

    local function bindDropdown(group, id, text, key, values, afterChanged)
        group:AddDropdown(id, {
            Values = values,
            Default = Config[key],
            Multi = false,
            Text = text,
        })
        dropdownIds[key] = id
        local option = options[id]
        if option and type(option.OnChanged) == "function" then
            option:OnChanged(function(value)
                Config[key] = tostring(value)
                if afterChanged then
                    afterChanged(Config[key])
                end
            end)
        end
        return option
    end

    local function bindColor(label, id, key)
        label:AddColorPicker(id, {
            Default = Config[key],
            Title = key,
            Callback = function(value)
                Config[key] = value
            end,

        })
        colorIds[key] = id
        local option = options[id]
        if option and type(option.OnChanged) == "function" then
            option:OnChanged(function()
                Config[key] = option.Value
            end)
        end
        return option
    end

    local function setToggle(key, value)
        Config[key] = value == true
        local id = toggleIds[key]
        local toggle = id and toggles[id]
        if toggle and type(toggle.SetValue) == "function" then
            toggle:SetValue(Config[key])
        end
    end

    local function setSlider(id, key, value)
        Config[key] = value
        local option = options[id]
        if option and type(option.SetValue) == "function" then
            option:SetValue(value)
        end
    end

    local function notify(message, duration)
        if Config.NotificationsEnabled == false then
            return
        end
        pcall(function()
            library:Notify(tostring(message), duration or 3)
        end)
    end

    local menuTransparencyDefaults = {}
    local function collectLinoriaRoots()
        local roots = {}
        local seen = {}
        local function add(value)
            if typeof(value) == "Instance" and not seen[value] then
                seen[value] = true
                roots[#roots + 1] = value
            end
        end

        for _, key in ipairs({ "ScreenGui", "Gui", "Main", "MainFrame", "Holder", "Container", "Root" }) do
            add(library[key])
            add(window[key])
        end
        return roots
    end

    local function applyMenuTransparency()
        local alpha = math.clamp((tonumber(Config.MenuTransparency) or 0) / 100, 0, 0.85)
        for _, root in ipairs(collectLinoriaRoots()) do
            local items = root:GetDescendants()
            items[#items + 1] = root
            for _, item in ipairs(items) do
                if item:IsA("Frame") or item:IsA("ScrollingFrame") or item:IsA("TextButton") or item:IsA("TextBox") then
                    if menuTransparencyDefaults[item] == nil then
                        menuTransparencyDefaults[item] = item.BackgroundTransparency
                    end
                    local base = menuTransparencyDefaults[item]
                    if base < 1 then
                        item.BackgroundTransparency = math.clamp(base + ((1 - base) * alpha), 0, 1)
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    local function applySettingsRuntime()
        local menuVisible = Config.ShowUI == true
        pcall(function()
            if typeof(library.ScreenGui) == "Instance" and library.ScreenGui:IsA("ScreenGui") then
                library.ScreenGui.Enabled = true
            end
        end)
        pcall(function()
            if type(library.Toggle) == "function" and State.LinoriaMenuVisible ~= menuVisible then
                library:Toggle()
            end
        end)

        local keybindVisible = Config.KeybindMenuEnabled == true
        pcall(function()
            for _, key in ipairs({ "KeybindFrame", "KeybindContainer", "KeybindList" }) do
                local frame = library[key]
                if typeof(frame) == "Instance" and frame:IsA("GuiObject") then
                    frame.Visible = keybindVisible
                end
            end
        end)
        pcall(function()
            local menuKey = options.IF_MenuKey or library.ToggleKeybind
            if menuKey then
                menuKey.Mode = "Toggle"
            end
        end)
        applyMenuTransparency()
        State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(true)
    end

    local function setOptionValue(id, value)
        local option = options[id] or toggles[id]
        if not option then
            return
        end

        if typeof(value) == "Color3" and type(option.SetValueRGB) == "function" then
            pcall(function()
                option:SetValueRGB(value)
            end)
        elseif type(option.SetValue) == "function" then
            pcall(function()
                option:SetValue(value)
            end)
        end
    end

    local refreshSaveManagerConfigList
    local function refreshSettingsLabels()
        local autoloadText = "Current autoload config: "
            .. (Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig ~= "" and Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or "none")
        local function setAutoloadText(label)
            if not label then
                return
            end
            if type(label.SetText) == "function" then
                pcall(function()
                    label:SetText(autoloadText)
                end)
            else
                pcall(function()
                    label.Text = autoloadText
                end)
            end
        end
        setAutoloadText(autoloadStatusLabel)
        local saveManager = State.LinoriaSaveManager
        if type(saveManager) == "table" then
            setAutoloadText(saveManager.AutoloadLabel)
        end
    end

    refreshSaveManagerConfigList = function(preferred)
        local saveManager = State.LinoriaSaveManager
        local option = options.SaveManager_ConfigList
        if not option then
            refreshSettingsLabels()
            return
        end

        if type(saveManager) == "table" and type(saveManager.RefreshConfigList) == "function" and type(option.SetValues) == "function" then
            pcall(function()
                option:SetValues(saveManager:RefreshConfigList())
            end)
        end

        local selected = tostring(preferred or Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or "")
        if selected == "" then
            pcall(function()
                option:SetValue(nil)
            end)
        elseif type(option.SetValue) == "function" then
            pcall(function()
                option:SetValue(selected)
            end)
        end

        local nameInput = options.SaveManager_ConfigName
        if selected ~= "" and nameInput and type(nameInput.SetValue) == "function" then
            pcall(function()
                nameInput:SetValue(selected)
            end)
        end

        refreshSettingsLabels()
    end

    local function syncLinoriaControls()
        Config.WorldShaderPreset = normalizeWorldShaderPreset(Config.WorldShaderPreset)
        Config.WorldShaderStrength = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.WorldShaderStrength) or 100, 0, 100)
        for key, id in pairs(toggleIds) do
            setOptionValue(id, Config[key] == true)
        end
        for key, id in pairs(sliderIds) do
            if tonumber(Config[key]) ~= nil then
                setOptionValue(id, tonumber(Config[key]))
            end
        end
        for key, id in pairs(dropdownIds) do
            setOptionValue(id, Config[key])
        end
        for key, id in pairs(colorIds) do
            setOptionValue(id, Config[key])
        end
        for id, record in pairs(keybindIds) do
            setOptionValue(id, {
                normalizeBindKey(Config[record.Key], "MB2"),
                normalizeBindMode(Config[record.Mode]),
            })
        end
        setOptionValue("IF_ConfigName", Config.SettingsConfigName)
        setOptionValue("IF_ConfigList", Config.SettingsConfigName)
        setOptionValue("IF_ThemeName", Config.SettingsThemeName)
        setOptionValue("IF_ThemeList", Config.SettingsThemeName)
        refreshSettingsLabels()
        applySettingsRuntime()
        if type(State.SyncSkinchangerUI) == "function" then
            task.defer(State.SyncSkinchangerUI)
        end
        if updateUIControls then
            updateUIControls()
        end
    end
    State.SyncLinoriaControls = syncLinoriaControls

    local CONFIG_ROOT = "IronFrost/IronFrost"
    local CONFIG_DIR = CONFIG_ROOT .. "/configs"
    local THEME_DIR = CONFIG_ROOT .. "/themes"
    local LINORIA_SETTINGS_DIR = CONFIG_ROOT .. "/settings"
    local AUTOLOAD_FILE = CONFIG_ROOT .. "/autoload.json"

    local function sanitizeFileName(name)
        local cleaned = tostring(name or ""):gsub("[^%w%-%_ %[%]%.]", "_")
        cleaned = cleaned:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
        if cleaned == "" then
            cleaned = "default"
        end
        return string.sub(cleaned, 1, 64)
    end

    local function ensureFolder(path)
        if type(isfolder) == "function" then
            local ok, exists = pcall(isfolder, path)
            if ok and exists then
                return true
            end
        end
        if type(makefolder) == "function" then
            return pcall(makefolder, path)
        end
        return false
    end

    local function ensureStorage()
        if type(writefile) ~= "function" or type(readfile) ~= "function" then
            return false, "executor file API unavailable"
        end
        ensureFolder("IronFrost")
        ensureFolder(CONFIG_ROOT)
        ensureFolder(CONFIG_DIR)
        ensureFolder(THEME_DIR)
        ensureFolder(LINORIA_SETTINGS_DIR)
        return true
    end

    local function fileExists(path)
        if type(isfile) == "function" then
            local ok, exists = pcall(isfile, path)
            return ok and exists
        end
        if type(readfile) == "function" then
            local ok = pcall(readfile, path)
            return ok
        end
        return false
    end

    pcall(ensureStorage)

    local function pathJoinJson(folder, name)
        return folder .. "/" .. sanitizeFileName(name) .. ".json"
    end

    local function encodeValue(value)
        local valueType = typeof(value)
        if valueType == "Color3" then
            return {
                __type = "Color3",
                r = value.R,
                g = value.G,
                b = value.B,
            }
        elseif valueType == "EnumItem" then
            return {
                __type = "EnumItem",
                enumType = tostring(value.EnumType),
                name = value.Name,
            }
        elseif type(value) == "table" then
            local out = {}
            for key, nested in pairs(value) do
                out[tostring(key)] = encodeValue(nested)
            end
            return out
        end
        return value
    end

    local function decodeValue(value)
        if type(value) ~= "table" then
            return value
        end

        if value.__type == "Color3" then
            return Color3.new(tonumber(value.r) or 0, tonumber(value.g) or 0, tonumber(value.b) or 0)
        elseif value.__type == "EnumItem" then
            local enumName = tostring(value.enumType or ""):match("Enum%.(.+)")
            local itemName = tostring(value.name or "")
            if enumName and Enum[enumName] then
                local ok, enumValue = pcall(function()
                    return Enum[enumName][itemName]
                end)
                if ok and enumValue then
                    return enumValue
                end
            end
            return nil
        end

        local out = {}
        for key, nested in pairs(value) do
            local numberKey = tonumber(key)
            out[numberKey or key] = decodeValue(nested)
        end
        return out
    end

    local function buildConfigPayload()
        local payload = {
            version = 2,
            savedAt = os.time(),
            config = {},
        }
        for key, value in pairs(Config) do
            if not SENSITIVE_CONFIG_KEYS[key] then
                payload.config[key] = encodeValue(value)
            end
        end
        return payload
    end

    local function applyConfigPayload(payload)
        local configData = type(payload) == "table" and (payload.config or payload) or nil
        if type(configData) ~= "table" then
            return false, "invalid config payload"
        end

        for key, value in pairs(configData) do
            if Config[key] ~= nil and not SENSITIVE_CONFIG_KEYS[key] then
                local decoded = decodeValue(value)
                if decoded ~= nil then
                    Config[key] = decoded
                end
            end
        end
        Config.TeleportAutorunFile = "IronFrost/IronFrost/autorun.lua"
        Config.TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile = "IronFrost/IronFrost/teleport_autoload_disabled.txt"
        Config.ForceMouseVisible = true
        Config.WorldShaderPreset = normalizeWorldShaderPreset(Config.WorldShaderPreset)
        Config.WorldShaderStrength = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.WorldShaderStrength) or 100, 0, 100)
        syncLinoriaControls()
        return true
    end

    local function writeJson(path, payload)
        local okStorage, storageError = ensureStorage()
        if not okStorage then
            return false, storageError
        end
        local okEncode, encoded = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:JSONEncode(payload)
        end)
        if not okEncode then
            return false, tostring(encoded)
        end
        local okWrite, writeError = pcall(writefile, path, encoded)
        if not okWrite then
            return false, tostring(writeError)
        end
        return true
    end

    local function readJson(path)
        local okStorage, storageError = ensureStorage()
        if not okStorage then
            return nil, storageError
        end
        if not fileExists(path) then
            return nil, "file not found"
        end
        local okRead, raw = pcall(readfile, path)
        if not okRead then
            return nil, tostring(raw)
        end
        local okDecode, decoded = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:JSONDecode(raw)
        end)
        if not okDecode then
            return nil, tostring(decoded)
        end
        return decoded
    end

    local function listJsonNames(folder, fallback)
        local names = {}
        local seen = {}
        local function add(name)
            name = sanitizeFileName(name)
            if not seen[name] then
                seen[name] = true
                table.insert(names, name)
            end
        end

        add(fallback or "default")
        if type(listfiles) == "function" then
            pcall(function()
                for _, path in ipairs(listfiles(folder)) do
                    local name = tostring(path):match("[/\\]([^/\\]+)%.json$")
                    if name then
                        add(name)
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
        table.sort(names)
        return names
    end

    local function updateDropdownValues(id, values, selected)
        local option = options[id]
        if option and type(option.SetValues) == "function" then
            pcall(function()
                option:SetValues(values)
            end)
        end
        setOptionValue(id, selected or values[1])
    end

    local function refreshConfigList()
        local names = listJsonNames(CONFIG_DIR, Config.SettingsConfigName)
        if names[1] ~= "--" then
            table.insert(names, 1, "--")
        end
        local selected = Config.SettingsConfigName ~= "" and Config.SettingsConfigName or "--"
        updateDropdownValues("IF_ConfigList", names, selected)
        return names
    end

    local function refreshThemeList()
        local names = listJsonNames(THEME_DIR, Config.SettingsThemeName)
        updateDropdownValues("IF_ThemeList", names, Config.SettingsThemeName)
        return names
    end

    local function refreshSettingsState()
        refreshConfigList()
        refreshThemeList()
        syncLinoriaControls()
        refreshSaveManagerConfigList(Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig ~= "" and Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or nil)
        task.defer(function()
            syncLinoriaControls()
            refreshSaveManagerConfigList(Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig ~= "" and Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or nil)
        end)
    end

    local function saveConfig(name)
        name = sanitizeFileName(name or Config.SettingsConfigName)
        Config.SettingsConfigName = name
        local okSave, saveError = writeJson(pathJoinJson(CONFIG_DIR, name), buildConfigPayload())
        if okSave then
            notify("Saved config: " .. name, 3)
            refreshSettingsState()
        else
            notify("Config save failed: " .. tostring(saveError), 5)
        end
        return okSave, saveError
    end

    local function loadConfig(name)
        name = sanitizeFileName(name or Config.SettingsConfigName)
        local payload, readError = readJson(pathJoinJson(CONFIG_DIR, name))
        if not payload then
            notify("Config load failed: " .. tostring(readError), 5)
            return false
        end
        local okApply, applyError = applyConfigPayload(payload)
        if okApply then
            Config.SettingsConfigName = name
            refreshSettingsState()
            notify("Loaded config: " .. name, 3)
        else
            notify("Config apply failed: " .. tostring(applyError), 5)
        end
        return okApply
    end

    local function deleteConfig(name)
        name = sanitizeFileName(name or Config.SettingsConfigName)
        local path = pathJoinJson(CONFIG_DIR, name)
        if type(delfile) == "function" and fileExists(path) then
            local okDelete, deleteError = pcall(delfile, path)
            if okDelete then
                notify("Deleted config: " .. name, 3)
                if Config.SettingsConfigName == name then
                    Config.SettingsConfigName = "default"
                end
                refreshSettingsState()
            else
                notify("Delete failed: " .. tostring(deleteError), 5)
            end
            return okDelete

        end
        notify("Delete unavailable or file missing.", 4)
        return false
    end

    local function setAutoloadConfig(name)
        name = sanitizeFileName(name or Config.SettingsConfigName)
        local previousAutoload = Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig
        Config.AutoQueueOnTeleport = true
        local setTeleportDisabled = rawget(Environment, "__IronFrostSetTeleportAutoloadDisabled")
        if type(setTeleportDisabled) == "function" then
            pcall(setTeleportDisabled, false, "autoload set")
        elseif type(delfile) == "function" and fileExists(Config.TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile) then
            pcall(delfile, Config.TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile)
        elseif type(writefile) == "function" then
            pcall(writefile, Config.TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile, "enabled")
        end
        Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = name
        local okConfigSave, configSaveError = saveConfig(name)
        if not okConfigSave then
            Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = previousAutoload
            notify("Autoload not set: config save failed: " .. tostring(configSaveError), 5)
            return false
        end
        local okSave, saveError = writeJson(AUTOLOAD_FILE, { config = name })
        if okSave then
            local saveManager = State.LinoriaSaveManager
            if type(saveManager) == "table" and type(saveManager.Save) == "function" then
                pcall(function()
                    saveManager:Save(name)
                    if type(writefile) == "function" then
                        writefile(LINORIA_SETTINGS_DIR .. "/autoload.txt", name)
                    end
                end)
            end
            notify("Autoload set: " .. name, 3)
            refreshSettingsState()
            local queueTeleport = rawget(Environment, "__IronFrostQueueTeleportAutorun")
            if type(queueTeleport) == "function" then
                pcall(queueTeleport)
            end
        else
            Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = previousAutoload
            notify("Autoload save failed: " .. tostring(saveError), 5)
        end
        return okSave
    end

    local function removeAutoloadConfig()
        if type(State.DisableLinoriaAutoload) == "function" then
            pcall(State.DisableLinoriaAutoload)
        end
        Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = ""
        Config.AutoQueueOnTeleport = false
        if type(delfile) == "function" then
            for _, path in ipairs({
                AUTOLOAD_FILE,
                LINORIA_SETTINGS_DIR .. "/autoload.txt",
            }) do
                if fileExists(path) then
                    pcall(delfile, path)
                end
            end
        elseif type(writefile) == "function" then
            pcall(writefile, LINORIA_SETTINGS_DIR .. "/autoload.txt", "__disabled__")
        end
        local setTeleportDisabled = rawget(Environment, "__IronFrostSetTeleportAutoloadDisabled")
        if type(setTeleportDisabled) == "function" then
            pcall(setTeleportDisabled, true, "autoload removed")
        elseif type(writefile) == "function" then
            ensureStorage()
            pcall(writefile, Config.TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile, "autoload removed")
        end
        refreshSettingsState()
        notify("Autoload removed and teleport reload stopped.", 3)
    end

    local function loadAutoloadConfig(silentLoad)
        local payload = readJson(AUTOLOAD_FILE)
        local name = type(payload) == "table" and payload.config or nil
        if type(name) == "string" and name ~= "" then
            Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = name
            local okLoad = loadConfig(name)
            if okLoad then
                Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = name
                refreshSettingsState()
            end
            if okLoad and not silentLoad then
                notify("Autoloaded config: " .. name, 3)
            end
            return okLoad
        end
        return false
    end

    local function writeClipboard(text)
        if type(setclipboard) == "function" then
            return pcall(setclipboard, text)
        elseif type(toclipboard) == "function" then
            return pcall(toclipboard, text)
        end
        return false
    end

    local function readClipboard()
        if type(getclipboard) == "function" then
            local ok, value = pcall(getclipboard)
            if ok then
                return tostring(value or "")
            end
        end
        return nil
    end

    local function copyConfigToClipboard()
        local encoded = HttpService:JSONEncode(buildConfigPayload())
        if writeClipboard(encoded) then
            notify("Copied config to clipboard.", 3)
        else
            notify("Clipboard write unavailable.", 4)
        end
    end

    local function pasteConfigFromClipboard()
        local raw = readClipboard()
        if not raw or raw == "" then
            notify("Clipboard read unavailable or empty.", 4)
            return false
        end
        local okDecode, payload = pcall(function()
            return HttpService:JSONDecode(raw)
        end)
        if not okDecode then
            notify("Clipboard config is not valid JSON.", 5)
            return false
        end
        local okApply, applyError = applyConfigPayload(payload)
        if okApply then
            refreshSettingsState()
            notify("Imported config from clipboard.", 3)
        else
            notify("Clipboard config failed: " .. tostring(applyError), 5)
        end
        return okApply
    end

    local THEME_KEYS = {
        "FOVColor",
        "FOVTransparency",
        "FOVThickness",
        "ESPNPCColor",
        "ESPPlayerColor",
        "ESPTargetColor",
    }

    local function buildThemePayload()
        local payload = {
            version = 1,
            savedAt = os.time(),
            config = {},
        }
        for _, key in ipairs(THEME_KEYS) do
            payload.config[key] = encodeValue(Config[key])
        end
        return payload
    end

    local function saveTheme(name)
        name = sanitizeFileName(name or Config.SettingsThemeName)
        Config.SettingsThemeName = name
        local okSave, saveError = writeJson(pathJoinJson(THEME_DIR, name), buildThemePayload())
        if okSave then
            notify("Saved theme: " .. name, 3)
            refreshSettingsState()
        else
            notify("Theme save failed: " .. tostring(saveError), 5)
        end
        return okSave
    end

    local function loadTheme(name)
        name = sanitizeFileName(name or Config.SettingsThemeName)
        local payload, readError = readJson(pathJoinJson(THEME_DIR, name))
        if not payload then
            notify("Theme load failed: " .. tostring(readError), 5)
            return false
        end
        local okApply, applyError = applyConfigPayload(payload)
        if okApply then
            Config.SettingsThemeName = name
            refreshSettingsState()
            notify("Loaded theme: " .. name, 3)
        else
            notify("Theme apply failed: " .. tostring(applyError), 5)
        end
        return okApply
    end

    local function deleteTheme(name)
        name = sanitizeFileName(name or Config.SettingsThemeName)
        local path = pathJoinJson(THEME_DIR, name)
        if type(delfile) == "function" and fileExists(path) then
            local okDelete, deleteError = pcall(delfile, path)
            if okDelete then
                notify("Deleted theme: " .. name, 3)
                if Config.SettingsThemeName == name then
                    Config.SettingsThemeName = "default"
                end
                refreshSettingsState()
            else
                notify("Theme delete failed: " .. tostring(deleteError), 5)
            end
            return okDelete
        end
        notify("Theme delete unavailable or file missing.", 4)
        return false
    end

    -- Autoload is now called after createGui() to work in both UI modes
    Config.Enabled = true
    Config.OverkillCommandHook = true
    Config.OnlyCurveWhileFiring = true

    local function resetSafeDefaults()
        setToggle("Enabled", true)
        setToggle("TargetNPCs", true)
        setToggle("TargetPlayers", false)
        setToggle("AuthorizedPlayersOnly", true)
        setToggle("TeamCheck", false)
        setToggle("OverkillCommandHook", true)
        setToggle("OnlyCurveWhileFiring", true)
        setToggle("WallbangTest", false)
        setToggle("TriggerbotTest", false)
        setToggle("GunForceAim", false)
        setToggle("GunNoRecoilTest", false)
        setToggle("GunNoSpreadTest", false)
        setToggle("GunAutoFireTest", false)
        setToggle("GunRapidFireTest", false)
        setToggle("GunMultiShotTest", false)
        setToggle("ESPMassiveTags", false)
        setSlider("IF_FOVRadius", "FOVRadius", 450)
        setSlider("IF_HitChance", "HitChance", 100)
        setSlider("IF_RapidFireScale", "GunRapidFireScale", 6)
        setSlider("IF_TriggerbotFOV", "TriggerbotFOV", 55)
        pcall(function()
            library:Notify("Safe private-test defaults restored.", 3)
        end)
    end

    local tabs = {
        Main = window:AddTab("main"),
        World = window:AddTab("world"),
        ESP = window:AddTab("esp"),
        Misc = window:AddTab("misc"),
        Settings = window:AddTab("settings"),
    }

    -- Use Linoria's own ThemeManager for UI styling. This is deliberately
    -- separate from ESP/player/dummy color configuration.
    pcall(function()
        local themeManager = loadstring(game:HttpGet(repo .. "addons/ThemeManager.lua"))()
        themeManager:SetLibrary(library)
        themeManager:SetFolder("IronFrost/IronFrost")
        State.LinoriaThemeManager = themeManager
    end)
    pcall(function()
        local saveManager = loadstring(game:HttpGet(repo .. "addons/SaveManager.lua"))()
        saveManager:SetLibrary(library)
        saveManager:IgnoreThemeSettings()
        saveManager:SetIgnoreIndexes({
            "IF_MenuKey",
            "SaveManager_ConfigName",
            "SaveManager_ConfigList",
        })
        saveManager:SetFolder("IronFrost/IronFrost")
        local originalSave = saveManager.Save
        if type(originalSave) == "function" then
            saveManager.Save = function(self, name)
                local okSave, saveError = originalSave(self, name)
                if okSave and type(name) == "string" and name ~= "" and type(readfile) == "function" and type(writefile) == "function" then
                    local fullPath = tostring(self.Folder or "IronFrost/IronFrost") .. "/settings/" .. name .. ".json"
                    local payload = State.GetSkinchangerConfigPayload()
                    if type(payload) == "table" then
                        pcall(function()
                            local decoded = HttpService:JSONDecode(readfile(fullPath))
                            if type(decoded) == "table" then
                                decoded.ironfrostSkinchanger = payload
                                decoded.ironfrostConfigVersion = 2
                                writefile(fullPath, HttpService:JSONEncode(decoded))
                            end
                        end)
                    end
                end
                return okSave, saveError
            end
        end
        local originalLoad = saveManager.Load
        if type(originalLoad) == "function" then
            saveManager.Load = function(self, name)
                local okLoad, loadError = originalLoad(self, name)
                if okLoad and type(name) == "string" and name ~= "" and type(readfile) == "function" then
                    local fullPath = tostring(self.Folder or "IronFrost/IronFrost") .. "/settings/" .. name .. ".json"
                    task.defer(function()
                        local okRead, raw = pcall(readfile, fullPath)
                        if not okRead or type(raw) ~= "string" or raw == "" then
                            return
                        end
                        local okDecode, decoded = pcall(function()
                            return HttpService:JSONDecode(raw)
                        end)
                        if okDecode and type(decoded) == "table" and type(decoded.ironfrostSkinchanger) == "table" then
                            State.ApplySkinchangerConfigPayload(decoded.ironfrostSkinchanger)
                            if Config.SkinchangerUI == true then
                                State.SetSkinchangerUIVisible(true)
                            end
                        end
                    end)
                end
                return okLoad, loadError
            end
        end
        local loadAutoload = saveManager.LoadAutoloadConfig
        saveManager.LoadAutoloadConfig = function(self)
            local path = tostring(self.Folder or "IronFrost/IronFrost") .. "/settings/autoload.txt"
            if type(isfile) == "function" and isfile(path) and type(readfile) == "function" then
                local okRead, value = pcall(readfile, path)
                value = okRead and tostring(value or "") or ""
                if value == "" or value == "__disabled__" then
                    Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = ""
                    task.defer(function()
                        refreshSaveManagerConfigList(nil)
                    end)
                    return true
                end
                Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = value
            end
            local result = loadAutoload(self)
            task.defer(function()
                refreshSaveManagerConfigList(Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig ~= "" and Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or nil)
            end)
            return result
        end
        State.DisableLinoriaAutoload = function()
            local path = tostring(saveManager.Folder or "IronFrost/IronFrost") .. "/settings/autoload.txt"
            if type(delfile) == "function" and type(isfile) == "function" and isfile(path) then
                pcall(delfile, path)
            elseif type(writefile) == "function" then
                pcall(writefile, path, "__disabled__")
            end
        end
        State.LinoriaSaveManager = saveManager
    end)

    local configBox = tabs.Settings:AddRightGroupbox("Configuration")
    local function currentConfigName()
        local option = options.IF_ConfigName
        local value = option and option.Value
        if type(value) == "table" then
            value = value[1]
        end
        value = tostring(value or Config.SettingsConfigName or "default")
        if value == "" then
            value = Config.SettingsConfigName or "default"
        end
        return sanitizeFileName(value)
    end
    local function selectedConfigName()
        local option = options.IF_ConfigList
        local value = option and option.Value
        if type(value) == "table" then
            value = value[1]
        end
        value = tostring(value or "")
        if value == "" or value == "--" then
            value = currentConfigName()
        end
        return sanitizeFileName(value)
    end

    configBox:AddInput("IF_ConfigName", {
        Text = "Config name",
        Default = Config.SettingsConfigName,
        Numeric = false,
        Finished = false,
        Placeholder = "config name",
        Callback = function(value)
            Config.SettingsConfigName = sanitizeFileName(value)
        end,
    })
    local initialConfigNames = listJsonNames(CONFIG_DIR, Config.SettingsConfigName)
    if initialConfigNames[1] ~= "--" then
        table.insert(initialConfigNames, 1, "--")
    end
    configBox:AddDropdown("IF_ConfigList", {
        Text = "Config list",
        Values = initialConfigNames,
        Default = Config.SettingsConfigName ~= "" and Config.SettingsConfigName or "--",
        Multi = false,
        Callback = function(value)
            if value == nil or tostring(value) == "--" then
                return
            end
            Config.SettingsConfigName = sanitizeFileName(value)
            setOptionValue("IF_ConfigName", Config.SettingsConfigName)
        end,
    })
    if type(configBox.AddDivider) == "function" then
        configBox:AddDivider()
    end
    bindToggle(configBox, "IF_AutoExecute", "auto execute", "AutoQueueOnTeleport", "Automatically execute again after joining another server.", function(value)
        local setTeleportDisabled = rawget(Environment, "__IronFrostSetTeleportAutoloadDisabled")
            or rawget(_G, "__IronFrostSetTeleportAutoloadDisabled")
        local queueTeleport = rawget(Environment, "__IronFrostQueueTeleportAutorun")
            or rawget(_G, "__IronFrostQueueTeleportAutorun")
        local clearTeleport = rawget(Environment, "__IronFrostClearTeleportQueue")
            or rawget(_G, "__IronFrostClearTeleportQueue")

        if type(setTeleportDisabled) == "function" then
            pcall(setTeleportDisabled, value ~= true, "ui toggle")
        end

        if value == true then
            if type(queueTeleport) == "function" then
                pcall(queueTeleport)
            end
        elseif type(clearTeleport) == "function" then
            pcall(clearTeleport, "ui toggle")
        end
    end)
    local createButton = configBox:AddButton({
        Text = "Create config",
        Func = function()
            saveConfig(currentConfigName())
        end,
    })
    if createButton and type(createButton.AddButton) == "function" then
        createButton:AddButton({
            Text = "Load config",
            Func = function()
                loadConfig(selectedConfigName())
            end,
        })
    else
        configBox:AddButton({
            Text = "Load config",
            Func = function()
                loadConfig(selectedConfigName())
            end,
        })
    end
    configBox:AddButton({
        Text = "Overwrite config",
        Func = function()
            saveConfig(selectedConfigName())
        end,
    })
    configBox:AddButton({
        Text = "Refresh list",
        Func = function()
            refreshConfigList()
            refreshSettingsLabels()
        end,
    })
    local autoloadButton = configBox:AddButton({
        Text = "Set autoload",
        Func = function()
            setAutoloadConfig(selectedConfigName())
        end,
    })
    if autoloadButton and type(autoloadButton.AddButton) == "function" then
        autoloadButton:AddButton({
            Text = "Remove autoload",
            Func = function()
                removeAutoloadConfig()
            end,
        })
    else
        configBox:AddButton({
            Text = "Remove autoload",
            Func = function()
                removeAutoloadConfig()
            end,
        })
    end
    autoloadStatusLabel = configBox:AddLabel("")
    refreshConfigList()
    refreshSettingsLabels()

    pcall(function()
        local themeManager = State.LinoriaThemeManager
        if type(themeManager) == "table" and type(themeManager.ApplyToTab) == "function" then
            themeManager:ApplyToTab(tabs.Settings)
        end
    end)

    -- Legacy custom settings controls kept out of runtime; Linoria managers own this tab.

    pcall(function()
        library:OnUnload(function()
            State.LinoriaLoaded = false
            State.LinoriaMenuVisible = false
            State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(true)
        end)
    end)

    applySettingsRuntime()
    pcall(function()
        local saveManager = State.LinoriaSaveManager
        if type(saveManager) == "table" and type(saveManager.LoadAutoloadConfig) == "function" then
            saveManager:LoadAutoloadConfig()
            task.delay(0.35, function()
                syncFeatureKeyPickerConfig()
                applySettingsRuntime()
                refreshSaveManagerConfigList(Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig ~= "" and Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or nil)
                State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(true)
                if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
            end)
        end
    end)
    setError("")
    return true
end

local function createGui()
    local gui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
    gui.Name = "Roblox" .. tostring(math.random(10000, 99999))
    gui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
    gui.ResetOnSpawn = false

    local circle = Instance.new("Frame")
    circle.Name = "FOVCircle"
    circle.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(0.5, 0.5)
    circle.BackgroundTransparency = 1
    circle.BorderSizePixel = 0
    circle.Parent = gui

    local corner = Instance.new("UICorner")
    corner.CornerRadius = UDim.new(1, 0)
    corner.Parent = circle

    local stroke = Instance.new("UIStroke")
    stroke.Name = "Stroke"
    stroke.ApplyStrokeMode = Enum.ApplyStrokeMode.Border
    stroke.Color = Config.FOVColor
    stroke.Transparency = Config.FOVTransparency
    stroke.Thickness = Config.FOVThickness
    stroke.Parent = circle

    if Config.ShowDebug then
        local debugLabel = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        debugLabel.Name = "Debug"
        debugLabel.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(10, 12, 16)
        debugLabel.BackgroundTransparency = 0.25
        debugLabel.BorderSizePixel = 0
        debugLabel.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(14, 90)
        debugLabel.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(500, 116)
        debugLabel.Font = Enum.Font.Code
        debugLabel.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(235, 245, 255)
        debugLabel.TextSize = 13
        debugLabel.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        debugLabel.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
        debugLabel.Visible = true
        debugLabel.Parent = gui

        local debugPadding = Instance.new("UIPadding")
        debugPadding.PaddingLeft = UDim.new(0, 8)
        debugPadding.PaddingRight = UDim.new(0, 8)
        debugPadding.PaddingTop = UDim.new(0, 6)
        debugPadding.PaddingBottom = UDim.new(0, 6)
        debugPadding.Parent = debugLabel

        State.DebugLabel = debugLabel
    end

    if not createLinoriaWindow() then
        createMainWindow(gui)
    end

    gui.Parent = safeGuiParent()
    State.Gui = gui
    State.Circle = circle
    if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
end

updateUIControls = function()
    for key, record in pairs(State.Buttons) do
        if key ~= "__tabs" and type(record) == "table" and record.Button then
            setButtonVisual(record.Button, Config[key] == true, record.Label)
        end
    end

    for key, record in pairs(State.CycleButtons or {}) do
        if type(record) == "table" and record.Button then
            local value = tostring(Config[key] or (record.Values and record.Values[1]) or "")
            local active = value ~= "" and value ~= "None"
            record.Button.Text = string.format("%s: %s", record.Label, value)
            record.Button.BackgroundColor3 = active and Color3.fromRGB(36, 90, 118)
                or Color3.fromRGB(24, 31, 42)
        end
    end

    for key, slider in pairs(State.Sliders) do
        local value = tonumber(Config[key]) or slider.Min
        local pct = 0
        if slider.Max ~= slider.Min then
            pct = math.clamp((value - slider.Min) / (slider.Max - slider.Min), 0, 1)
        end
        slider.Fill.Size = UDim2.fromScale(pct, 1)

        local textValue
        if slider.Step and slider.Step < 1 then
            textValue = string.format("%.2f", value)
        else
            textValue = tostring(math.floor(value + 0.5))
        end
        slider.Title.Text = string.format("%s: %s", slider.Label, textValue)
    end

    if State.Window then
        State.Window.Visible = Config.ShowUI
    end
    State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(true)

    local labels = State.Labels
    if labels.Target then
        labels.Target.Text = string.format("Target: %s [%s]", State.Stats.LastTargetName, State.Stats.LastTargetSource)
    end
    if labels.Hooks then
        labels.Hooks.Text = string.format(
            "Hooks: Gen=%s Base=%s Generic=%s",
            State.OverkillInstalled and "ON" or "OFF",
            State.CommandBaseInstalled and "ON" or "OFF",
            State.GenericInstalled and "ON" or "OFF"
        )
    end
    if labels.Command then
        local cmd = State.LastCommand or {}
        labels.Command.Text = string.format(
            "Command: buttons=%s pitch=%s yaw=%s forced=%s rapid=%s %.2fx",
            tostring(cmd.buttons),
            tostring(cmd.pitch),

            tostring(cmd.yaw),
            tostring(cmd.forcedFire),
            tostring(cmd.rapidFire),
            tonumber(cmd.rapidFireScale) or tonumber(Config.GunRapidFireScale) or 6
        )
    end
    if labels.Weapon then
        local sim = State.LastSimState or {}
        labels.Weapon.Text = string.format(
            "Weapon: slot=%s mode=%s mag=%s reserve=%s reload=%s",
            tostring(sim.equippedSlot),
            tostring(sim.mode),
            tostring(sim.mag),
            tostring(sim.reserve),
            tostring(sim.reload)
        )
    end
    if labels.Counters then
        local age = State.Stats.LastRewrite > 0 and (now() - State.Stats.LastRewrite) or -1
        labels.Counters.Text = string.format(
            "Counters: cmd=%d ray=%d mouse=%d last=%.2fs",
            State.Stats.Rewrites,
            State.Stats.RayRedirects,
            State.Stats.MouseRedirects,
            age
        )
    end
    if labels.Unlock then
        local unlock = State.UnlockAll or {}
        local ownedCount = 0
        if type(unlock.RealOwnedWeapons) == "table" then
            for _ in pairs(unlock.RealOwnedWeapons) do
                ownedCount += 1
            end
        end
        labels.Unlock.Text = string.format(
            "Unlock: %s | %s | owned weapons=%d",
            Config.UnlockAll and "ON" or "OFF",
            tostring(unlock.LastStatus or "off"),
            ownedCount
        )
    end
    if labels.Error then
        labels.Error.Text = State.LastError ~= "" and ("Error: " .. State.LastError) or "Error: none"
    end
    if labels.ConfigName then
        labels.ConfigName.Text = "Config: " .. tostring(Config.SettingsConfigName or "default")
    end
    if labels.AutoloadConfig then
        labels.AutoloadConfig.Text = "Autoload: " .. (Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig ~= "" and Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig or "none")
    end

    if State.LinoriaLibrary and State.LinoriaLoaded then
        pcall(function()
            if type(State.LinoriaLibrary.SetWatermarkVisibility) == "function" then
                State.LinoriaLibrary:SetWatermarkVisibility(false)
            else
                State.LinoriaLibrary:SetWatermark("")
            end
        end)
    end
end

local function camera()
    return Workspace.CurrentCamera
end

local function getLightingEffect(className, name)
    local existing = Lighting:FindFirstChild(name)
    if existing and existing.ClassName == className then
        return existing
    elseif existing then
        pcall(function()
            existing:Destroy()
        end)
    end

    local effect = Instance.new(className)
    effect.Name = name
    effect.Parent = Lighting
    return effect
end

local function blendColor(fromColor, toColor, alpha)
    return Color3.new(
        fromColor.R + (toColor.R - fromColor.R) * alpha,
        fromColor.G + (toColor.G - fromColor.G) * alpha,
        fromColor.B + (toColor.B - fromColor.B) * alpha
    )
end

local function isMirrorShaderPart(part)
    if typeof(part) ~= "Instance" or not part:IsA("BasePart") then
        return false
    end
    if part.Transparency >= 0.95 then
        return false
    end
    local localCharacter = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character
    if localCharacter and part:IsDescendantOf(localCharacter) then
        return false
    end

    local current = part.Parent
    while current and current ~= Workspace do
        if current:IsA("Model") then
            if Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(current) then
                return false
            end
            if current:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
                return false
            end
        end
        current = current.Parent
    end
    return true
end

local function restoreMirrorShaderParts()
    local shader = State.MirrorShader
    if shader.Connection then
        pcall(function()
            shader.Connection:Disconnect()
        end)
        shader.Connection = nil
    end

    for part, original in pairs(shader.Parts) do
        if typeof(part) == "Instance" and part.Parent then
            pcall(function()
                part.Material = original.Material
                part.Reflectance = original.Reflectance
            end)
        end
    end
    table.clear(shader.Parts)
    shader.Active = false
    shader.LastScan = 0
    shader.LastReflectance = nil
    shader.LastMaterial = nil
end

local function applyMirrorShaderParts(enabled, preset, strength)
    local shader = State.MirrorShader
    if not enabled or not preset.mirror then
        if shader.Active then
            restoreMirrorShaderParts()
        end
        return
    end

    local targetMaterial = preset.material or Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
    local targetReflectance = math.clamp((tonumber(preset.reflectance) or 0.95) * strength, 0, 1)
    local changed = shader.LastMaterial ~= targetMaterial or shader.LastReflectance ~= targetReflectance
    shader.Active = true
    shader.LastMaterial = targetMaterial
    shader.LastReflectance = targetReflectance

    local function applyPart(part)
        if not isMirrorShaderPart(part) then
            return
        end
        if not shader.Parts[part] then
            shader.Parts[part] = {
                Material = part.Material,
                Reflectance = part.Reflectance,
            }
        end
        pcall(function()
            part.Material = targetMaterial
            part.Reflectance = targetReflectance
        end)
    end

    if changed then
        for part in pairs(shader.Parts) do
            applyPart(part)
        end
        shader.LastScan = 0
    end

    if not shader.Connection then
        shader.Connection = Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(inst)
            if shader.Active and inst:IsA("BasePart") then
                task.defer(function()
                    if shader.Active then
                        applyPart(inst)
                    end
                end)
            end
        end)
    end

    local nowTime = now()
    if nowTime - (tonumber(shader.LastScan) or 0) < 2.5 then
        return
    end
    shader.LastScan = nowTime

    local scanned = 0
    for _, inst in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if inst:IsA("BasePart") then
            applyPart(inst)
            scanned += 1
            if scanned >= 2500 then
                break
            end
        end
    end
end

-- RadiantGI Shader: Enhanced GI lighting and reflections on ALL objects
local function applyRadiantGIShader(enabled, preset, strength)
    if not enabled or not preset.radiantGI then
        return
    end
    
    local function enhancePart(part)
        if not part:IsA("BasePart") then return end
        
        pcall(function()
            -- Apply SSR-style reflectance boost to non-emissive parts
            if part.Material ~= Enum.Material.Neon and part.Material ~= Enum.Material.ForceField then
                local baseReflectance = part.Reflectance
                part.Reflectance = math.clamp(baseReflectance + (preset.ssr_intensity or 1.4) * 0.12 * strength, 0, 0.85)
            end
            
            -- Upgrade basic materials for better lighting
            if part.Material == Enum.Material.Plastic then
                part.Material = Enum.Material.SmoothPlastic
            elseif part.Material == Enum.Material.Wood then
                part.Material = Enum.Material.WoodPlanks
            end
        end)
    end
    
    -- Full scans are expensive after obfuscation, so only run one when the
    -- preset/strength changes or after a long refresh interval.
    local clock = now()
    local scanKey = tostring(preset.ssr_intensity) .. ":" .. tostring(math.floor(strength * 1000 + 0.5))
    local shouldScan = not State.RadiantGIScanning
        and (State.RadiantGILastKey ~= scanKey or clock - (tonumber(State.RadiantGILastScan) or 0) >= 12)
    if shouldScan then
        State.RadiantGIScanning = true
        State.RadiantGILastKey = scanKey
        State.RadiantGILastScan = clock
        task.spawn(function()
            local count = 0
            for _, desc in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
                enhancePart(desc)
                count += 1
                if count % 100 == 0 then
                    task.wait()
                end
            end
            State.RadiantGIScanning = false
        end)
    end
    
    -- Monitor for new parts to apply shader automatically
    if not State.RadiantGIConnection then
        State.RadiantGIConnection = Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(inst)
            if Config.WorldShaderEnabled and Config.WorldShaderPreset == "RadiantGI" then
                task.defer(function()
                    enhancePart(inst)
                end)
            end
        end)
        table.insert(State.Connections, State.RadiantGIConnection)
    end
end

local function applyWorldShaderVisuals(source)
    source = source or Config
    local presetName = normalizeWorldShaderPreset(source.WorldShaderPreset)
    local preset = WORLD_SHADER_PRESETS[presetName] or WORLD_SHADER_PRESETS.None
    local strength = math.clamp((tonumber(source.WorldShaderStrength) or 100) / 100, 0, 1)
    local enabled = source.WorldShaderEnabled == true and presetName ~= "None" and strength > 0

    source.WorldShaderPreset = presetName
    source.WorldShaderStrength = math.floor(strength * 100 + 0.5)

    local shaderColor = getLightingEffect("ColorCorrectionEffect", "IronFrostShaderColor")
    shaderColor.Enabled = enabled
