    shaderColor.Saturation = enabled and ((tonumber(preset.saturation) or 0) * strength) or 0
    shaderColor.Contrast = enabled and ((tonumber(preset.contrast) or 0) * strength) or 0
    shaderColor.Brightness = enabled and ((tonumber(preset.brightness) or 0) * strength) or 0
    shaderColor.TintColor = enabled and blendColor(Color3.new(1, 1, 1), preset.tint or Color3.new(1, 1, 1), strength)
        or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)

    local shaderBloom = getLightingEffect("BloomEffect", "IronFrostShaderBloom")
    shaderBloom.Enabled = enabled and (tonumber(preset.bloom) or 0) > 0
    shaderBloom.Intensity = enabled and ((tonumber(preset.bloom) or 0) * strength) or 0
    shaderBloom.Size = tonumber(preset.bloomSize) or 24
    shaderBloom.Threshold = tonumber(preset.bloomThreshold) or 1

    local shaderSunRays = getLightingEffect("SunRaysEffect", "IronFrostShaderSunRays")
    shaderSunRays.Enabled = enabled and (tonumber(preset.sun) or 0) > 0
    shaderSunRays.Intensity = enabled and ((tonumber(preset.sun) or 0) * strength) or 0
    shaderSunRays.Spread = tonumber(preset.sunSpread) or 0.75

    local shaderDof = getLightingEffect("DepthOfFieldEffect", "IronFrostShaderDoF")
    shaderDof.Enabled = enabled and (tonumber(preset.dof) or 0) > 0
    shaderDof.FarIntensity = enabled and ((tonumber(preset.dof) or 0) * strength) or 0
    shaderDof.NearIntensity = 0
    shaderDof.FocusDistance = 120
    shaderDof.InFocusRadius = 80

    applyMirrorShaderParts(enabled, preset, strength)
    applyRadiantGIShader(enabled, preset, strength)
end

local function applyWorldVisuals()
    local colorCorrection = getLightingEffect("ColorCorrectionEffect", "IronFrostColorCorrection")
    colorCorrection.Enabled = Config.WorldColorCorrectionEnabled == true
    colorCorrection.Saturation = tonumber(Config.WorldSaturation) or 0
    colorCorrection.Contrast = tonumber(Config.WorldContrast) or 0
    colorCorrection.Brightness = tonumber(Config.WorldBrightness) or 0

    local bloom = getLightingEffect("BloomEffect", "IronFrostBloom")
    bloom.Enabled = Config.WorldBloomEnabled == true
    bloom.Intensity = tonumber(Config.WorldBloomIntensity) or 0.6
    bloom.Size = tonumber(Config.WorldBloomSize) or 26
    bloom.Threshold = tonumber(Config.WorldBloomThreshold) or 0.4

    local blur = getLightingEffect("BlurEffect", "IronFrostBlur")
    blur.Size = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.WorldBlur) or 0, 0, 24)
    blur.Enabled = blur.Size > 0

    pcall(function()
        Lighting.GlobalShadows = Config.WorldGlobalShadows == true
    end)

    local cam = camera()
    if cam and Config.WorldFOVChanger then
        cam.FieldOfView = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.WorldFOV) or 70, 40, 120)
    end

    applyWorldShaderVisuals(Config)
end

local function clearWorldVisuals()
    restoreMirrorShaderParts()
    for _, name in ipairs({
        "IronFrostColorCorrection",
        "IronFrostBloom",
        "IronFrostBlur",
        "IronFrostShaderColor",
        "IronFrostShaderBloom",
        "IronFrostShaderSunRays",
        "IronFrostShaderDoF",
    }) do
        local effect = Lighting:FindFirstChild(name)
        if effect then
            pcall(function()
                effect:Destroy()
            end)
        end
    end
end

local function getAimCenter()
    local cam = camera()
    if Config.FOVFromMouse then
        return UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
    end

    local viewport = cam and cam.ViewportSize or Vector2.new(1920, 1080)
    return Vector2.new(viewport.X * 0.5, viewport.Y * 0.5)
end

local function updateGui()
    local radius = math.max(1, tonumber(Config.FOVRadius) or 220)
    local center = getAimCenter()

    if State.Circle then
        State.Circle.Visible = State.Alive and silentAimActive() and Config.ShowFOV
        State.Circle.Size = UDim2.fromOffset(radius * 2, radius * 2)
        State.Circle.Position = UDim2.fromOffset(center.X, center.Y)

        local stroke = State.Circle:FindFirstChild("Stroke")
        if stroke then
            stroke.Color = Config.FOVColor
            stroke.Transparency = Config.FOVTransparency
            stroke.Thickness = Config.FOVThickness
        end
    end

    if State.DebugLabel then
        State.DebugLabel.Visible = Config.ShowDebug
        local age = State.Stats.LastRewrite > 0 and (now() - State.Stats.LastRewrite) or -1
        local sim = State.LastSimState or {}
        State.DebugLabel.Text = string.format(
            "Silent: %s | GenMod: %s | CmdBase: %s | Generic: %s\nTarget: %s [%s] seen=%d shoot=%s force=%s fast=%.2fx\nSlot: %s mode=%s mag=%s reserve=%s reload=%s\nCmd: %d Ray: %d Mouse: %d last=%.2fs\nRemote: %s | Err: %s",
            silentAimActive() and "ON" or "OFF",
            State.OverkillInstalled and "ON" or "OFF",
            State.CommandBaseInstalled and "ON" or "OFF",
            State.GenericInstalled and "ON" or "OFF",
            State.Stats.LastTargetName,
            State.Stats.LastTargetSource,
            State.Stats.TargetsSeen,
            State.Stats.LastShootHeld and "YES" or "NO",
            Config.ForcePrimaryFire and "YES" or "NO",
            tonumber(Config.GunRapidFireScale) or 6,
            tostring(sim.equippedSlot),
            tostring(sim.mode),
            tostring(sim.mag),
            tostring(sim.reserve),
            tostring(sim.reload),
            State.Stats.Rewrites,
            State.Stats.RayRedirects,
            State.Stats.MouseRedirects,
            age,
            State.Stats.LastRemote,
            State.LastError
        )
    end

    -- updateUIControls called by button/slider callbacks; skip per-frame call
    -- to avoid iterating all UI elements 60+ times per second.
end

local function getHumanoid(model)
    if not model or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return nil
    end
    return model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
        or model:FindFirstChild("EnemyHumanoid")
end

local function findPartByNames(model, names)
    for _, name in ipairs(names) do
        local part = model:FindFirstChild(name, true)
        if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
            return part
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function getHeadPart(model)
    if not model then
        return nil
    end
    if model:IsA("BasePart") then
        return model
    end
    if not model:IsA("Model") then
        return nil
    end
    return findPartByNames(model, Config.HeadPartNames)
        or findPartByNames(model, Config.AimPartFallbacks)
        or model.PrimaryPart
end

local function getRootPart(model)
    if not model then
        return nil
    end
    if model:IsA("BasePart") then
        return model
    end
    if not model:IsA("Model") then
        return nil
    end
    local root = model:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        or model:FindFirstChild("RootPart")
        or model.PrimaryPart
    return root and root:IsA("BasePart") and root or nil
end

local function getTorsoPart(model)
    if not model then
        return nil
    end
    return findPartByNames(model, { "UpperTorso", "LowerTorso", "Torso", "Chest" })
        or getRootPart(model)
end

local function getAimPart(model)
    local mode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Head")
    if mode == "Whole Body" then
        local choices = {}
        for _, descendant in ipairs(model:GetDescendants()) do
            if descendant:IsA("BasePart") then table.insert(choices, descendant) end
        end
        if #choices > 0 then return choices[math.random(1, #choices)] end
    end
    if mode == "Root" then
        return getRootPart(model) or getHeadPart(model)
    elseif mode == "Torso" then
        return getTorsoPart(model) or getHeadPart(model)
    elseif mode == "Random" then
        local choices = {}
        local head = getHeadPart(model)
        local torso = getTorsoPart(model)
        local root = getRootPart(model)
        if head then table.insert(choices, head) end
        if torso and torso ~= head then table.insert(choices, torso) end
        if root and root ~= head and root ~= torso then table.insert(choices, root) end
        if #choices > 0 then
            return choices[math.random(1, #choices)]
        end
    end

    local selected = findPartByNames(model, { mode })
    return selected or getHeadPart(model)
end

local function localCharacter()
    local cam = camera()
    local subject = cam and cam.CameraSubject
    if subject and subject.Parent and subject.Parent:IsA("Model") then
        return subject.Parent
    end
    return LocalPlayer.Character
end

local _aimStatesChecked = false
local _aimStatesModule = nil
local _aimNeuronChecked = false
local _aimNeuron = nil
local function getAimStatesModule()
    if _aimStatesChecked then
        return _aimStatesModule
    end
    _aimStatesChecked = true
    local modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
    local statesScript = modules and modules:FindFirstChild("States")
    if statesScript then
        local ok, states = pcall(require, statesScript)
        if ok and type(states) == "table" and type(states.GetStateValue) == "function" then
            _aimStatesModule = states
        end
    end
    return _aimStatesModule
end

local function getAimNeuron()
    if _aimNeuronChecked then
        return _aimNeuron
    end
    _aimNeuronChecked = true
    local ok, neuron = pcall(function()
        return require(ReplicatedFirst.neuron)
    end)
    if ok and type(neuron) == "table" then
        _aimNeuron = neuron
    end
    return _aimNeuron
end

local function resolvePlayerModelForHealth(player)
    if not player then
        return nil
    end
    if player.Character and player.Character.Parent then
        return player.Character
    end
    local neuron = getAimNeuron()
    if neuron and type(neuron.get_character) == "function" then
        local ok, model = pcall(function()
            return neuron:get_character(player)
        end)
        if ok and typeof(model) == "Instance" and model:IsA("Model") then
            return model
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local TEAM_KEYS = { "Team", "team", "TeamId", "teamId", "TeamID", "teamID", "Faction", "faction", "Side", "side" }
local HEALTH_KEYS = { "Health", "health", "HP", "hp", "CurrentHealth", "currentHealth", "CurrentHP", "currentHP", "Life", "life" }
local DEAD_KEYS = { "Dead", "dead", "IsDead", "isDead", "Killed", "killed", "Downed", "downed" }

local function normalizedToken(value)
    if value == nil then
        return nil
    end
    local valueType = typeof(value)
    if valueType == "Instance" then
        return string.lower(value.Name)
    end
    if valueType == "BrickColor" then
        return string.lower(value.Name)
    end
    if valueType == "Color3" then
        return string.format("%.3f,%.3f,%.3f", value.R, value.G, value.B)
    end
    if type(value) == "string" or type(value) == "number" or type(value) == "boolean" then
        local text = string.lower(tostring(value))
        return text ~= "" and text or nil
    end
    return nil
end

local function instanceTeamToken(inst)
    if typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    if inst:IsA("Player") then
        local teamToken = normalizedToken(inst.Team)
        if teamToken then
            return teamToken
        end
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(TEAM_KEYS) do
        local ok, value = pcall(function()
            return inst:GetAttribute(key)
        end)
        local token = ok and normalizedToken(value)
        if token then return token end
    end
    local leaderstats = inst:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
    if leaderstats then
        for _, key in ipairs(TEAM_KEYS) do
            local obj = leaderstats:FindFirstChild(key)
            local token = obj and normalizedToken(obj.Value)
            if token then return token end
        end
    end
    if inst:IsA("Player") and inst.Neutral == false then
        return normalizedToken(inst.TeamColor)
    end
    return nil
end

local function tableTeamToken(tbl)
    if type(tbl) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(TEAM_KEYS) do
        local token = normalizedToken(tbl[key])
        if token then return token end
    end
    return nil
end

local gameplaySameTeam
do
    local checked, gameplayRef = false, nil
    local function gameplayHandler()
        if checked then return gameplayRef end
        checked = true
        pcall(function()
            local modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
            local handlers = modules and modules:FindFirstChild("Handlers")
            local gameplayScript = handlers and handlers:FindFirstChild("GameplayHandler")
            local gameplay = gameplayScript and require(gameplayScript)
            if type(gameplay) == "table" then gameplayRef = gameplay end
        end)
        return gameplayRef
    end
    local function sameTeam(a, b)
        if type(a) ~= "table" or type(b) ~= "table" then return false end
        if a == b then return true end
        local aId = a.id or a.ID or a.name or a.Name
        local bId = b.id or b.ID or b.name or b.Name
        return aId ~= nil and bId ~= nil and tostring(aId) == tostring(bId)
    end
    local function findTeam(duel, player)
        if type(duel) ~= "table" or type(duel.teams) ~= "table" or not player then return nil end
        for _, team in ipairs(duel.teams) do
            if type(team) == "table" and type(team.players) == "table" and table.find(team.players, player) then
                return team
            end
        end
        return nil
    end
    gameplaySameTeam = function(player)
        local gameplay = gameplayHandler()
        if type(gameplay) ~= "table" or not player then return nil end
        local okDuel, localDuel, localDuelId = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetLocalDuel() end)
        if not okDuel or type(localDuel) ~= "table" then return nil end
        local duelId = localDuel.id or localDuelId
        local okTargetDuel, targetDuelId = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetPlayerDuelId(player) end)
        if okTargetDuel and targetDuelId ~= nil and duelId ~= nil and tostring(targetDuelId) ~= tostring(duelId) then
            return false
        end
        local okTargetTeam, targetTeam = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetPlayerTeam(duelId, player) end)
        if not okTargetTeam then targetTeam = nil end
        targetTeam = targetTeam or findTeam(localDuel, player)
        local okLocalTeam, localTeam = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetPlayerTeam(duelId, LocalPlayer) end)
        if not okLocalTeam then localTeam = nil end
        localTeam = localTeam or findTeam(localDuel, LocalPlayer)
        if sameTeam(localTeam, targetTeam) then return true end
        if type(targetTeam) == "table" then
            if targetTeam.enemy == true then return false end
            if targetTeam.enemy == false then return true end
        end
        return nil
    end
end

local function playerSameTeam(player, targetState)
    if Config.TeamCheck ~= true or not player or player == LocalPlayer then
        return false
    end
    local gameplayResult = gameplaySameTeam(player)
    if gameplayResult ~= nil then
        return gameplayResult == true
    end
    local localToken = instanceTeamToken(LocalPlayer)
    local targetToken = instanceTeamToken(player) or tableTeamToken(targetState)
    return localToken ~= nil and targetToken ~= nil and localToken == targetToken
end

local function stateLooksDead(state, depth)
    if type(state) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    depth = depth or 0
    for _, key in ipairs(DEAD_KEYS) do
        local value = state[key]
        if value == true or value == 1 or value == "true" then
            return true
        end
    end
    if state.Alive == false or state.alive == false then
        return true
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(HEALTH_KEYS) do
        local value = tonumber(state[key])
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

local function numericObjectValue(obj)
    if typeof(obj) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    if obj:IsA("NumberValue") or obj:IsA("IntValue") then
        return tonumber(obj.Value)
    end
    if obj:IsA("StringValue") then
        return tonumber(obj.Value)
    end
    return nil
end

local function namedHealthObjectValue(inst, key)
    if typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    local value = numericObjectValue(inst:FindFirstChild(key))
    if value ~= nil then
        return value
    end
    for _, containerName in ipairs({ "Health", "HP", "Stats", "State" }) do
        local container = inst:FindFirstChild(containerName)
        if container then
            value = numericObjectValue(container:FindFirstChild(key))
            if value ~= nil then
                return value
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function instanceLooksDead(inst)
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true or typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then
        return false
    end
    local cache = State.DeathCache
    local clock = os.clock()
    local cached = cache and cache[inst]
    if cached and clock - cached.At <= 0.15 then
        return cached.Value == true
    end
    local function finish(value)
        if cache then
            cache[inst] = { At = clock, Value = value == true }
        end
        return value == true
    end
    local humanoid = inst:IsA("Humanoid") and inst or (inst:IsA("Model") and getHumanoid(inst) or nil)
    if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return finish(true)
    end
    local states = getAimStatesModule()
    if states then
        local okDead, dead = pcall(function()
            return states:GetStateValue(inst, "Dead", false)
        end)
        if okDead and dead == true then
            return finish(true)
        end
        for _, key in ipairs(HEALTH_KEYS) do
            local okHealth, health = pcall(function()
                return states:GetStateValue(inst, key, nil)
            end)
            health = okHealth and tonumber(health) or nil
            if health ~= nil and health <= 0 then
                return finish(true)
            end
        end
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(DEAD_KEYS) do
        local ok, value = pcall(function()
            return inst:GetAttribute(key)
        end)
        if ok and (value == true or value == 1 or value == "true") then
            return finish(true)
        end
    end
    local okAlive, alive = pcall(function()
        return inst:GetAttribute("Alive")
    end)
    if okAlive and alive == false then
        return finish(true)
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(HEALTH_KEYS) do
        local ok, value = pcall(function()
            return inst:GetAttribute(key)
        end)
        value = ok and tonumber(value) or nil
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then
            return finish(true)
        end
        value = namedHealthObjectValue(inst, key)
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then
            return finish(true)
        end
    end
    return finish(false)
end

local function chickynoidDataForPlayer(player)
    if not player then
        return nil, nil
    end
    local CM = getChickynoidCM()
    if not CM or type(CM.characters) ~= "table" then
        return nil, nil
    end
    local interp = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
    for uid, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
        if type(charData) == "table" and tonumber(charData.userId) == player.UserId then
            local stateRef = (type(interp) == "table" and type(interp[uid]) == "table" and interp[uid])
                or charData.characterData
                or charData
            return charData, stateRef
        end
    end
    return nil, nil
end

local function isAuthorizedPlayer(player)
    if not player or player == LocalPlayer then
        return false
    end

    if Config.AuthorizedPlayersOnly then
        if type(Config.AuthorizedUserIds) == "table" and next(Config.AuthorizedUserIds) ~= nil then
            if not Config.AuthorizedUserIds[player.UserId] then
                return false
            end
        end
    end

    if playerSameTeam(player) then
        return false
    end

    return true
end

local function chickynoidPlayerAlive(player, charData, stateRef)
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true then
        return true
    end
    if player and playerSameTeam(player, stateRef) then
        return false
    end
    if player and not charData then
        charData, stateRef = chickynoidDataForPlayer(player)
    end
    local character = resolvePlayerModelForHealth(player)
    local humanoid = character and getHumanoid(character)
    if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return false
    end
    if character and instanceLooksDead(character) then
        return false
    end
    if stateLooksDead(stateRef)
        or stateLooksDead(charData)
        or (type(charData) == "table" and stateLooksDead(charData.characterData)) then
        return false
    end
    return true
end

local function espEstimatedDead(model, player)
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true then
        return false
    end
    local esp = rawget(Environment, "XenoCleanDrawingESP_v1") or rawget(_G, "XenoCleanDrawingESP_v1")
    if type(esp) ~= "table" or type(esp.EstimatedHealth) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    local keys = {}
    if player then table.insert(keys, player) end
    if typeof(model) == "Instance" then table.insert(keys, model) end
    for _, key in ipairs(keys) do
        local value = tonumber(esp.EstimatedHealth[key])
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then
            local healthModel = type(esp.HealthModel) == "table" and esp.HealthModel[key] or nil
            if healthModel == nil or healthModel == model then
                return true
            end
        end
    end
    return false
end

local targetStillAlive = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(target)
    if type(target) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    local player = target.ChickynoidPlayer
    local model = target.Model
    if not player and typeof(model) == "Instance" then
        if model:IsA("Player") then
            player = model
        elseif model:IsA("Model") then
            player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model)
        end
    end
    local part = target.Part
    if not player and typeof(part) == "Instance" then
        local userId = tonumber(part:GetAttribute("player"))
        if userId and userId > 0 then
            player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(userId)
        end
    end
    if player and playerSameTeam(player) then
        return false
    end
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true then
        return true
    end
    if espEstimatedDead(model, player) then
        return false
    end
    if player and not chickynoidPlayerAlive(player) then
        return false
    end
    if typeof(model) == "Instance" and model:IsA("Model") and instanceLooksDead(model) then
        return false
    end
    if typeof(part) == "Instance" then
        local ownerModel = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
        if ownerModel and instanceLooksDead(ownerModel) then
            return false
        end
    end
    return true
end)

local function isNPCTarget(model)
    if not Config.TargetNPCs then
        return false
    end

    if Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model) then
        return false
    end

    local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
    if not humanoid or humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return false
    end
    if instanceLooksDead(model) then
        return false
    end

    local lower = string.lower(model.Name or "")
    return model:GetAttribute("IsDummy") == true
        or string.find(lower, "dummy", 1, true) ~= nil
        or string.find(lower, "npc", 1, true) ~= nil
        or string.find(lower, "bot", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local function isCharacterTarget(model)
    if not model or model == localCharacter() then
        return false
    end

    local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
    if not humanoid or humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return false

    end

    local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model)
    if player then
        return Config.TargetPlayers and isAuthorizedPlayer(player)
    end

    return isNPCTarget(model)
end

-- Perfect wall check geometry: this game treats ONLY Workspace.World.Map as a
-- solid occluder (confirmed from the game's own AutoShoot LOS, which raycasts
-- with Include = { workspace.World.Map }, RespectCanCollide = true). Using an
-- Include filter against just the map means the first-person view model
-- (Workspace.World.FX.ViewModel), muzzle FX, other characters and extended
-- hit boxes can NEVER produce a false "blocked" reading -- which was the bug
-- that made the old Exclude-based check fail constantly.
local losParams = RaycastParams.new()
losParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include
losParams.RespectCanCollide = true
losParams.IgnoreWater = true

local function mapOccluder()
    local w = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    return w and w:FindFirstChild("Map")
end

local function hasLineOfSight(targetPart)
    if not Config.VisibilityCheck then
        return true
    end

    local cam = camera()
    if not cam or not targetPart then
        return false
    end

    local map = mapOccluder()
    if not map then
        return true
    end

    local origin = cam.CFrame.Position
    local direction = targetPart.Position - origin
    local dist = direction.Magnitude
    if dist < 0.05 then
        return true
    end

    losParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = { map }
    local result = Workspace:Raycast(origin, direction * 0.985, losParams)
    return result == nil
end

local function addCandidate(model, candidates, source)
    if not isCharacterTarget(model) then
        return
    end

    local partMode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Head")
    local aimPart = nil

    if partMode == "Whole Body" or partMode == "Random" then
        -- Pick the part closest to screen center for smooth tracking
        local cam = camera and camera() or workspace.CurrentCamera
        if cam then
            local center = cam.ViewportSize * 0.5
            local bestDist = math.huge
            for _, desc in ipairs(model:GetDescendants()) do
                if desc:IsA("BasePart") then
                    local screenPt, onScreen = cam:WorldToViewportPoint(desc.Position)
                    if onScreen and screenPt.Z > 0 then
                        local d = (Vector2.new(screenPt.X, screenPt.Y) - center).Magnitude
                        if d < bestDist then bestDist = d; aimPart = desc end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        if not aimPart then aimPart = getAimPart(model) end
    else
        aimPart = getAimPart(model)
    end

    if not aimPart then return end

    table.insert(candidates, {
        Model = model,
        Part = aimPart,
        PositionOverride = aimPart.Position,
        Source = source,
    })
end

local function addRoot(root, candidates, source)
    if not root then
        return
    end

    for _, child in ipairs(root:GetChildren()) do
        addCandidate(child, candidates, source)
    end
end

local function addServerHitboxTargets(candidates)
    local roots = {}
    local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    local map = world and world:FindFirstChild("Map")
    local doNotReplicate = Workspace:FindFirstChild("DoNotReplicate")
    if map then table.insert(roots, { Root = map, Source = "World.Map" }) end
    if doNotReplicate then table.insert(roots, { Root = doNotReplicate, Source = "DoNotReplicate" }) end
    if #roots == 0 then return end

    local localUserId = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.UserId or 0
    local added = {}
    for _, entry in ipairs(roots) do
        for _, part in ipairs(entry.Root:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then
                local playerId = tonumber(part:GetAttribute("player"))
                local botId = tonumber(part:GetAttribute("BotUserId"))
                if playerId ~= localUserId and (playerId ~= nil or botId ~= nil) then
                    local player = playerId and Players:GetPlayerByUserId(playerId) or nil
                    local allowed = false
                    local model = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model") or part.Parent
                    if player then
                        allowed = Config.TargetPlayers and isAuthorizedPlayer(player) and chickynoidPlayerAlive(player)
                        model = player.Character or model
                    else
                        allowed = Config.TargetNPCs == true
                    end

                    local key = tostring(entry.Source) .. ":" .. tostring(part:GetDebugId())
                    if allowed and model and not added[key] then
                        added[key] = true
                        table.insert(candidates, {
                            Model = model,
                            Part = part,
                            Source = entry.Source,
                            ServerHitbox = true,
                        })
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

local collectTargets = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local candidates = {}

    addServerHitboxTargets(candidates)

    if Config.TargetPlayers then
        -- Standard Roblox character path
        for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= LocalPlayer and player.Character then
                addCandidate(player.Character, candidates, "player")
            end
        end

        -- Chickynoid path: frame-accurate interpolated positions with head offset
        pcall(function()
            local CM = getChickynoidCM()
            if CM and CM.characters then
                local interpTable = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
                -- Build userIdÃ¢â€ â€™Player lookup once instead of O(nÃ‚Â²) nested loop
                local uidToPlayer = getPlayerByUserIdMap()
                for uid, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
                    if not charData.localPlayer and charData.userId then
                        local targetUserId = tonumber(charData.userId)
                        local targetPlayer = targetUserId and uidToPlayer[targetUserId] or uidToPlayer[charData.userId]
                        if targetPlayer and isAuthorizedPlayer(targetPlayer) then
                            if not playerSameTeam(targetPlayer, charData.characterData) then
                                local interp = interpTable and interpTable[uid]
                                local basePos, stateRef
                                if type(interp) == "table" and typeof(interp.pos) == "Vector3" then
                                    basePos = interp.pos; stateRef = interp
                                elseif type(charData.characterData) == "table" and typeof(charData.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
                                    basePos = charData.characterData.pos; stateRef = charData.characterData
                                elseif typeof(charData.position) == "Vector3" then
                                    basePos = charData.position; stateRef = charData.characterData
                                end
                                if basePos and chickynoidPlayerAlive(targetPlayer, charData, stateRef) then
                                    local stepUp = (stateRef and type(stateRef.stepUp) == "number") and stateRef.stepUp or 0
                                    local partMode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Head")
                                    local headY = 1.57
                                    if partMode == "HumanoidRootPart" or partMode == "RootPart" or partMode == "HitboxRoot" or partMode == "Root" then
                                        headY = 0
                                    elseif partMode == "UpperTorso" or partMode == "Torso" or partMode == "Chest" then
                                        headY = 0.20
                                    elseif partMode == "LowerTorso" then
                                        headY = -0.80
                                    elseif partMode == "Neck" then
                                        headY = 1.13
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftUpperArm" or partMode == "RightUpperArm" or partMode == "Left Arm" or partMode == "Right Arm" then
                                        headY = 0.36
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftLowerArm" or partMode == "RightLowerArm" then
                                        headY = -0.23
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftHand" or partMode == "RightHand" then
                                        headY = -0.85
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftUpperLeg" or partMode == "RightUpperLeg" or partMode == "Left Leg" or partMode == "Right Leg" then
                                        headY = -1.43
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftLowerLeg" or partMode == "RightLowerLeg" then
                                        headY = -2.21
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftFoot" or partMode == "RightFoot" then
                                        headY = -2.85
                                    elseif partMode == "Whole Body" or partMode == "Random" then
                                        local wbCam = camera and camera() or workspace.CurrentCamera
                                        if wbCam and basePos then
                                            local camPos = wbCam.CFrame.Position
                                            local lookDir = wbCam.CFrame.LookVector
                                            local toTarget = basePos - camPos
                                            local t = toTarget:Dot(lookDir) / math.max(lookDir:Dot(lookDir), 0.001)
                                            headY = math.clamp((camPos + lookDir * t).Y - basePos.Y, -2.85, 1.57)
                                        else
                                            headY = 0
                                        end
                                    else
                                        if stateRef then
                                            if stateRef.crouching then headY = Config.ChickynoidCrouchOffset
                                            elseif stateRef.moveState == 6 or stateRef.slideLatch then headY = Config.ChickynoidSlideOffset end
                                        end
                                    end
                                    local headPos = basePos + Vector3.new(0, headY + stepUp, 0)
                                    local headPart = getHeadPart(targetPlayer.Character or nil)
                                    table.insert(candidates, {
                                        Model = targetPlayer.Character or targetPlayer,
                                        Part = headPart,
                                        PositionOverride = headPos,
                                        Source = "Chickynoid",
                                        ChickynoidPlayer = targetPlayer,
                                        ChickynoidUserId = targetUserId or charData.userId,
                                    })
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    if Config.TargetNPCs then
        local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
        addRoot(world and world:FindFirstChild("Entities"), candidates, "World.Entities")
        addRoot(Workspace:FindFirstChild("ShootingRangeEntities"), candidates, "ShootingRangeEntities")
        addRoot(Workspace:FindFirstChild("Ignore"), candidates, "Ignore")
        addRoot(Workspace, candidates, "Workspace")
    end

    return candidates
end)

local predictedPosition = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(part)
    return part.Position
end)

local targetScanNeeded = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    return silentAimActive()
        or aimbotKeyActive()
        or Config.TriggerbotTest
        or Config.GunAutoFireTest
        or Config.GunForceAim
        or Config.ForcePrimaryFire
        or Config.WallbangTest
end)

local acquireTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if not State.Alive or not targetScanNeeded() then
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        return nil
    end

    local cam = camera()
    if not cam then
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        return nil
    end

    local center = getAimCenter()
    local bestTarget = nil
    local bestScore = math.huge
    local maxDistance = tonumber(Config.MaxDistance) or 5000
    local radius = tonumber(Config.FOVRadius) or 220
    local seen = 0

    for _, candidate in ipairs(collectTargets()) do
        if not targetStillAlive(candidate) then
            continue
        end
        local part = candidate.Part
        if part and part.Parent then
            seen = seen + 1
            local worldPosition = candidate.PositionOverride or predictedPosition(part)
            local distance = (worldPosition - cam.CFrame.Position).Magnitude
            local targetAllowed = Config.WallbangTest
                or candidate.ServerHitbox
                or hasLineOfSight(part)
            if distance <= maxDistance and targetAllowed then
                    local screenPoint, onScreen = cam:WorldToViewportPoint(worldPosition)
                    if onScreen then
                    local screen = Vector2.new(screenPoint.X, screenPoint.Y)
                    local screenDistance = (screen - center).Magnitude
                    local inFOV = screenDistance <= radius
                    -- Targeting mode was removed: always choose the closest
                    -- valid target to the center of the FOV circle.
                    local score = screenDistance
                    if candidate.ServerHitbox then
                        score = score - 10000
                    end
                    if inFOV and score < bestScore then
                        bestScore = score
                        bestTarget = {
                            Model = candidate.Model,
                            Part = part,
                            Position = worldPosition,
                            ScreenDistance = screenDistance,
                            WorldDistance = distance,
                            Source = candidate.Source,
                            ChickynoidPlayer = candidate.ChickynoidPlayer,
                            ChickynoidUserId = candidate.ChickynoidUserId,
                            ServerHitbox = candidate.ServerHitbox,
                        }
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    State.Stats.TargetsSeen = seen
    State.CurrentTarget = bestTarget
    State.CurrentTargetAt = now()
    if bestTarget then
        State.Stats.LastTargetName = tostring(bestTarget.ChickynoidPlayer and bestTarget.ChickynoidPlayer.Name or bestTarget.Model.Name)
            .. "." .. tostring(bestTarget.Part and bestTarget.Part.Name or "pos")
        State.Stats.LastTargetSource = bestTarget.Source
    else
        State.Stats.LastTargetName = "none"
        State.Stats.LastTargetSource = "none"
    end
    return bestTarget
end)

local getTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if State.CurrentTarget and now() - State.CurrentTargetAt < 0.08 then
        if targetStillAlive(State.CurrentTarget) then
            return State.CurrentTarget
        end
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        State.CurrentTargetAt = 0
    end
    return acquireTarget()
end)

local function getNeuron()
    if State.Neuron ~= nil then
        return State.Neuron ~= false and State.Neuron or nil
    end

    local ok, neuron = pcall(function()
        return require(ReplicatedFirst.neuron)
    end)
    State.Neuron = ok and neuron or false
    return ok and neuron or nil
end

local function resolveCharModel(player)
    if not player or player == LocalPlayer then
        return nil
    end

    if player.Character and player.Character.Parent then
        return player.Character
    end

    local neuron = getNeuron()
    if neuron and type(neuron.get_character) == "function" then
        local ok, character = pcall(function()
            return neuron:get_character(player)
        end)
        if ok and typeof(character) == "Instance" and character:IsA("Model") and character.Parent then
            return character
        end
    end

    return nil
end

local function buildCharLookup()
    local t = now()
    local ttl = math.max(0.08, math.min(0.5, tonumber(Config.ESPRefreshRate) or 0.15))
    if State.PlayerCharacterCache and State.PlayerCharacterCacheAt and t - State.PlayerCharacterCacheAt < ttl then
        return State.PlayerCharacterCache
    end

    local cache = {}
    for _, candidate in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        local character = resolveCharModel(candidate)
        if character then
            cache[character] = candidate
        end
    end

    State.PlayerCharacterCache = cache
    State.PlayerCharacterCacheAt = t
    return cache
end

local function ownerOfModel(model)
    if not model or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return nil
    end

    local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model)
    if player then
        return player
    end

    local cache = buildCharLookup()
    if cache[model] then
        return cache[model]
    end

    for _, attributeName in ipairs({ "player", "UserId", "userid", "PlayerId", "OwnerId" }) do
        local userId = tonumber(model:GetAttribute(attributeName))
        if userId then
            player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(userId)
            if player then
                return player
            end
        end
    end

    for _, inst in ipairs(model:GetChildren()) do
        for _, attributeName in ipairs({ "player", "UserId", "userid", "PlayerId", "OwnerId" }) do
            local userId = tonumber(inst:GetAttribute(attributeName))
            if userId then
                player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(userId)
                if player then
                    return player
                end
            end
        end
    end

    return nil
end

local function targetDisplayName(model, target)
    if not model then
        return "unknown"
    end

    if target and target.Player then
        return target.Player.Name
    end


    local player = ownerOfModel(model)
    if player then
        return player.Name
    end

    if target and target.Source == "player" then
        local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
        if humanoid and type(humanoid.DisplayName) == "string" then
            local displayName = humanoid.DisplayName
            if displayName ~= "" and displayName ~= "Humanoid" and displayName ~= model.Name then
                return displayName
            end
        end
        return "Player"
    end

    for _, attributeName in ipairs({ "PlayerName", "Username", "DisplayName", "BotName", "Name" }) do
        local value = model:GetAttribute(attributeName)
        if type(value) == "string" and value ~= "" then
            return value
        end
    end

    local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
    if humanoid and type(humanoid.DisplayName) == "string" and humanoid.DisplayName ~= "" then
        return humanoid.DisplayName
    end

    return model.Name
end

local HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES = {
    "Health",
    "HP",
    "CurrentHealth",
    "CurrentHP",
    "health",
    "hp",
    "currentHealth",
    "currentHP",
    "Value",
    "Current",
    "current",
}

local MAX_HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES = {
    "MaxHealth",
    "MaxHP",
    "maxHealth",
    "maxHP",
    "MaximumHealth",
    "maximumHealth",
    "Max",
    "max",
}

local function nameMatches(name, names)
    local lower = string.lower(tostring(name or ""))
    for _, wanted in ipairs(names) do
        if lower == string.lower(tostring(wanted)) then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

local function numericValue(value)
    local number = tonumber(value)
    if number ~= nil then
        return number
    end
    return nil
end

local function numericAttribute(instance, names)
    if typeof(instance) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    for _, name in ipairs(names) do
        local value = instance:GetAttribute(name)
        local number = numericValue(value)
        if number ~= nil then
            return number
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function numericInstanceValue(instance, names)
    if typeof(instance) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end

    local attr = numericAttribute(instance, names)
    if attr ~= nil then
        return attr
    end

    if instance:IsA("ValueBase") and nameMatches(instance.Name, names) then
        local ok, value = pcall(function()
            return instance.Value
        end)
        local number = ok and numericValue(value) or nil
        if number ~= nil then
            return number
        end
    end

    return nil
end

local function findNumericDescendant(root, names)
    if typeof(root) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end

    local direct = root:FindFirstChild("Health")
        or root:FindFirstChild("HP")
        or root:FindFirstChild("Stats")
        or root:FindFirstChild("State")
    local value = numericInstanceValue(direct, names)
    if value ~= nil then
        return value
    end

    for _, child in ipairs(root:GetChildren()) do
        value = numericInstanceValue(child, names)
        if value ~= nil then
            return value
        end
    end

    for _, descendant in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
        value = numericInstanceValue(descendant, names)
        if value ~= nil then
            return value
        end
    end

    return nil
end

local function targetHealth(model)
    local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
    if humanoid then
        return math.max(0, humanoid.Health), math.max(1, humanoid.MaxHealth), "Humanoid"
    end

    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil, nil, "none"
    end

    local healthContainer = model:FindFirstChild("Health")
        or model:FindFirstChild("HP")
        or model:FindFirstChild("Stats")
        or model:FindFirstChild("State")

    local current = numericAttribute(model, HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES)
        or numericInstanceValue(healthContainer, HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES)
        or findNumericDescendant(model, HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES)
    local maxHealth = numericAttribute(model, MAX_HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES)
        or numericInstanceValue(healthContainer, MAX_HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES)
        or findNumericDescendant(model, MAX_HEALTH_VALUE_NAMES)

    if current ~= nil and maxHealth == nil then
        maxHealth = current > 100 and current or 100
    end

    if current ~= nil then
        return math.max(0, current), math.max(1, maxHealth or 100), healthContainer and healthContainer.ClassName or "replicated"
    end

    return nil, nil, "unknown"
end

local function targetHealthText(model)
    local current, maxHealth = targetHealth(model)
    if current == nil then
        return "HP ?"
    end
    return string.format("HP %.0f/%.0f", current, maxHealth)
end

local function targetHealthPercent(model)
    local current, maxHealth = targetHealth(model)
    if current == nil or maxHealth == nil or maxHealth <= 0 then
        return 1
    end
    return math.clamp(current / maxHealth, 0, 1)
end

local function colorForTarget(target)
    if State.CurrentTarget and target.Model == State.CurrentTarget.Model then
        return Config.ESPTargetColor
    end

    if target.Player or ownerOfModel(target.Model) then
        return Config.ESPPlayerColor
    end

    return Config.ESPNPCColor
end

-- Legacy ESP, silent aiming, and ray rewriting were removed.
local antiKatanaConn = nil


local function clearESP() end
local function destroyESPObject() end
local function refreshVisualOverlay() end
local runAimAssist  -- forward declaration; real implementation below
function State.Cleanup()
    if not State.Alive then return end
    State.Alive = false
    pcall(function() RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(AIM_BIND_NAME) end)
    pcall(function() RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(State.MouseBindName) end)
    clearWorldVisuals()
    if type(unlockAllCleanup) == "function" then
        pcall(unlockAllCleanup)
    end
    if type(State.SetSkinchangerUIVisible) == "function" then
        pcall(State.SetSkinchangerUIVisible, false)
    end
    -- Disconnect exploit connections not tracked in State.Connections
    if antiKatanaConn then pcall(function() antiKatanaConn:Disconnect() end); antiKatanaConn = nil end
    for _, connection in ipairs(State.Connections) do pcall(function() connection:Disconnect() end) end
    table.clear(State.Connections)
    if State.Gui then pcall(function() State.Gui:Destroy() end) end
    if State.LinoriaLibrary then
        pcall(function()
            State.LinoriaLibrary:Unload()
        end)
    end
    -- The combined file also starts helper controllers under these keys.
    -- Ask each one to clean up so Unload removes their UI/drawings as well.
    for _, key in ipairs({ "XenoSilentAimPrivate", "XenoCleanDrawingESP_v1", "PrivateTestWorldConfigBridge_v1" }) do
        local controller = rawget(_G, key)
        if type(controller) == "table" and type(controller.Cleanup) == "function" then
            pcall(controller.Cleanup)
        end
    end
    State.Gui = nil
    State.LinoriaLibrary = nil
    if type(AssistCircle) == "table" and type(AssistCircle.Remove) == "function" then pcall(function() AssistCircle:Remove() end) end
    pcall(function() Environment[RUN_KEY] = nil end)
    pcall(function() _G[RUN_KEY] = nil end)
end

local function installAntiKatana()
    if antiKatanaConn then return end
    local function isMeleeLikeWeapon(value)
        local lower = string.lower(tostring(value or ""))
        return lower:find("katana", 1, true)
            or lower:find("knife", 1, true)
            or lower:find("sword", 1, true)
            or lower:find("blade", 1, true)
            or lower:find("melee", 1, true)
            or lower:find("scythe", 1, true)
    end

    local function isKatanaAbilitySignal(inst)
        if typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" or not inst:IsA("Sound") then
            return false
        end
        local lower = string.lower(tostring(inst.Name or ""))
        return lower:find("deflectremote", 1, true) ~= nil
            or lower == "deflect"
            or lower == "parry"
            or lower:find("deflect_", 1, true) ~= nil
            or lower:find("parry_", 1, true) ~= nil
    end

    local function isKatanaAbilityStateKey(value)
        local lower = string.lower(tostring(value or ""))
        return lower:find("deflect", 1, true)
            or lower:find("parry", 1, true)
            or lower:find("counter", 1, true)
            or lower:find("blockability", 1, true)
    end

    local function isWorldCombatFx(inst)
        local cur = inst
        for _ = 1, 10 do
            if not cur or cur == Workspace then
                break
            end
            local name = string.lower(tostring(cur.Name or ""))
            if name == "fx" or name == "vfx" or name == "worldsound" or name:find("effect", 1, true) then
                return true
            end
            cur = cur.Parent
        end
        return false
    end

    local function instancePosition(inst)
        if typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then
            return nil
        end
        if inst:IsA("BasePart") then
            return inst.Position
        end
        if inst:IsA("Attachment") then
            return inst.WorldPosition
        end
        if inst:IsA("Model") then
            local part = inst.PrimaryPart or inst:FindFirstChildWhichIsA("BasePart", true)
            return part and part.Position or nil
        end
        local parent = inst.Parent
        if parent then
            return instancePosition(parent)
        end
        return nil
    end

    local function localChickynoidPosition(CM)
        local state = CM
            and CM.localChickynoid
            and CM.localChickynoid.simulation
            and CM.localChickynoid.simulation.state
        if state and typeof(state.pos) == "Vector3" then
            return state.pos, state
        end
        if state and typeof(state.position) == "Vector3" then
            return state.position, state
        end
        local char = LocalPlayer.Character
        local root = char and char:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
        return root and root.Position or nil, state
    end

    local function soundIsActive(sound)
        if typeof(sound) ~= "Instance" or not sound:IsA("Sound") then
            return false
        end
        local playing = false
        pcall(function()
            playing = sound.Playing == true or sound.IsPlaying == true
        end)
        return playing
    end

    local function katanaAbilitySignalNear(inst, myPos, range, requireActive)
        if not myPos or typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then
            return false
        end
        if not isKatanaAbilitySignal(inst) then
            return false
        end
        if requireActive and not soundIsActive(inst) then
            return false
        end
        if not isWorldCombatFx(inst) then
            return false
        end
        local pos = instancePosition(inst)
        return typeof(pos) == "Vector3" and (pos - myPos).Magnitude <= range
    end

    local function scanKatanaAbilitySounds(myPos, range)
        local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
        local roots = {
            world and world:FindFirstChild("FX"),
            Workspace:FindFirstChild("VFX"),
            Workspace:FindFirstChild("FX"),
        }
        for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
            if root then
                for _, inst in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
                    if katanaAbilitySignalNear(inst, myPos, range, true) then
                        return true, inst.Name
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        return false, nil
    end

    local function statePosition(charData)
        if type(charData.characterData) == "table" and typeof(charData.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
            return charData.characterData.pos, charData.characterData
        end
        if typeof(charData.position) == "Vector3" then
            return charData.position, charData.characterData or charData
        end
        if typeof(charData.pos) == "Vector3" then
            return charData.pos, charData
        end
        return nil, charData.characterData or charData
    end

    local function recentAbilityTime(state, prefix, serverTime, blockSeconds)
        local keys = {
            "lastDeflectServerTime",
            "deflectStartServerTime",
            "lastParryServerTime",
            "parryStartServerTime",
            "lastCounterServerTime",
            "counterStartServerTime",
            "blockAbilityStartServerTime",
        }
        for _, suffix in ipairs(keys) do
            local value = tonumber(state[prefix .. suffix])
            if value and value > 0 and serverTime then
                local age = serverTime - value
                if age >= -0.08 and age <= blockSeconds + 0.12 then
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
        return false
    end

    local function katanaActionActive(state, serverTime)
        if type(state) ~= "table" then
            return false
        end
        local blockSeconds = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.AntiKatanaBlockSeconds) or 0.45, 0.05, 5)
        for slot = 1, 4 do
            local prefix = "slot" .. slot .. "_"
            local weaponId = state[prefix .. "weaponID"] or state[prefix .. "itemID"] or state[prefix .. "name"]
            local meleeLike = isMeleeLikeWeapon(weaponId)
            if meleeLike and recentAbilityTime(state, prefix, serverTime, blockSeconds) then
                return true
            end
        end
        for key, value in pairs(state) do
            local lowerKey = string.lower(tostring(key))
            if isKatanaAbilityStateKey(lowerKey)
                and tonumber(value)
                and serverTime then
                local age = serverTime - tonumber(value)
                if age >= -0.08 and age <= blockSeconds + 0.12 then
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
        return false
    end

    local fxAddedConn = Workspace.DescendantAdded:Connect(function(inst)
        if not Config.AntiKatana or not State.Alive then return end
        pcall(function()
            local CM = getChickynoidCM()
            local myPos = localChickynoidPosition(CM)
            local range = (tonumber(Config.AntiKatanaRange) or 500) + 4
            if katanaAbilitySignalNear(inst, myPos, range, false) then
                setAntiKatanaShootBlock("katana ability sound", 0.45)
            end
        end)
    end)
    table.insert(State.Connections, fxAddedConn)

    local nextFxScan = 0
    antiKatanaConn = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
        if not Config.AntiKatana or not State.Alive then return end
        pcall(function()
            local CM = getChickynoidCM()
            if not CM or not CM.characters or not CM.localChickynoid then return end
            local myPos, myState = localChickynoidPosition(CM)
            if not myPos then return end
            myState = myState or {}
            local serverTime = tonumber(myState.serverTime) or tonumber(myState.serverGameTime)
            local range = tonumber(Config.AntiKatanaRange) or 500

            local now = os.clock()
            if now >= nextFxScan then
                nextFxScan = now + 0.08
                local foundFx = false
                local fxName = nil
                foundFx, fxName = scanKatanaAbilitySounds(myPos, range + 4)
                if foundFx then
                    setAntiKatanaShootBlock("katana ability: " .. tostring(fxName or "sound"), 0.2)
                    return
                end
            end

            for uid, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
                if type(charData) == "table" and not charData.localPlayer then
                    local pos, cd = statePosition(charData)
                    if typeof(pos) == "Vector3" and type(cd) == "table" and (pos - myPos).Magnitude <= range then
                        local actionServerTime = serverTime or tonumber(cd.serverTime) or tonumber(cd.serverGameTime)
                        if katanaActionActive(charData, actionServerTime) or katanaActionActive(cd, actionServerTime) then
                            setAntiKatanaShootBlock("nearby katana ability", 0.45)
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end))
    table.insert(State.Connections, antiKatanaConn)
end

-- CHAMS: Handled by companion Drawing ESP script (no Highlight instances = no AC flag)
-- The clean ESP script uses Drawing API for chams which is undetectable.

-- Character-tab movement/melee runtime removed.

createGui()

-- Autoload config (works in both Linoria and fallback UI modes)
local function applyAutoloadConfigFromDisk()
    local CONFIG_ROOT = "IronFrost/IronFrost"
    local AUTOLOAD_FILE = CONFIG_ROOT .. "/autoload.json"
    local function startupDisabledMarker(path)
        if type(readfile) ~= "function" then
            return false
        end
        local okRead, value = pcall(readfile, path)
        return okRead and tostring(value or "") == "__disabled__"
    end
    local function decodeAutoloadValue(value)
        if type(value) ~= "table" then
            return value
        end
        if value.__type == "Color3" then
            return Color3.new(tonumber(value.r) or 0, tonumber(value.g) or 0, tonumber(value.b) or 0)
        elseif value.__type == "EnumItem" then
            local enumName = tostring(value.enumType or ""):match("Enum%.(.+)") or tostring(value.enumType or "")
            local itemName = tostring(value.name or "")
            if enumName and Enum[enumName] then
                local okEnum, enumValue = pcall(function()
                    return Enum[enumName][itemName]
                end)
                if okEnum then
                    return enumValue
                end
            end
            return nil
        end
        local out = {}
        for key, nested in pairs(value) do
            local numberKey = tonumber(key)
            out[numberKey or key] = decodeAutoloadValue(nested)
        end
        return out
    end

    if type(readfile) ~= "function" then
        State.AutoloadStatus = "readfile unavailable"
        return false
    end
    if startupDisabledMarker(CONFIG_ROOT .. "/settings/autoload.txt") then
        State.AutoloadStatus = "autoload disabled"
        return false
    end
    local autoloadPath = AUTOLOAD_FILE
    if type(isfile) == "function" then
        local okExists, exists = pcall(isfile, autoloadPath)
        if not okExists or not exists then
            State.AutoloadStatus = "autoload file missing"
            return false
        end
    end

    local okRead, raw = pcall(readfile, autoloadPath)
    if not okRead or not raw then
        State.AutoloadStatus = "autoload read failed"
        return false
    end
    local okDecode, payload = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:JSONDecode(raw)
    end)
    if not okDecode or type(payload) ~= "table" or type(payload.config) ~= "string" or payload.config == "" then
        State.AutoloadStatus = "autoload payload invalid"
        return false
    end

    local configName = payload.config
    Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = configName
    local configPath = CONFIG_ROOT .. "/configs/" .. configName .. ".json"
    if type(isfile) == "function" then
        local okConfigExists, configExists = pcall(isfile, configPath)
        if not okConfigExists or not configExists then
            State.AutoloadStatus = "config missing: " .. configName
            return false
        end
    end
    local okCRead, configRaw = pcall(readfile, configPath)
    if not okCRead or not configRaw then
        State.AutoloadStatus = "config read failed: " .. configName
        return false
    end
    local okCDecode, configPayload = pcall(function()
        return HttpService:JSONDecode(configRaw)
    end)
    local configData = okCDecode and type(configPayload) == "table" and (configPayload.config or configPayload) or nil
    if type(configData) ~= "table" then
        State.AutoloadStatus = "config payload invalid: " .. configName
        return false
    end

    for key, value in pairs(configData) do
        if Config[key] ~= nil and not SENSITIVE_CONFIG_KEYS[key] then
            local decoded = decodeAutoloadValue(value)
            if decoded ~= nil then
                Config[key] = decoded
            end
        end
    end
    Config.TeleportAutorunFile = "IronFrost/IronFrost/autorun.lua"
    Config.TeleportAutoloadDisabledFile = "IronFrost/IronFrost/teleport_autoload_disabled.txt"
    Config.ForceMouseVisible = true
    Config.SettingsConfigName = configName
    Config.SettingsAutoloadConfig = configName
    Config.WorldShaderPreset = normalizeWorldShaderPreset(Config.WorldShaderPreset)
    Config.WorldShaderStrength = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.WorldShaderStrength) or 100, 0, 100)
    State.AutoloadStatus = "applied: " .. configName
    State.AutoloadAppliedAt = os.clock()
    if State.SyncLinoriaControls then pcall(State.SyncLinoriaControls) end
    if updateUIControls then updateUIControls() end
    return true
end

-- Keep disk autoload working before Linoria's SaveManager gets a chance to sync its controls.
pcall(applyAutoloadConfigFromDisk)
if State.SyncLinoriaControls then pcall(State.SyncLinoriaControls) end
if updateUIControls then pcall(updateUIControls) end

-- Lazy-start exploit systems when their config toggles are first enabled
local function checkExploitToggles()
    if Config.AntiKatana and not antiKatanaConn then installAntiKatana() end
end
connect(RunService.Heartbeat, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if State.Alive then
        checkExploitToggles()
        State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(false)
    end
end))

-- Persistent World-tab bridge.  This merged UI has more than one local Config
-- table; the fallback/Linoria controls write the first one while an older
-- renderer can read another.  Keep every World table synchronized from the
-- UI-owned table and apply the effect values from that single source.
task.spawn(function()
    if type(getgc) ~= "function" then return end
    local configs = {}
    for _, value in ipairs(getgc(true)) do
        if type(value) == "table"
            and type(rawget(value, "WorldFOV")) == "number"
            and type(rawget(value, "WorldBloomIntensity")) == "number"
            and type(rawget(value, "WorldColorCorrectionEnabled")) == "boolean" then
            configs[#configs + 1] = value
        end
    end
    local source = Config
    if not source then return end

    local fields = {
        "WorldColorCorrectionEnabled", "WorldSaturation", "WorldContrast", "WorldBrightness",
        "WorldGlobalShadows", "WorldFOVChanger", "WorldFOV", "WorldBlur",
        "WorldBloomEnabled", "WorldBloomIntensity", "WorldBloomSize", "WorldBloomThreshold",
        "WorldShaderEnabled", "WorldShaderPreset", "WorldShaderStrength",
    }
    local effects = {}
    local function ownedEffect(className, name)
        local item = effects[name]
        if item and item.Parent and item.ClassName == className then
            return item
        end
        item = Lighting:FindFirstChild(name)
        if item and item.ClassName == className then
            effects[name] = item
            return item
        end
        if item then item:Destroy() end
        item = Instance.new(className)
        item.Name = name
        item.Parent = Lighting
        effects[name] = item
        return item
    end

    State.WorldBridgeOwnsVisuals = true
    local lastGuiUpdate = 0
    local lastWorldUpdate = 0
    local worldConnection = RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
        if not State.Alive then return end
        local clock = os.clock()
        local uiInterval = math.max(0.03, tonumber(source.UIRefreshRate) or 0.08)
        if clock - lastGuiUpdate >= uiInterval then
            lastGuiUpdate = clock
            updateGui()
        end
        local worldInterval = math.max(0.1, tonumber(source.WorldBridgeRate) or 0.25)
        if clock - lastWorldUpdate < worldInterval then
            return
        end
        lastWorldUpdate = clock
        for index = 2, #configs do
            for _, field in ipairs(fields) do configs[index][field] = source[field] end
        end
        local cc = ownedEffect("ColorCorrectionEffect", "IronFrostColorCorrection")
        cc.Enabled = source.WorldColorCorrectionEnabled == true
        cc.Saturation = tonumber(source.WorldSaturation) or 0
        cc.Contrast = tonumber(source.WorldContrast) or 0
        cc.Brightness = tonumber(source.WorldBrightness) or 0
        local bloom = ownedEffect("BloomEffect", "IronFrostBloom")
        bloom.Enabled = source.WorldBloomEnabled == true
        bloom.Intensity = tonumber(source.WorldBloomIntensity) or 0.6
        bloom.Size = tonumber(source.WorldBloomSize) or 26
        bloom.Threshold = tonumber(source.WorldBloomThreshold) or 0.4
        local blur = ownedEffect("BlurEffect", "IronFrostBlur")
        blur.Size = math.clamp(tonumber(source.WorldBlur) or 0, 0, 24)
        blur.Enabled = blur.Size > 0
        Lighting.GlobalShadows = source.WorldGlobalShadows == true
        local cam = Workspace.CurrentCamera
        if cam and source.WorldFOVChanger then
            cam.FieldOfView = math.clamp(tonumber(source.WorldFOV) or 70, 40, 120)
        end
        applyWorldShaderVisuals(source)
    end))
    table.insert(State.Connections, worldConnection)
end)

-- removed legacy installOverkillHook
-- removed legacy installCommandBaseHook
-- removed legacy installCommandLayoutHook
if Config.GenericRayHooks then
    -- removed legacy installGenericHooks
end
pcall(function()
    RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(AIM_BIND_NAME)
    RunService:BindToRenderStep(AIM_BIND_NAME, Enum.RenderPriority.Camera.Value - 1, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
        if State.Alive then
            runAimAssist()
        end
    end))
end)
pcall(function()
    RunService:UnbindFromRenderStep(State.MouseBindName)
    RunService:BindToRenderStep(State.MouseBindName, 100000, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
        if State.Alive then
            State.RestoreGameMouseIcon(false)
        end
    end))
end)
updateGui()

local getChickynoidCM = _G.__IronFrost_getChickynoidCM or function() return nil end
-- XenoSilentAim_Client.lua
-- Standalone client-side silent aim / target selector for owned private testing.
-- Controls: RightAlt toggles silent aim, End cleanup/unload.
-- Defaults: targets named dummies/NPC test rigs and rewrites OVERKILL/Chickynoid command pitch/yaw while firing.

local Config = {
    Enabled = true,
    ToggleKey = Enum.KeyCode.RightAlt,
    CleanupKey = Enum.KeyCode.End,

    TargetNamedDummies = true,
    TargetOtherNPCs = true,
    TargetPlayers = false,
    AuthorizedPlayersOnly = false,
    AuthorizedUserIds = {},
    TeamCheck = false,

    PreferNamedDummies = false,
    RequireOnScreen = true,
    FOVRadius = 900,
    HitChance = 100,
    MaxDistance = 5000,
    TargetMode = "Crosshair", -- Crosshair, Nearest
    TargetCacheSeconds = 0.18,
    TargetRefreshRate = 0.08,
    HookTargetMaxAge = 0.18,
    HeartbeatShadowMinInterval = 0.016,
    CommandAngleCacheSeconds = 0.008,
    CommandRewriteCacheSeconds = 0.014,
    CommandRewriteCloneCacheSeconds = 0.006,
    PredictionSeconds = 0.035,
    LivePositionLead = 0.035,
    ShotTargetLockSeconds = 0.14,
    ImmediateShotRefreshCooldown = 0.04,
    FireRewriteGraceSeconds = 0.12,
    SniperCheckInterval = 0.25,
    DeathCheck = true,
    AimPartNames = {
        "HitboxHead",
        "Head",
        "UpperTorso",
        "HumanoidRootPart",
    },

    -- Head offset for Chickynoid targets (studs above sim position)
    -- Measured: HitboxHead center = HRP + 1.57, HitboxTorso = HRP, HitboxLeg = HRP - 2.01
    -- Half-heights: Head 1.0, Torso 1.125, Leg 0.935. Full span: 5.52 studs
    ChickynoidHeadOffset    = 1.57,   -- standing: HitboxHead center (measured)
    ChickynoidCrouchOffset  = 0.1,    -- crouching: head near root, nudge up
    ChickynoidSlideOffset   = -0.5,   -- sliding: head below root

    OnlyWhileFiring = true,
    -- Weapon mod keys (synced from main config by bridge loop)
    GunAutoFireTest = false,
    GunRapidFireTest = false,
    GunRapidFireScale = 6,
    GunRapidFireRPM = 900,
    GunNoSpreadTest = false,
    GunNoRecoilTest = false,
    GunForceAim = false,
    ForcePrimaryFire = false,
    SniperScopeCheck = true,
    SniperScopeDelayMs = 445,
    HookGenerateCommand = true,
    HookCommandBase = true,
    HookCommandLayout = true,
    HookHeartbeatAimShadow = true,
    HookGcCommandTables = false,
    GenericRayHook = false,
    WallbangTest = false,
    ForceAimButton = false,
    AimAssistEnabled = false,
    ForceAdsFields = false,
    SelfRepairHooks = false,
    SelfRepairInterval = 8.0,
    GcHookRescanInterval = 45.0,

    ShowStatus = false,
    ShowHighlight = false,
    Debug = true,
}

local RUN_KEY = "XenoSilentAimPrivate_v3"
local OLD_KEYS = {
    "XenoSilentAimPrivate_v3",
    "IronFrost_IronFrost_v2",
    "IronFrostOverkillSilentRemoteHook",
}

for _, key in ipairs(OLD_KEYS) do
    local old = rawget(_G, key)
    if type(old) == "table" and type(old.Cleanup) == "function" then
        pcall(old.Cleanup)
    elseif type(old) == "function" then
        pcall(old)
    end
    rawset(_G, key, nil)
end

local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local Workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local ReplicatedFirst = game:GetService("ReplicatedFirst")
local ReplicatedStorage = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local RunService = game:GetService("RunService")
local CoreGui = game:GetService("CoreGui")

local LocalPlayer = Players.LocalPlayer
local unpackArgs = table.unpack or unpack

local State = {
    Alive = true,
    Config = Config,
    Connections = {},
    Instances = {},
    Restores = {},
    HookedTables = {},
    Internal = {},
    CurrentTarget = nil,
    CurrentTargetAt = 0,
    LastTargetRefresh = 0,
    TargetRefreshBusy = false,
    ShotTarget = nil,
    ShotTargetUntil = 0,
    LastForcedShotRefreshAt = 0,
    FireRewriteUntil = 0,
    LastCommandFiring = false,
    LastCommandFiringCmd = nil,
    LastHeartbeatShadowAt = 0,
    LastAngleTarget = nil,
    LastAngleAt = 0,
    LastAnglePitch = nil,
    LastAngleYaw = nil,
    LastCommandSelf = nil,
    LastSilent = nil,
    TestFireUntil = 0,
    Modules = {},
    PlayerByUserId = nil,
    PlayerByUserIdAt = 0,
    SniperWeaponCacheAt = 0,
    SniperWeaponCache = false,
    DeathCache = setmetatable({}, { __mode = "k" }),
    Stats = {
        TargetsSeen = 0,
        LastTarget = "none",
        LastSource = "none",
        LastError = "",
        Hooks = 0,
        GcHooks = 0,
        Rewrites = 0,
        AimForces = 0,
        AimShadows = 0,
        HookRepairs = 0,
        RayRedirects = 0,
        CommandsSeen = 0,
        LastRapidFire = 0,
        LastRewriteAt = 0,
        LastRepairAt = 0,
        LastShootHeld = false,
    },
}

_G[RUN_KEY] = State
_G.XenoSilentAimPrivate = State
State.Internal[State] = true
State.Internal[State.Config] = true
State.Internal[State.Connections] = true
State.Internal[State.Instances] = true
State.Internal[State.Restores] = true
State.Internal[State.HookedTables] = true
State.Internal[State.Internal] = true
State.Internal[State.Modules] = true
State.Internal[State.Stats] = true

local function log(...) end

local function setError(message)
    State.Stats.LastError = tostring(message or "")
    if Config.Debug and message and message ~= "" then
        warn("[IronFrost]", message)
    end
end

local function trackConnection(conn)
    table.insert(State.Connections, conn)
    return conn
end

local function trackInstance(inst)
    table.insert(State.Instances, inst)
    return inst
end

local function addRestore(fn)
    table.insert(State.Restores, fn)
end

local function camera()
    return Workspace.CurrentCamera
end

local function tryRequire(fn)
    local ok, value = pcall(fn)
    if ok then
        return value
    end
    return nil
end

local function getReplicatedFirstPath(path)
    local node = ReplicatedFirst
    for token in string.gmatch(path, "[^%.]+") do
        node = node and node:FindFirstChild(token)
    end
    return node
end

local function getEyeOrigin()
    if State.Modules.EyeOrigin ~= nil then
        return State.Modules.EyeOrigin ~= false and State.Modules.EyeOrigin or nil
    end

    State.Modules.EyeOrigin = tryRequire(function()
        return require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Shared.EyeOrigin)
    end) or false

    return State.Modules.EyeOrigin ~= false and State.Modules.EyeOrigin or nil
end

local function getCommandHelpers()
    if State.Modules.CommandHelpers ~= nil then
        return State.Modules.CommandHelpers ~= false and State.Modules.CommandHelpers or nil
    end

    State.Modules.CommandHelpers = tryRequire(function()
        return require(ReplicatedFirst.Packages.Chickynoid.Shared.Simulation.CommandHelpers)
    end) or tryRequire(function()
        return require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Shared.Simulation.CommandHelpers)
    end) or false

    return State.Modules.CommandHelpers ~= false and State.Modules.CommandHelpers or nil
end

local function getInputHandler()
    if State.Modules.InputHandler ~= nil then
        return State.Modules.InputHandler ~= false and State.Modules.InputHandler or nil
    end

    State.Modules.InputHandler = tryRequire(function()
        return require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Handlers.InputHandler)
    end) or false

    return State.Modules.InputHandler ~= false and State.Modules.InputHandler or nil
end

local function getCameraHandler()
    if State.Modules.CameraHandler ~= nil then
        return State.Modules.CameraHandler ~= false and State.Modules.CameraHandler or nil
    end

    State.Modules.CameraHandler = tryRequire(function()
        return require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Handlers.CameraHandler)
    end) or false

    return State.Modules.CameraHandler ~= false and State.Modules.CameraHandler or nil
end

local function getNeuron()
    if State.Modules.Neuron ~= nil then
        return State.Modules.Neuron ~= false and State.Modules.Neuron or nil
    end

    State.Modules.Neuron = tryRequire(function()
        return require(ReplicatedFirst.neuron)
    end) or false

    return State.Modules.Neuron ~= false and State.Modules.Neuron or nil
end

local bitBand = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(a, b)
    if bit32 then
        return bit32.band(a, b)
    end
    local result = 0
    local bit = 1
    while a > 0 or b > 0 do
        local aa = a % 2
        local bb = b % 2
        if aa == 1 and bb == 1 then
            result = result + bit
        end
        a = math.floor(a / 2)
        b = math.floor(b / 2)
        bit = bit * 2
    end
    return result
end)

local bitBor = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(a, b)
    if bit32 then
        return bit32.bor(a, b)
    end
