    local result = 0
    local bit = 1
    while a > 0 or b > 0 do
        local aa = a % 2
        local bb = b % 2
        if aa == 1 or bb == 1 then
            result = result + bit
        end
        a = math.floor(a / 2)
        b = math.floor(b / 2)
        bit = bit * 2
    end
    return result
end)

local primaryMask = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local helpers = getCommandHelpers()
    return helpers and tonumber(helpers.BTN_PRIMARY) or 1
end)

local secondaryMask = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local helpers = getCommandHelpers()
    return helpers and tonumber(helpers.BTN_SECONDARY) or 2
end)

local suppressPrimaryFire = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if type(cmd) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    local primary = primaryMask() or 1
    local buttons = tonumber(cmd.buttons) or 0
    if bitBand(buttons, primary) ~= 0 then
        cmd.buttons = buttons - primary
    end
    cmd.fire = 0
    cmd.shooting = false
    cmd.primary = false
    cmd.isFiring = false
    State.Stats.LastShootHeld = false
    return true
end)


local stabilizeFiringCommand = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if type(cmd) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    if Config.ForceAimButton then
        cmd.buttons = bitBor(tonumber(cmd.buttons) or 0, secondaryMask())
    end
    if Config.ForceAdsFields then
        cmd.aiming = true
        cmd.ads = true
        cmd.scoped = true
    end
    -- No spread/recoil/auto fire handled via weapon stat modification + GenerateCommand hook

    -- DO NOT zero spread/bloom/recoil normally: server validates these against weapon
    -- stats. Zeroed values on a weapon with inherent spread = instant flag.
    -- (We apply it above only when explicitly toggled on by user)
    State.Stats.AimForces = State.Stats.AimForces + 1
    return true
end)

local testBurstActive = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    return os.clock() < (tonumber(State.TestFireUntil) or 0)
end)

local forcePrimaryFire = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if type(cmd) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    cmd.buttons = bitBor(tonumber(cmd.buttons) or 0, primaryMask())
    stabilizeFiringCommand(cmd)
    cmd.fire = 1
    cmd.shooting = true
    cmd.primary = true
    State.Stats.LastShootHeld = true
    return true
end)

local fireRewriteGrace = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    return math.max(0.03, tonumber(Config.FireRewriteGraceSeconds) or 0.12)
end)

local markFireRewriteWindow = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    State.FireRewriteUntil = math.max(tonumber(State.FireRewriteUntil) or 0, os.clock() + fireRewriteGrace())
end)

local fireRewriteWindowActive = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    return os.clock() < (tonumber(State.FireRewriteUntil) or 0)
end)

local FIRE_STATE_KEYS = {
    "shooting", "primary", "isFiring", "firing", "firePressed",
    "shoot", "shootPressed", "primaryPressed", "mouse1", "mouse1Down",
    "pressedPrimary", "primaryDown", "isEdge", "fireEdge",
}

local commandHasFireInput = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if type(cmd) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    local buttons = tonumber(cmd.buttons) or 0
    if bitBand(buttons, primaryMask()) ~= 0 then
        State.Stats.LastShootHeld = true
        markFireRewriteWindow()
        return true
    end
    if (tonumber(cmd.fire) or 0) ~= 0 then
        State.Stats.LastShootHeld = true
        markFireRewriteWindow()
        return true
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(FIRE_STATE_KEYS) do
        local value = rawget(cmd, key)
        if value == true or (type(value) == "number" and value ~= 0) then
            State.Stats.LastShootHeld = true
            markFireRewriteWindow()
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end)

local shootHeld = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if commandHasFireInput(cmd) then
        return true
    end

    local inputHandler = getInputHandler()
    if inputHandler and type(inputHandler.IsPressed) == "function" then
        local ok, pressed = pcall(inputHandler.IsPressed, inputHandler, "Shoot")
        if ok and pressed then
            State.Stats.LastShootHeld = true
            markFireRewriteWindow()
            return true
        end
    end

    local okMouse, mouseDown = pcall(function()
        return UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1)
    end)
    State.Stats.LastShootHeld = okMouse and mouseDown == true
    if State.Stats.LastShootHeld then
        markFireRewriteWindow()
    end
    return State.Stats.LastShootHeld
end)

local commandFiring = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if type(cmd) == "table" and State.LastCommandFiringCmd == cmd then
        return State.LastCommandFiring == true
    end

    local firing = commandHasFireInput(cmd) or fireRewriteWindowActive()
    State.LastCommandFiringCmd = type(cmd) == "table" and cmd or nil
    State.LastCommandFiring = firing == true
    return State.LastCommandFiring
end)

local getHumanoid = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(model)
    if not model or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return nil
    end
    return model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
end)

local findPart = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(model, names)
    if not model then
        return nil
    end
    if model:IsA("BasePart") then
        return model
    end
    if not model:IsA("Model") then
        return nil
    end

    for _, name in ipairs(names) do
        local part = model:FindFirstChild(name, true)
        if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
            return part
        end
    end

    return model.PrimaryPart
end)

local getLocalModel = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local cam = camera()
    local subject = cam and cam.CameraSubject
    if subject and subject.Parent and subject.Parent:IsA("Model") then
        return subject.Parent
    end

    local neuron = getNeuron()
    if neuron and LocalPlayer then
        local ok, model = pcall(function()
            return neuron:get_character(LocalPlayer)
        end)
        if ok and typeof(model) == "Instance" and model:IsA("Model") then
            return model
        end
    end

    return LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character or nil
end)

local TEAM_KEYS = { "Team", "team", "TeamId", "teamId", "TeamID", "teamID", "Faction", "faction", "Side", "side" }
local HEALTH_KEYS = { "Health", "health", "HP", "hp", "CurrentHealth", "currentHealth", "CurrentHP", "currentHP", "Life", "life" }
local DEAD_KEYS = { "Dead", "dead", "IsDead", "isDead", "Killed", "killed", "Downed", "downed" }

local function getStatesModule()
    if State.Modules.States ~= nil then
        return State.Modules.States ~= false and State.Modules.States or nil
    end
    State.Modules.States = tryRequire(function()
        return require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.States)
    end) or false
    return State.Modules.States ~= false and State.Modules.States or nil
end

local function normalizedToken(value)
    if value == nil then return nil end
    local valueType = typeof(value)
    if valueType == "Instance" then return string.lower(value.Name) end
    if valueType == "BrickColor" then return string.lower(value.Name) end
    if valueType == "Color3" then return string.format("%.3f,%.3f,%.3f", value.R, value.G, value.B) end
    if type(value) == "string" or type(value) == "number" or type(value) == "boolean" then
        local text = string.lower(tostring(value))
        return text ~= "" and text or nil
    end
    return nil
end

local function instanceTeamToken(inst)
    if typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then return nil end
    if inst:IsA("Player") then
        local token = normalizedToken(inst.Team)
        if token then return token end
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(TEAM_KEYS) do
        local ok, value = pcall(function() return inst:GetAttribute(key) end)
        local token = ok and normalizedToken(value)
        if token then return token end
    end
    local leaderstats = inst:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
    if leaderstats then
        for _, key in ipairs(TEAM_KEYS) do
            local obj = leaderstats:FindFirstChild(key)
            local token = obj and normalizedToken(obj.Value)
            if token then return token end
        end
    end
    if inst:IsA("Player") and inst.Neutral == false then
        return normalizedToken(inst.TeamColor)
    end
    return nil
end

local function tableTeamToken(tbl)
    if type(tbl) ~= "table" then return nil end
    for _, key in ipairs(TEAM_KEYS) do
        local token = normalizedToken(tbl[key])
        if token then return token end
    end
    return nil
end

local gameplaySameTeam
do
    local checked, gameplayRef = false, nil
    local function gameplayHandler()
        if checked then return gameplayRef end
        checked = true
        pcall(function()
            local modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
            local handlers = modules and modules:FindFirstChild("Handlers")
            local gameplayScript = handlers and handlers:FindFirstChild("GameplayHandler")
            local gameplay = gameplayScript and require(gameplayScript)
            if type(gameplay) == "table" then gameplayRef = gameplay end
        end)
        return gameplayRef
    end
    local function sameTeam(a, b)
        if type(a) ~= "table" or type(b) ~= "table" then return false end
        if a == b then return true end
        local aId = a.id or a.ID or a.name or a.Name
        local bId = b.id or b.ID or b.name or b.Name
        return aId ~= nil and bId ~= nil and tostring(aId) == tostring(bId)
    end
    local function findTeam(duel, player)
        if type(duel) ~= "table" or type(duel.teams) ~= "table" or not player then return nil end
        for _, team in ipairs(duel.teams) do
            if type(team) == "table" and type(team.players) == "table" and table.find(team.players, player) then
                return team
            end
        end
        return nil
    end
    gameplaySameTeam = function(player)
        local gameplay = gameplayHandler()
        if type(gameplay) ~= "table" or not player then return nil end
        local okDuel, localDuel, localDuelId = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetLocalDuel() end)
        if not okDuel or type(localDuel) ~= "table" then return nil end
        local duelId = localDuel.id or localDuelId
        local okTargetDuel, targetDuelId = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetPlayerDuelId(player) end)
        if okTargetDuel and targetDuelId ~= nil and duelId ~= nil and tostring(targetDuelId) ~= tostring(duelId) then
            return false
        end
        local okTargetTeam, targetTeam = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetPlayerTeam(duelId, player) end)
        if not okTargetTeam then targetTeam = nil end
        targetTeam = targetTeam or findTeam(localDuel, player)
        local okLocalTeam, localTeam = pcall(function() return gameplay:GetPlayerTeam(duelId, LocalPlayer) end)
        if not okLocalTeam then localTeam = nil end
        localTeam = localTeam or findTeam(localDuel, LocalPlayer)
        if sameTeam(localTeam, targetTeam) then return true end
        if type(targetTeam) == "table" then
            if targetTeam.enemy == true then return false end
            if targetTeam.enemy == false then return true end
        end
        return nil
    end
end

local function playerSameTeam(player, targetState)
    if Config.TeamCheck ~= true or not player or player == LocalPlayer then return false end
    local gameplayResult = gameplaySameTeam(player)
    if gameplayResult ~= nil then return gameplayResult == true end
    local localToken = instanceTeamToken(LocalPlayer)
    local targetToken = instanceTeamToken(player) or tableTeamToken(targetState)
    return localToken ~= nil and targetToken ~= nil and localToken == targetToken
end

local function isAuthorizedPlayer(player)
    if not player or player == LocalPlayer then
        return false
    end
    if not Config.TargetPlayers then
        return false
    end
    -- AuthorizedUserIds filter: empty table = all players allowed
    if Config.AuthorizedPlayersOnly and type(Config.AuthorizedUserIds) == "table" and next(Config.AuthorizedUserIds) ~= nil then
        if not Config.AuthorizedUserIds[player.UserId] then
            return false
        end
    end
    if playerSameTeam(player) then
        return false
    end
    return true
end

local function stateLooksDead(state, depth)
    if type(state) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    depth = depth or 0
    for _, key in ipairs(DEAD_KEYS) do
        local value = state[key]
        if value == true or value == 1 or value == "true" then
            return true
        end
    end
    if state.Alive == false or state.alive == false then
        return true
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(HEALTH_KEYS) do
        local value = tonumber(state[key])
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

local function numericObjectValue(obj)
    if typeof(obj) ~= "Instance" then return nil end
    if obj:IsA("NumberValue") or obj:IsA("IntValue") then return tonumber(obj.Value) end
    if obj:IsA("StringValue") then return tonumber(obj.Value) end
    return nil
end

local function namedHealthObjectValue(inst, key)
    if typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then return nil end
    local value = numericObjectValue(inst:FindFirstChild(key))
    if value ~= nil then return value end
    for _, containerName in ipairs({ "Health", "HP", "Stats", "State" }) do
        local container = inst:FindFirstChild(containerName)
        if container then
            value = numericObjectValue(container:FindFirstChild(key))
            if value ~= nil then return value end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function instanceLooksDead(inst)
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true or typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then
        return false
    end
    local cache = State.DeathCache
    local clock = os.clock()
    local cached = cache and cache[inst]
    if cached and clock - cached.At <= 0.15 then
        return cached.Value == true
    end
    local function finish(value)
        if cache then
            cache[inst] = { At = clock, Value = value == true }
        end
        return value == true
    end
    local humanoid = inst:IsA("Humanoid") and inst or (inst:IsA("Model") and getHumanoid(inst) or nil)
    if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return finish(true)
    end
    local states = getStatesModule()
    if states then
        local okDead, dead = pcall(function() return states:GetStateValue(inst, "Dead", false) end)
        if okDead and dead == true then return finish(true) end
        for _, key in ipairs(HEALTH_KEYS) do
            local okHealth, health = pcall(function() return states:GetStateValue(inst, key, nil) end)
            health = okHealth and tonumber(health) or nil
            if health ~= nil and health <= 0 then return finish(true) end
        end
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(DEAD_KEYS) do
        local ok, value = pcall(function() return inst:GetAttribute(key) end)
        if ok and (value == true or value == 1 or value == "true") then
            return finish(true)
        end
    end
    local okAlive, alive = pcall(function() return inst:GetAttribute("Alive") end)
    if okAlive and alive == false then return finish(true) end
    for _, key in ipairs(HEALTH_KEYS) do
        local ok, value = pcall(function() return inst:GetAttribute(key) end)
        value = ok and tonumber(value) or nil
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then return finish(true) end
        value = namedHealthObjectValue(inst, key)
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then return finish(true) end
    end
    return finish(false)
end

local function chickynoidDataForPlayer(player)
    if not player then return nil, nil end
    local CM = getChickynoidCM()
    if not CM or type(CM.characters) ~= "table" then return nil, nil end
    local interp = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
    for uid, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
        if type(charData) == "table" and tonumber(charData.userId) == player.UserId then
            local stateRef = (type(interp) == "table" and type(interp[uid]) == "table" and interp[uid])
                or charData.characterData
                or charData
            return charData, stateRef
        end
    end
    return nil, nil
end

local function chickynoidPlayerAlive(player, charData, stateRef)
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true then
        return true
    end
    if player and playerSameTeam(player, stateRef) then
        return false
    end
    if player and not charData then
        charData, stateRef = chickynoidDataForPlayer(player)
    end
    local character = player and player.Character
    if not character and player then
        local neuron = getNeuron()
        if neuron and type(neuron.get_character) == "function" then
            local ok, model = pcall(function()
                return neuron:get_character(player)
            end)
            if ok and typeof(model) == "Instance" and model:IsA("Model") then
                character = model
            end
        end
    end
    local humanoid = character and getHumanoid(character)
    if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return false
    end
    if character and instanceLooksDead(character) then
        return false
    end
    if stateLooksDead(stateRef)
        or stateLooksDead(charData)
        or (type(charData) == "table" and stateLooksDead(charData.characterData)) then
        return false
    end
    return true
end

local function espEstimatedDead(model, player)
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true then
        return false
    end
    local host = (getgenv and getgenv()) or _G
    local esp = rawget(host, "XenoCleanDrawingESP_v1") or rawget(_G, "XenoCleanDrawingESP_v1")
    if type(esp) ~= "table" or type(esp.EstimatedHealth) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    local keys = {}
    if player then table.insert(keys, player) end
    if typeof(model) == "Instance" then table.insert(keys, model) end
    for _, key in ipairs(keys) do
        local value = tonumber(esp.EstimatedHealth[key])
        if value ~= nil and value <= 0 then
            local healthModel = type(esp.HealthModel) == "table" and esp.HealthModel[key] or nil
            if healthModel == nil or healthModel == model then
                return true
            end
        end
    end
    return false
end

local targetStillValid = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(target)
    if type(target) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    local player = target.ChickynoidPlayer
    local model = target.Model
    if not player and typeof(model) == "Instance" then
        if model:IsA("Player") then
            player = model
        elseif model:IsA("Model") then
            player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model)
        end
    end
    local part = target.Part
    if not player and typeof(part) == "Instance" then
        local userId = tonumber(part:GetAttribute("player"))
        if userId and userId > 0 then
            player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(userId)
        end
    end
    if player and playerSameTeam(player) then
        return false
    end
    if Config.DeathCheck ~= true then
        return true
    end
    if espEstimatedDead(model, player) then
        return false
    end
    if player and not chickynoidPlayerAlive(player) then
        return false
    end
    if typeof(model) == "Instance" and model:IsA("Model") and instanceLooksDead(model) then
        return false
    end
    if typeof(part) == "Instance" then
        local ownerModel = part:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
        if ownerModel and instanceLooksDead(ownerModel) then
            return false
        end
    end
    return true
end)

local isNamedDummy = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(model)
    if not model then
        return false
    end
    if model:GetAttribute("IsDummy") == true or model:GetAttribute("Dummy") == true then
        return true
    end
    local name = string.lower(model.Name or "")
    return string.find(name, "dummy", 1, true) ~= nil
        or string.find(name, "npc", 1, true) ~= nil
        or string.find(name, "target", 1, true) ~= nil
end)

local allowedModel = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(model)
    if not model or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return false
    end
    if model == getLocalModel() then
        return false
    end

    local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
    if not humanoid or humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return false
    end

    local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model)
    if player then
        return isAuthorizedPlayer(player)
    end

    local isDummy = isNamedDummy(model)

    if isDummy then
        return Config.TargetNamedDummies == true
    else
        return Config.TargetOtherNPCs == true
    end
end)

local addModel = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(candidates, model, source)
    if not allowedModel(model) then
        return
    end

    local partMode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Head")
    local aimPart = nil

    if partMode == "Whole Body" or partMode == "Random" then
        -- Pick the part closest to screen center for smooth tracking
        local cam = camera and camera() or workspace.CurrentCamera
        if cam then
            local center = cam.ViewportSize * 0.5
            local bestDist = math.huge
            for _, desc in ipairs(model:GetDescendants()) do
                if desc:IsA("BasePart") then
                    local screenPt, onScreen = cam:WorldToViewportPoint(desc.Position)
                    if onScreen and screenPt.Z > 0 then
                        local d = (Vector2.new(screenPt.X, screenPt.Y) - center).Magnitude
                        if d < bestDist then bestDist = d; aimPart = desc end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        if not aimPart then aimPart = findPart(model, Config.AimPartNames) end
    else
        -- Dummies have real R15 parts Ã¢â‚¬â€ findPart locates the exact body part
        aimPart = findPart(model, Config.AimPartNames)
    end

    if not aimPart then return end

    table.insert(candidates, {
        Model = model,
        Part = aimPart,
        Position = aimPart.Position,
        Source = source,
        NamedDummy = isNamedDummy(model),
    })
end)

local addRoot = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(candidates, root, source)
    if not root then
        return
    end
    for _, child in ipairs(root:GetChildren()) do
        addModel(candidates, child, source)
    end
end)

local collectTargets = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local candidates = {}
    local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    addRoot(candidates, world and world:FindFirstChild("Entities"), "World.Entities")
    addRoot(candidates, Workspace:FindFirstChild("ShootingRangeEntities"), "ShootingRangeEntities")
    addRoot(candidates, Workspace:FindFirstChild("NPCs"), "Workspace.NPCs")
    addRoot(candidates, Workspace:FindFirstChild("Dummies"), "Workspace.Dummies")

    if Config.TargetPlayers then
        -- Standard path (won't find anyone in Chickynoid, but keep for compat)
        for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if player ~= LocalPlayer and player.Character then
                addModel(candidates, player.Character, "Players")
            end
        end

        -- Chickynoid path: read positions from ClientModule.characters
        -- Use interpolated state when available for frame-accurate targeting
        pcall(function()
            local CM = getChickynoidCM()
            if CM and CM.characters then
                -- Pre-fetch the interpolated state table once (frame-accurate positions)
                local interpTable = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
                -- Build userIdÃ¢â€ â€™Player lookup once instead of O(nÃ‚Â²) nested loop
                local uidToPlayer = getPlayerByUserIdMap()

                for uid, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
                    if not charData.localPlayer and charData.userId then
                        local targetUserId = tonumber(charData.userId)
                        local targetPlayer = targetUserId and uidToPlayer[targetUserId] or uidToPlayer[charData.userId]
                        if targetPlayer and isAuthorizedPlayer(targetPlayer) then
                            -- Check team
                            if not playerSameTeam(targetPlayer, charData.characterData) then
                                -- 1. Resolve best available position source:
                                --    interpolated > characterData.pos > charData.position
                                local interp = interpTable and interpTable[uid]
                                local basePos = nil
                                local stateRef = nil  -- whichever table has crouching/moveState

                                if type(interp) == "table" and typeof(interp.pos) == "Vector3" then
                                    basePos  = interp.pos
                                    stateRef = interp
                                elseif type(charData.characterData) == "table" and typeof(charData.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
                                    basePos  = charData.characterData.pos
                                    stateRef = charData.characterData
                                elseif typeof(charData.position) == "Vector3" then
                                    basePos  = charData.position
                                    stateRef = charData.characterData
                                end

                                if basePos then
                                    -- 2. Account for stepUp (terrain walk offset)
                                    local stepUp = 0
                                    if stateRef and type(stateRef.stepUp) == "number" then
                                        stepUp = stateRef.stepUp
                                    end

                                    -- 3. Pick head offset based on stance and aim part
                                    -- Use AimPartMode directly (synced from UI) for correct body part detection
                                    local partMode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Head")
                                    local headYOffset = 1.57
                                    if partMode == "HumanoidRootPart" or partMode == "RootPart" or partMode == "HitboxRoot" or partMode == "Root" then
                                        headYOffset = 0
                                    elseif partMode == "UpperTorso" or partMode == "Torso" or partMode == "Chest" then
                                        headYOffset = 0.20
                                    elseif partMode == "LowerTorso" then
                                        headYOffset = -0.80
                                    elseif partMode == "Neck" then
                                        headYOffset = 1.13
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftUpperArm" or partMode == "RightUpperArm" or partMode == "Left Arm" or partMode == "Right Arm" then
                                        headYOffset = 0.36
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftLowerArm" or partMode == "RightLowerArm" then
                                        headYOffset = -0.23
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftHand" or partMode == "RightHand" then
                                        headYOffset = -0.85
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftUpperLeg" or partMode == "RightUpperLeg" or partMode == "Left Leg" or partMode == "Right Leg" then
                                        headYOffset = -1.43
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftLowerLeg" or partMode == "RightLowerLeg" then
                                        headYOffset = -2.21
                                    elseif partMode == "LeftFoot" or partMode == "RightFoot" then
                                        headYOffset = -2.85
                                    elseif partMode == "Whole Body" or partMode == "Random" then
                                        local wbCam = camera and camera() or workspace.CurrentCamera
                                        if wbCam and basePos then
                                            local camPos = wbCam.CFrame.Position
                                            local lookDir = wbCam.CFrame.LookVector
                                            local toTarget = basePos - camPos
                                            local t = toTarget:Dot(lookDir) / math.max(lookDir:Dot(lookDir), 0.001)
                                            headYOffset = math.clamp((camPos + lookDir * t).Y - basePos.Y, -2.85, 1.57)
                                        else
                                            headYOffset = 0
                                        end
                                    else
                                        -- Default: Head Ã¢â‚¬â€ adjust for crouch/slide stance
                                        if stateRef then
                                            if stateRef.crouching then
                                                headYOffset = Config.ChickynoidCrouchOffset
                                            elseif stateRef.moveState == 6 or stateRef.slideLatch then
                                                headYOffset = Config.ChickynoidSlideOffset
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end

                                    local headPos = basePos + Vector3.new(0, headYOffset + stepUp, 0)

                                    if chickynoidPlayerAlive(targetPlayer, charData, stateRef) then
                                        table.insert(candidates, {
                                            Model = targetPlayer,
                                            Part = nil,
                                            Position = headPos,
                                            Source = "Chickynoid",
                                            NamedDummy = false,
                                            ChickynoidCharacterId = uid,
                                            ChickynoidUserId = targetUserId or charData.userId,
                                            ChickynoidPlayer = targetPlayer,
                                        })
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    return candidates
end)

local chickynoidAimOffset = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(basePos, stateRef)
    local stepUp = 0
    if stateRef and type(stateRef.stepUp) == "number" then
        stepUp = stateRef.stepUp
    end

    local partMode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Head")
    local yOffset = 1.57
    if partMode == "HumanoidRootPart" or partMode == "RootPart" or partMode == "HitboxRoot" or partMode == "Root" then
        yOffset = 0
    elseif partMode == "UpperTorso" or partMode == "Torso" or partMode == "Chest" then
        yOffset = 0.20
    elseif partMode == "LowerTorso" then
        yOffset = -0.80
    elseif partMode == "Neck" then
        yOffset = 1.13
    elseif partMode == "LeftUpperArm" or partMode == "RightUpperArm" or partMode == "Left Arm" or partMode == "Right Arm" then
        yOffset = 0.36
    elseif partMode == "LeftLowerArm" or partMode == "RightLowerArm" then
        yOffset = -0.23
    elseif partMode == "LeftHand" or partMode == "RightHand" then
        yOffset = -0.85
    elseif partMode == "LeftUpperLeg" or partMode == "RightUpperLeg" or partMode == "Left Leg" or partMode == "Right Leg" then
        yOffset = -1.43
    elseif partMode == "LeftLowerLeg" or partMode == "RightLowerLeg" then
        yOffset = -2.21
    elseif partMode == "LeftFoot" or partMode == "RightFoot" then
        yOffset = -2.85
    elseif partMode == "Whole Body" or partMode == "Random" then
        local cam = camera()
        if cam and typeof(basePos) == "Vector3" then
            local camPos = cam.CFrame.Position
            local lookDir = cam.CFrame.LookVector
            local toTarget = basePos - camPos
            local t = toTarget:Dot(lookDir) / math.max(lookDir:Dot(lookDir), 0.001)
            yOffset = math.clamp((camPos + lookDir * t).Y - basePos.Y, -2.85, 1.57)
        else
            yOffset = 0
        end
    elseif stateRef then
        if stateRef.crouching then
            yOffset = Config.ChickynoidCrouchOffset
        elseif stateRef.moveState == 6 or stateRef.slideLatch then
            yOffset = Config.ChickynoidSlideOffset
        end
    end

    return Vector3.new(0, yOffset + stepUp, 0)
end)

local currentChickynoidTargetPosition = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(target)
    local CM = getChickynoidCM()
    if not CM or type(CM.characters) ~= "table" then
        return nil, nil
    end

    local targetUserId = tonumber(target.ChickynoidUserId)
    local characterId = target.ChickynoidCharacterId or targetUserId or target.ChickynoidUserId
    local charData = characterId and CM.characters[characterId] or nil
    if not charData and target.ChickynoidUserId then
        for uid, data in pairs(CM.characters) do
            local dataUserId = data and tonumber(data.userId)
            if data and ((targetUserId and dataUserId == targetUserId) or data.userId == target.ChickynoidUserId) then
                characterId = uid
                charData = data
                target.ChickynoidCharacterId = uid
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if not charData then
        return nil, nil
    end

    local interpTable = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
    local interp = interpTable and (interpTable[characterId] or interpTable[targetUserId] or interpTable[target.ChickynoidUserId])
    local basePos = nil
    local stateRef = nil
    if type(interp) == "table" and typeof(interp.pos) == "Vector3" then
        basePos = interp.pos
        stateRef = interp
    elseif type(charData.characterData) == "table" and typeof(charData.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
        basePos = charData.characterData.pos
        stateRef = charData.characterData
    elseif typeof(charData.position) == "Vector3" then
        basePos = charData.position
        stateRef = charData.characterData
    end
    if not basePos then
        return nil, nil
    end

    local velocity = nil
    if stateRef then
        if typeof(stateRef.vel) == "Vector3" then
            velocity = stateRef.vel
        elseif typeof(stateRef.velocity) == "Vector3" then
            velocity = stateRef.velocity
        end
    end

    return basePos + chickynoidAimOffset(basePos, stateRef), velocity
end)

local refreshCachedTargetPosition = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(target)
    if type(target) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end

    local rawPosition = nil
    local velocity = nil
    local part = target.Part
    if typeof(part) == "Instance" and part:IsA("BasePart") and part.Parent then
        rawPosition = part.Position
        velocity = part.AssemblyLinearVelocity
    elseif target.ChickynoidUserId then
        rawPosition, velocity = currentChickynoidTargetPosition(target)
    end
    if typeof(rawPosition) ~= "Vector3" then
        rawPosition = target.Position
    end
    if typeof(rawPosition) ~= "Vector3" then
        return nil
    end

    local clock = os.clock()
    local lastRaw = target.RawPosition
    local lastAt = tonumber(target.RawPositionAt)
    if typeof(velocity) ~= "Vector3" and typeof(lastRaw) == "Vector3" and lastAt then
        local dt = clock - lastAt
        if dt > 0.001 and dt < 0.5 then
            velocity = (rawPosition - lastRaw) / dt
        end
    end

    target.RawPosition = rawPosition
    target.RawPositionAt = clock
    if typeof(velocity) == "Vector3" then
        target.EstimatedVelocity = velocity
    else
        velocity = target.EstimatedVelocity
    end

    local lead = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.LivePositionLead) or tonumber(Config.PredictionSeconds) or 0, 0, 0.18)
    if typeof(velocity) == "Vector3" and lead > 0 then
        target.Position = rawPosition + velocity * lead
    else
        target.Position = rawPosition
    end

    return target.Position
end)

local hasNamedDummy = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(candidates)
    for _, candidate in ipairs(candidates) do
        if candidate.NamedDummy then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false

end)

local aimCenter = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local cam = camera()
    if not cam then
        return Vector2.new(0, 0)
    end
    local size = cam.ViewportSize
    return Vector2.new(size.X * 0.5, size.Y * 0.5)
end)

local acquireTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if not State.Alive or (not Config.Enabled and not aimbotKeyActive()) then
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        return nil
    end

    local cam = camera()
    if not cam then
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        return nil
    end

    local candidates = collectTargets()
    local preferDummyOnly = Config.PreferNamedDummies and hasNamedDummy(candidates)
    local center = aimCenter()
    local best = nil
    local bestScore = math.huge
    local seen = 0

    for _, candidate in ipairs(candidates) do
        if not targetStillValid(candidate) then
            continue
        end
        if not preferDummyOnly or candidate.NamedDummy then
            -- Resolve position: prefer computed Position (both Chickynoid and NPC targets)
            local pos = nil
            local part = candidate.Part
            if candidate.Position then
                pos = candidate.Position
            elseif part and part.Parent then
                pos = part.Position
            end

            if pos then
                seen = seen + 1
                local distance = (pos - cam.CFrame.Position).Magnitude
                if distance <= Config.MaxDistance then
                    local point, onScreen = cam:WorldToViewportPoint(pos)
                    if (not Config.RequireOnScreen or onScreen) and point.Z > 0 then
                        local screenDistance = (Vector2.new(point.X, point.Y) - center).Magnitude
                        if screenDistance <= Config.FOVRadius then
                            local score = screenDistance
                            if Config.TargetMode == "Nearest" then
                                score = distance
                            end
                            if candidate.NamedDummy then
                                score = score - 100000
                            end
                            if Config.StickyAim and State.CurrentTarget and candidate.Model == State.CurrentTarget.Model then
                                if aimbotKeyActive() then
                                    score = score - 50000 -- massive bonus for sticky target
                                end
                            end

                            if score < bestScore then
                                bestScore = score
                                best = {
                                    Model = candidate.Model,
                                    Part = part,
                                    Position = pos,
                                    RawPosition = pos,
                                    RawPositionAt = os.clock(),
                                    ScreenDistance = screenDistance,
                                    WorldDistance = distance,
                                    Source = candidate.Source,
                                    NamedDummy = candidate.NamedDummy,
                                    ChickynoidCharacterId = candidate.ChickynoidCharacterId,
                                    ChickynoidUserId = candidate.ChickynoidUserId,
                                    ChickynoidPlayer = candidate.ChickynoidPlayer,
                                }
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    State.Stats.TargetsSeen = seen
    State.CurrentTarget = best
    State.CurrentTargetAt = os.clock()
    if best then
        local modelName = best.ChickynoidPlayer and best.ChickynoidPlayer.Name or (typeof(best.Model) == "Instance" and best.Model.Name or "?")
        local partName = best.Part and best.Part.Name or "pos"
        State.Stats.LastTarget = modelName .. "." .. partName
        State.Stats.LastSource = best.Source
    else
        State.Stats.LastTarget = "none"
        State.Stats.LastSource = "none"
    end
    return best
end)

local cachedTargetOnly = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(maxAge)
    local clock = os.clock()
    local external = State.ExternalTarget
    if type(external) == "table"
        and clock < (tonumber(State.ExternalTargetLockUntil) or 0)
        and typeof(external.Model) == "Instance"
        and external.Model.Parent
        and (external.Part == nil or external.Part.Parent) then
        if targetStillValid(external) then
            refreshCachedTargetPosition(external)
            State.CurrentTarget = external
            State.CurrentTargetAt = clock
            return external
        end
        State.ExternalTarget = nil
        State.ExternalTargetLockUntil = 0
    end

    local target = State.CurrentTarget
    if target and clock - (tonumber(State.CurrentTargetAt) or 0) <= (maxAge or 0.35) then
        if targetStillValid(target) then
            refreshCachedTargetPosition(target)
            return target
        end
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        State.CurrentTargetAt = 0
    end

    return nil
end)

local refreshTargetCache = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(force)
    local clock = os.clock()
    local interval = math.max(0.05, tonumber(Config.TargetRefreshRate) or 0.12)
    if State.TargetRefreshBusy then
        return cachedTargetOnly(tonumber(Config.HookTargetMaxAge) or 0.35)
    end
    if not force and clock - (tonumber(State.LastTargetRefresh) or 0) < interval then
        return cachedTargetOnly(tonumber(Config.HookTargetMaxAge) or 0.35)
    end

    State.LastTargetRefresh = clock
    State.TargetRefreshBusy = true
    local ok, target = pcall(acquireTarget)
    State.TargetRefreshBusy = false
    if ok then
        return target
    end
    State.Stats.LastError = "target refresh failed: " .. tostring(target)
    return cachedTargetOnly(tonumber(Config.HookTargetMaxAge) or 0.35)
end)

local getHookTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    return cachedTargetOnly(tonumber(Config.HookTargetMaxAge) or 0.35)
end)

local getTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local cacheSeconds = math.max(0.03, tonumber(Config.TargetCacheSeconds) or 0.08)
    local cached = cachedTargetOnly(cacheSeconds)
    if cached then
        return cached
    end
    return refreshTargetCache(true)
end)

local getShotTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    local clock = os.clock()
    local firing = State.LastCommandFiring == true or fireRewriteWindowActive()
    local lockSeconds = math.max(0.04, tonumber(Config.ShotTargetLockSeconds) or 0.22)

    if firing then
        local locked = State.ShotTarget
        if locked and clock < (tonumber(State.ShotTargetUntil) or 0) and targetStillValid(locked) then
            refreshCachedTargetPosition(locked)
            return locked
        end
    end

    local target = getHookTarget()
    local targetAge = target and (clock - (tonumber(State.CurrentTargetAt) or 0)) or math.huge
    local refreshCooldown = math.max(0.02, tonumber(Config.ImmediateShotRefreshCooldown) or 0.045)
    local forcedRefreshAge = math.max(0.055, refreshCooldown)
    if firing and (not target or targetAge > forcedRefreshAge) then
        if clock - (tonumber(State.LastForcedShotRefreshAt) or 0) >= refreshCooldown then
            State.LastForcedShotRefreshAt = clock
            target = refreshTargetCache(true) or target
        end
    end

    if target and firing then
        State.ShotTarget = target
        State.ShotTargetUntil = clock + lockSeconds
    elseif not firing and clock >= (tonumber(State.ShotTargetUntil) or 0) then
        State.ShotTarget = nil
    end

    return target
end)

local simulationStateFor = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
    if type(self) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    local client = rawget(self, "client") or self
    if type(client) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    local chickynoid = rawget(client, "localChickynoid") or client.localChickynoid
    local simulation = chickynoid and chickynoid.simulation
    return simulation and simulation.state or nil
end)

local commandOrigin = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self)
    local simState = simulationStateFor(self)
        or simulationStateFor(State.LastCommandSelf)
        or simulationStateFor(State.ClientModule)
    local eyeOrigin = getEyeOrigin()
    if eyeOrigin and type(eyeOrigin.getAuthoritative) == "function" and simState then
        local ok, origin = pcall(eyeOrigin.getAuthoritative, simState)
        if ok and typeof(origin) == "Vector3" then
            return origin
        end
    end

    local cam = camera()
    return cam and cam.CFrame.Position or nil
end)

local angleToTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(origin, targetPosition)
    if typeof(origin) ~= "Vector3" or typeof(targetPosition) ~= "Vector3" then
        return nil, nil
    end
    local direction = targetPosition - origin
    if direction.Magnitude <= 0.001 then
        return nil, nil
    end
    direction = direction.Unit
    local pitch = math.asin(math.clamp(direction.Y, -1, 1))
    local yaw = math.atan2(-direction.X, -direction.Z)
    return pitch, yaw
end)

local cachedAngleToTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(origin, target)
    if type(target) ~= "table" or typeof(target.Position) ~= "Vector3" then
        return nil, nil
    end
    local position = target.Position
    local clock = os.clock()
    local maxAge = math.max(0, tonumber(Config.CommandAngleCacheSeconds) or 0.008)
    local lastOrigin = State.LastAngleOrigin
    local lastPosition = State.LastAnglePosition
    local sameOrigin = typeof(lastOrigin) == "Vector3" and typeof(origin) == "Vector3" and (lastOrigin - origin).Magnitude <= 0.02
    local samePosition = typeof(lastPosition) == "Vector3" and (lastPosition - position).Magnitude <= 0.02
    if State.LastAngleTarget == target
        and clock - (tonumber(State.LastAngleAt) or 0) <= maxAge
        and sameOrigin
        and samePosition
        and State.LastAnglePitch ~= nil
        and State.LastAngleYaw ~= nil then
        return State.LastAnglePitch, State.LastAngleYaw
    end

    local pitch, yaw = angleToTarget(origin, position)
    if pitch and yaw then
        State.LastAngleTarget = target
        State.LastAngleAt = clock
        State.LastAngleOrigin = origin
        State.LastAnglePosition = position
        State.LastAnglePitch = pitch
        State.LastAngleYaw = yaw
    end
    return pitch, yaw
end)

local SNIPER_WORDS = {
    "sniper", "marksman", "dmr", "scout", "awp", "awm", "m24", "m40",
    "m200", "intervention", "barrett", "dragunov", "svd", "l96", "r700",
    "railgun", "mosin", "kar98"
}

local textLooksSniper = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(value)
    local text = string.lower(tostring(value or ""))
    if text == "" then
        return false
    end
    for _, word in ipairs(SNIPER_WORDS) do
        if text:find(word, 1, true) then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end)

local tableLooksSniper
tableLooksSniper = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(tbl, depth, seen)
    if type(tbl) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    depth = depth or 0
    if depth > 2 then
        return false
    end
    seen = seen or {}
    if seen[tbl] then
        return false
    end
    seen[tbl] = true
    local checked = 0
    for key, value in pairs(tbl) do
        checked += 1
        if checked > 80 then
            break
        end
        if (textLooksSniper(key) and value ~= false and value ~= nil) or textLooksSniper(value) then
            return true
        end
        if type(value) == "table" and tableLooksSniper(value, depth + 1, seen) then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end)

local viewModelSniperAt = 0
local viewModelSniper = false
local viewModelLooksSniper = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local nowClock = os.clock()
    if nowClock - viewModelSniperAt < 0.35 then
        return viewModelSniper
    end
    viewModelSniperAt = nowClock
    viewModelSniper = false
    local roots = {}
    local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    local fx = world and world:FindFirstChild("FX")
    if fx and fx:FindFirstChild("ViewModel") then
        table.insert(roots, fx.ViewModel)
    end
    if Workspace.CurrentCamera then
        table.insert(roots, Workspace.CurrentCamera)
    end
    for _, root in ipairs(roots) do
        local checked = 0
        for _, inst in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
            checked += 1
            if checked > 180 then
                break
            end
            if textLooksSniper(inst.Name) then
                viewModelSniper = true
                return true
            end
        end
    end
    return false
end)

local equippedToolLooksSniper = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local char = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer.Character
    if char then
        for _, child in ipairs(char:GetChildren()) do
            if child:IsA("Tool") and textLooksSniper(child.Name) then
                return true
            end
        end
    end
    return false
end)

local currentWeaponLooksSniper = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd, self)
    local clock = os.clock()
    local interval = math.max(0.05, tonumber(Config.SniperCheckInterval) or 0.25)
    if clock - (tonumber(State.SniperWeaponCacheAt) or 0) < interval then
        return State.SniperWeaponCache == true
    end

    State.SniperWeaponCacheAt = clock
    local looksSniper = false
    if tableLooksSniper(cmd) then
        looksSniper = true
    else
        local simState = simulationStateFor(self)
            or simulationStateFor(State.LastCommandSelf)
            or simulationStateFor(State.ClientModule)
        if tableLooksSniper(simState) then
            looksSniper = true
        else
            looksSniper = equippedToolLooksSniper() or viewModelLooksSniper()
        end
    end

    State.SniperWeaponCache = looksSniper == true
    return State.SniperWeaponCache
end)

local scopeInputActive = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if Config.GunForceAim or Config.ForceAimButton or Config.ForceAdsFields then
        return true
    end
    if type(cmd) == "table" then
        if cmd.scoped == true or cmd.ads == true or cmd.aiming == true or cmd.zoomed == true then
            return true
        end
        local mode = string.lower(tostring(cmd.mode or cmd.weaponMode or cmd.state or ""))
        if mode:find("scope", 1, true) or mode:find("ads", 1, true) or mode:find("aim", 1, true) then
            return true
        end
        local buttons = tonumber(cmd.buttons) or 0
        if bitBand(buttons, secondaryMask()) ~= 0 then
            return true
        end
    end
    local inputHandler = getInputHandler()
    if inputHandler and type(inputHandler.IsPressed) == "function" then
        for _, action in ipairs({ "Aim", "ADS", "Scope", "Secondary", "AimDownSights" }) do
            local ok, pressed = pcall(inputHandler.IsPressed, inputHandler, action)
            if ok and pressed then
                return true
            end
        end
    end
    local okMouse, mouseDown = pcall(function()
        return UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2)
    end)
    return okMouse and mouseDown == true
end)

local sniperScopeReady = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd, self)
    if Config.SniperScopeCheck ~= true then
        return true
    end
    if not currentWeaponLooksSniper(cmd, self) then
        return true
    end
    if scopeInputActive(cmd) then
        return true
    end
    State.Stats.LastError = "sniper scope check"
    return false
end)

State.SniperScopeReady = sniperScopeReady

local shouldRewrite = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd)
    if not State.Alive or not Config.Enabled then
        return false
    end
    if antiKatanaShootBlocked() then
        suppressPrimaryFire(cmd)
        return false
    end

    local firing
    if Config.ForcePrimaryFire or testBurstActive() then
        forcePrimaryFire(cmd)
        firing = true
    else
        firing = commandFiring(cmd)
    end
    if Config.OnlyWhileFiring and not firing then
        return false
    end

    if not sniperScopeReady(cmd, State.LastCommandSelf) then
        return false
    end

    if math.random(1, 100) > math.clamp(tonumber(Config.HitChance) or 100, 0, 100) then
        return false
    end
    return true
end)

local rememberCommandRewrite
local applyCachedCommandRewrite = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd, self, source, clock)
    if type(cmd) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    local target = State.LastRewriteTarget
    if type(target) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    clock = clock or os.clock()
    local age = clock - (tonumber(State.LastRewriteCmdAt) or 0)
    local sameCommand = State.LastRewriteCmd == cmd
    local sigTime = cmd.serverTime or cmd.clientTime or cmd.tick or cmd.frame
    if sameCommand then
        local maxAge = math.max(0.001, tonumber(Config.CommandRewriteCacheSeconds) or 0.014)
        if age > maxAge then
            return false
        end
        if sigTime ~= nil and State.LastRewriteSigTime ~= nil and sigTime ~= State.LastRewriteSigTime then
            return false
        end
    else
        local cloneMaxAge = math.max(0.001, tonumber(Config.CommandRewriteCloneCacheSeconds) or 0.006)
        if age > cloneMaxAge then
            return false
        end
        if sigTime ~= nil
            and sigTime == State.LastRewriteSigTime
            and cmd.buttons == State.LastRewriteSigButtons then
            sameCommand = true
        end
    end

    if not sameCommand then
        return false
    end
    if not targetStillValid(target) then
        return false
    end

    refreshCachedTargetPosition(target)
    local origin = commandOrigin(self or State.LastCommandSelf)
    local pitch, yaw = cachedAngleToTarget(origin, target)
    if not pitch or not yaw then
        pitch = State.LastRewritePitch
        yaw = State.LastRewriteYaw
    end
    if pitch == nil or yaw == nil then
        return false
    end

    stabilizeFiringCommand(cmd)
    cmd.pitch = pitch
    cmd.yaw = yaw
    State.Stats.LastSource = source or State.Stats.LastSource
    rememberCommandRewrite(cmd, pitch, yaw, target, source, clock)
    return true, pitch, yaw, target
end)

rememberCommandRewrite = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd, pitch, yaw, target, source, clock)
    State.LastRewriteCmd = cmd
    State.LastRewriteCmdAt = clock or os.clock()
    State.LastRewritePitch = pitch
    State.LastRewriteYaw = yaw
    State.LastRewriteTarget = target
    State.LastRewriteSigTime = cmd.serverTime or cmd.clientTime or cmd.tick or cmd.frame
    State.LastRewriteSigButtons = cmd.buttons
    State.LastSilent = {
        At = State.LastRewriteCmdAt,
        Pitch = pitch,
        Yaw = yaw,
        Target = target,
        Source = source,
        ServerTime = cmd.serverTime,
    }
end)

local rewriteCommand = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(cmd, self, source)
    State.Stats.CommandsSeen = State.Stats.CommandsSeen + 1
    if type(cmd) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    local clock = os.clock()
    if applyCachedCommandRewrite(cmd, self, source, clock) then
        return true
    end

    if not shouldRewrite(cmd) then
        return false
    end

    if type(self) == "table" then
        State.LastCommandSelf = self
    end

    local target = getShotTarget(cmd)
    if not target then
        return false
    end

    local origin = commandOrigin(self or State.LastCommandSelf)
    local pitch, yaw = cachedAngleToTarget(origin, target)
    if not pitch or not yaw then
        return false
    end

    stabilizeFiringCommand(cmd)
    cmd.pitch = pitch
    cmd.yaw = yaw
    rememberCommandRewrite(cmd, pitch, yaw, target, source, clock)
    State.Stats.Rewrites = State.Stats.Rewrites + 1
    State.Stats.LastRewriteAt = clock
    local tModelName = target.ChickynoidPlayer and target.ChickynoidPlayer.Name or (typeof(target.Model) == "Instance" and target.Model.Name or "?")
    local tPartName = target.Part and target.Part.Name or "pos"
    State.Stats.LastTarget = tModelName .. "." .. tPartName
    State.Stats.LastSource = source or target.Source
    return true
end)

local function hookTableMethod(owner, methodName, wrapperFactory, label)
    if type(owner) ~= "table" or State.Internal[owner] then
        return false
    end
    State.HookedTables[owner] = State.HookedTables[owner] or {}
    local existing = State.HookedTables[owner][methodName]
    if type(existing) == "table" then
        if rawget(owner, methodName) ~= existing.Replacement then
            local ok, err = pcall(rawset, owner, methodName, existing.Replacement)
            if ok then
                State.Stats.HookRepairs = State.Stats.HookRepairs + 1
                State.Stats.LastRepairAt = os.clock()
            else
                setError("hook repair failed " .. tostring(existing.Label or methodName) .. ": " .. tostring(err))
            end
        end
        return false
    end

    local original = rawget(owner, methodName)
    if type(original) ~= "function" then
        return false
    end

    local replacement = wrapperFactory(original)
    local ok, err = pcall(rawset, owner, methodName, replacement)
    if not ok then
        setError("hook failed " .. tostring(label or methodName) .. ": " .. tostring(err))
        return false
    end

    State.HookedTables[owner][methodName] = {
        Original = original,
        Replacement = replacement,
        Label = label or methodName,
    }

    addRestore(function()
        pcall(rawset, owner, methodName, original)
    end)
    State.Stats.Hooks = State.Stats.Hooks + 1
    return true
end

local function installGenerateCommandHook()
    if not Config.HookGenerateCommand then
        return false
    end
    local moduleScript = getReplicatedFirstPath("Examples.ClientMods.GenerateCommand")
    if not moduleScript or not moduleScript:IsA("ModuleScript") then
        return false
    end
    local mod = tryRequire(function()
        return require(moduleScript)
    end)
    if type(mod) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    State.GenerateCommandMod = mod
    return hookTableMethod(mod, "GenerateCommand", function(original)
        return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, cmd, ...)
            if type(self) == "table" then
                State.LastCommandSelf = self
            end
            local result = original(self, cmd, ...)
            local out = result or cmd

            if antiKatanaShootBlocked() then
                suppressPrimaryFire(out)
                return out
            end
            if not sniperScopeReady(out, self) then
                return out
            end

            -- Full auto / Rapid fire: toggle primary fire bit to create isEdge edges.
            -- Runs regardless of silent aim target.
            -- Full auto: toggles every frame (max weapon fire rate).
            -- Rapid fire: toggles at RPM set by the firerate slider.
            local forcedPrimary = Config.ForcePrimaryFire == true or testBurstActive()
            local wantsAutoFire = forcedPrimary or (Config.GunAutoFireTest and UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1))
            local wantsRapidFire = Config.GunRapidFireTest and (forcedPrimary or UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1))

            if wantsAutoFire or wantsRapidFire then
                local btn = tonumber(out.buttons) or 0
                local primary = primaryMask() or 1

                if wantsRapidFire then
                    -- Rapid fire TAKES PRIORITY over auto fire.
                    -- At high scales uses frame-counter toggle for true max rate.
                    local baseRpm = tonumber(Config.GunRapidFireRPM) or 900
                    local scale = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.GunRapidFireScale) or 6, 1, 16)
                    local rpm = math.clamp(baseRpm * scale, 60, baseRpm * 16)
                    local interval = 60 / rpm

                    if interval < 0.034 then
                        -- Scale is high enough that time-based breaks Ã¢â€ â€™ frame toggle (max rate)
                        if State.Stats.CommandsSeen % 2 == 0 then
                            out.buttons = bitBor(btn, primary)
                        else
                            if bitBand(btn, primary) ~= 0 then
                                out.buttons = btn - primary
                            end
                        end
                    else
                        -- Controlled RPM via time-based toggling
                        local nowClock = os.clock()
                        if nowClock - State.Stats.LastRapidFire >= interval then
                            State.Stats.LastRapidFire = nowClock
                            out.buttons = bitBor(btn, primary)
                        else
                            if bitBand(btn, primary) ~= 0 then
                                out.buttons = btn - primary
                            end
                        end
                    end
                elseif wantsAutoFire then
                    -- Full auto: toggle every frame for max fire rate
                    if State.Stats.CommandsSeen % 2 == 0 then
                        out.buttons = bitBor(btn, primary)
                    else
                        if bitBand(btn, primary) ~= 0 then
                            out.buttons = btn - primary
                        end
                    end
                end
            end

            rewriteCommand(out, self, "GenerateCommand")
            return out
        end)
    end, "GenerateCommand")
end

local function installCommandBaseHook()
    if not Config.HookCommandBase then
        return false
    end
    local moduleScript = getReplicatedFirstPath("Packages.Chickynoid.Client.ClientModule")
    if not moduleScript or not moduleScript:IsA("ModuleScript") then
        return false
    end
    local mod = tryRequire(function()
        return require(moduleScript)
    end)
    if type(mod) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    State.ClientModule = mod
    return hookTableMethod(mod, "GenerateCommandBase", function(original)
        return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, serverTime, deltaTime, ...)
            if type(self) == "table" then
                State.LastCommandSelf = self
            end
            local cmd = original(self, serverTime, deltaTime, ...)
            rewriteCommand(cmd, self, "GenerateCommandBase")
            return cmd
        end)
    end, "GenerateCommandBase")
end

local function installCommandLayoutHook()
    if not Config.HookCommandLayout then
        return false
    end
    local moduleScript = getReplicatedFirstPath("Packages.Chickynoid.Shared.Simulation.CommandLayout")
    if not moduleScript or not moduleScript:IsA("ModuleScript") then
        return false
    end
    local mod = tryRequire(function()
        return require(moduleScript)
    end)
    if type(mod) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    State.CommandLayout = mod
    local hooked = false
    hooked = hookTableMethod(mod, "NormaliseForWire", function(original)
        return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, cmd, ...)
            rewriteCommand(cmd, State.LastCommandSelf or State.ClientModule, "NormaliseForWire")
            return original(self, cmd, ...)
        end)
    end, "NormaliseForWire") or hooked

    hooked = hookTableMethod(mod, "EncodeCommand", function(original)
        return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, cmd, ...)
            rewriteCommand(cmd, State.LastCommandSelf or State.ClientModule, "EncodeCommand")
            return original(self, cmd, ...)
        end)
    end, "EncodeCommand") or hooked

    return hooked
end

local function installHeartbeatAimShadowHook()
    if not Config.HookHeartbeatAimShadow then
        return false
    end

    local moduleScript = getReplicatedFirstPath("Packages.Chickynoid.Client.ClientChickynoid")
    if not moduleScript or not moduleScript:IsA("ModuleScript") then
        return false
    end

    local mod = tryRequire(function()
        return require(moduleScript)
    end)
    local cameraHandler = getCameraHandler()
    if type(mod) ~= "table" or type(cameraHandler) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end

    State.ClientChickynoid = mod
    return hookTableMethod(mod, "Heartbeat", function(original)
        return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, cmd, ...)
            local oldRotation = nil
            local now = os.clock()
            local shadowInterval = math.max(0, tonumber(Config.HeartbeatShadowMinInterval) or 0)
            if Config.HookHeartbeatAimShadow
                and (shadowInterval <= 0 or now - (tonumber(State.LastHeartbeatShadowAt) or 0) >= shadowInterval)
                and State.Alive
                and Config.Enabled
                and type(cmd) == "table" then
                State.LastHeartbeatShadowAt = now
                local usedCache, pitch, yaw, target = applyCachedCommandRewrite(cmd, self, "ClientChickynoid.Heartbeat", now)
                if not usedCache and shouldRewrite(cmd) then
                    target = getShotTarget(cmd)
                    if target then
                        local origin = commandOrigin(self or State.LastCommandSelf)
                        pitch, yaw = cachedAngleToTarget(origin, target)
                        if pitch and yaw then
                            stabilizeFiringCommand(cmd)
                            cmd.pitch = pitch
                            cmd.yaw = yaw
                            rememberCommandRewrite(cmd, pitch, yaw, target, "ClientChickynoid.Heartbeat", now)
                            State.Stats.Rewrites = State.Stats.Rewrites + 1
                            State.Stats.LastRewriteAt = now
                        end
                    end
                end

                if pitch and yaw then
                    oldRotation = rawget(cameraHandler, "currentRotation")
                    if oldRotation == nil then
                        oldRotation = cameraHandler.currentRotation
                    end

                    local cameraYaw = yaw
                    if cameraYaw < 0 then
                        cameraYaw = cameraYaw + math.pi * 2
                    end

                    pcall(function()
                        cameraHandler.currentRotation = Vector2.new(pitch, cameraYaw)
                    end)

                    State.Stats.AimShadows = State.Stats.AimShadows + 1

                    local results = { pcall(original, self, cmd, ...) }
                    local ok = table.remove(results, 1)
                    pcall(function()
                        cameraHandler.currentRotation = oldRotation
                    end)
                    if not ok then
                        error(results[1])
                    end
                    return unpackArgs(results)
                end
            end

            return original(self, cmd, ...)
        end)
    end, "ClientChickynoid.Heartbeat")
end

local function installGcCommandHooks()
    if not Config.HookGcCommandTables or type(getgc) ~= "function" then
        return 0
    end

    local ok, objects = pcall(getgc, true)
    if not ok or type(objects) ~= "table" then
        return 0
    end

    local installed = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(objects) do
        if type(obj) == "table" and not State.Internal[obj] then
            if type(rawget(obj, "GenerateCommand")) == "function" then
                if hookTableMethod(obj, "GenerateCommand", function(original)
                    return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, cmd, ...)
                        if type(self) == "table" then
                            State.LastCommandSelf = self
                        end
                        local result = original(self, cmd, ...)
                        local out = result or cmd
                        rewriteCommand(out, self, "GC.GenerateCommand")
                        return out
                    end)
                end, "GC.GenerateCommand") then
                    installed = installed + 1
                end
            end
            if type(rawget(obj, "GenerateCommandBase")) == "function" then
                if hookTableMethod(obj, "GenerateCommandBase", function(original)
                    return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, serverTime, deltaTime, ...)
                        if type(self) == "table" then
                            State.LastCommandSelf = self
                        end
                        local cmd = original(self, serverTime, deltaTime, ...)
                        rewriteCommand(cmd, self, "GC.GenerateCommandBase")
                        return cmd
                    end)
                end, "GC.GenerateCommandBase") then
                    installed = installed + 1
                end
            end
            if type(rawget(obj, "EncodeCommand")) == "function" then
                if hookTableMethod(obj, "EncodeCommand", function(original)
                    return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, cmd, ...)
                        rewriteCommand(cmd, State.LastCommandSelf or State.ClientModule, "GC.EncodeCommand")
                        return original(self, cmd, ...)
                    end)
                end, "GC.EncodeCommand") then
                    installed = installed + 1
                end
            end
            if type(rawget(obj, "NormaliseForWire")) == "function" then
                if hookTableMethod(obj, "NormaliseForWire", function(original)
                    return LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, cmd, ...)
                        rewriteCommand(cmd, State.LastCommandSelf or State.ClientModule, "GC.NormaliseForWire")
                        return original(self, cmd, ...)
                    end)
                end, "GC.NormaliseForWire") then
                    installed = installed + 1
                end
            end
        end
    end

    State.Stats.GcHooks = State.Stats.GcHooks + installed
    return installed
end

local function installGenericRayHook()
    if not Config.GenericRayHook then
        return false
    end
    if type(hookmetamethod) ~= "function"
        or type(newcclosure) ~= "function"
        or type(getnamecallmethod) ~= "function" then
        return false
    end

    if State.NamecallHooked then
        return false
    end

    local oldNamecall
    oldNamecall = hookmetamethod(game, "__namecall", newcclosure(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(self, ...)
        local method = getnamecallmethod()
        local args = { ... }
        local callerIsExecutor = false
        if type(checkcaller) == "function" then
            local ok, result = pcall(checkcaller)
            callerIsExecutor = ok and result == true
        end

        if State.Alive and Config.Enabled and not callerIsExecutor and self == Workspace and method == "Raycast" then
            local origin = args[1]
            local direction = args[2]
            if typeof(origin) == "Vector3" and typeof(direction) == "Vector3" then
                local target = getHookTarget()
                if target then
                    local delta = target.Position - origin
                    if delta.Magnitude > 0.001 then
                        args[2] = delta.Unit * math.max(direction.Magnitude, delta.Magnitude + 8)
                        State.Stats.RayRedirects = State.Stats.RayRedirects + 1
                        local result = oldNamecall(self, unpackArgs(args))
                        if Config.WallbangTest and typeof(result) == "RaycastResult" then
                            local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
                            local map = world and world:FindFirstChild("Map")
                            if map and result.Instance and result.Instance:IsDescendantOf(map) then
                                State.Stats.WallbangRaySkips = (State.Stats.WallbangRaySkips or 0) + 1
                                return nil
                            end
                        end
                        return result
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        return oldNamecall(self, ...)
    end)))

    State.NamecallHooked = true
    State.Stats.Hooks = State.Stats.Hooks + 1
    return true
end

local function createVisuals()
    if not Config.ShowStatus and not Config.ShowHighlight then
        return
    end

    local parent = CoreGui
    if not pcall(function()
        local gui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
        gui.Name = "XenoSilentAimPrivateProbe"
        gui.ResetOnSpawn = false
        gui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
        gui.Parent = parent
        State.Gui = trackInstance(gui)
    end) then
        local playerGui = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
        if playerGui then
            local gui = Instance.new("ScreenGui")
            gui.Name = "XenoSilentAimPrivateProbe"
            gui.ResetOnSpawn = false
            gui.IgnoreGuiInset = true
            gui.Parent = playerGui
            State.Gui = trackInstance(gui)
        end
    end

    if State.Gui and Config.ShowStatus then
        local label = Instance.new("TextLabel")
        label.Name = "Status"
        label.AnchorPoint = Vector2.new(1, 0)
        label.Position = UDim2.new(1, -12, 0, 96)
        label.Size = UDim2.new(0, 360, 0, 94)
        label.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(15, 18, 24)
        label.BackgroundTransparency = 0.18
        label.BorderSizePixel = 0
        label.Font = Enum.Font.Code
        label.TextSize = 13
        label.TextColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(235, 240, 245)
        label.TextXAlignment = Enum.TextXAlignment.Left
        label.TextYAlignment = Enum.TextYAlignment.Top
        label.TextWrapped = true
        label.Parent = State.Gui
        State.StatusLabel = label
    end

    if Config.ShowHighlight then
        local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
        highlight.Name = "XenoSilentAim_Target"
        highlight.FillColor = Color3.fromRGB(0, 220, 255)
        highlight.OutlineColor = Color3.fromRGB(255, 255, 255)
        highlight.FillTransparency = 0.68
        highlight.OutlineTransparency = 0
        highlight.Enabled = false
        local highlightParent = CoreGui
        if not pcall(function()
            highlight.Parent = highlightParent
        end) and State.Gui then
            highlight.Parent = State.Gui
        end
        State.Highlight = trackInstance(highlight)
    end
end

local updateVisuals = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if not State.Highlight and not State.StatusLabel then
        return
    end

    local target = getHookTarget()
    if State.Highlight then
        local adornee = nil
        if target and typeof(target.Model) == "Instance" then
            adornee = target.Model
        end
        State.Highlight.Adornee = adornee
        State.Highlight.Enabled = Config.Enabled and target ~= nil and adornee ~= nil
    end

    if State.StatusLabel then
        local age = State.Stats.LastRewriteAt > 0 and (os.clock() - State.Stats.LastRewriteAt) or -1
        State.StatusLabel.Text = string.format(
            "IronFrost silent aim: %s\nTarget: %s [%s]\nSeen: %d | hooks: %d gc: %d repairs: %d\nCmd: %d | shadow: %d | rays: %d\nShooting: %s\nLast rewrite age: %.2fs | Err: %s",
            Config.Enabled and "ON" or "OFF",
            State.Stats.LastTarget,
            State.Stats.LastSource,
            State.Stats.TargetsSeen,
            State.Stats.Hooks,
            State.Stats.GcHooks,
            State.Stats.HookRepairs,
            State.Stats.Rewrites,
            State.Stats.AimShadows,
            State.Stats.RayRedirects,
            State.Stats.LastShootHeld and "YES" or "NO",
            age,
            State.Stats.LastError
        )
    end
end)

function State.Status()
    local target = State.CurrentTarget
    local age = State.Stats.LastRewriteAt > 0 and (os.clock() - State.Stats.LastRewriteAt) or -1
    return {
        enabled = Config.Enabled,
        target = target and ((target.ChickynoidPlayer and target.ChickynoidPlayer.Name or (typeof(target.Model) == "Instance" and target.Model:GetFullName() or "?")) .. "." .. (target.Part and target.Part.Name or "pos")) or nil,
        targetName = State.Stats.LastTarget,
        targetSource = State.Stats.LastSource,
        targetsSeen = State.Stats.TargetsSeen,
        hooks = State.Stats.Hooks,
        gcHooks = State.Stats.GcHooks,
        rewrites = State.Stats.Rewrites,
        aimForces = State.Stats.AimForces,
        aimShadows = State.Stats.AimShadows,
        hookRepairs = State.Stats.HookRepairs,
        rayRedirects = State.Stats.RayRedirects,
        commandsSeen = State.Stats.CommandsSeen,
        shooting = State.Stats.LastShootHeld,
        testBurst = testBurstActive(),
        lastRewriteAge = age,
        error = State.Stats.LastError,
    }
end

function State.TestBurst(seconds)
    seconds = math.clamp(tonumber(seconds) or 1.0, 0.1, 5.0)
    State.TestFireUntil = os.clock() + seconds
