    State.Stats.LastShootHeld = true
    log("test burst", seconds)
    return true
end

function State.Cleanup()
    if not State.Alive then
        return
    end
    State.Alive = false
    Config.Enabled = false

    for index = #State.Restores, 1, -1 do
        pcall(State.Restores[index])
    end
    table.clear(State.Restores)

    for _, conn in ipairs(State.Connections) do
        pcall(function()
            conn:Disconnect()
        end)
    end
    table.clear(State.Connections)

    for _, inst in ipairs(State.Instances) do
        pcall(function()
            inst:Destroy()

        end)
    end
    table.clear(State.Instances)

    if rawget(_G, RUN_KEY) == State then
        _G[RUN_KEY] = nil
    end
    if rawget(_G, "XenoSilentAimPrivate") == State then
        _G.XenoSilentAimPrivate = nil
    end
end

local function installHooks()
    local before = State.Stats.Hooks
    installGenerateCommandHook()
    installCommandBaseHook()
    installCommandLayoutHook()
    installHeartbeatAimShadowHook()
    installGenericRayHook()
    installGcCommandHooks()

    local installed = State.Stats.Hooks - before
    if State.Stats.Hooks <= 0 then
        setError("no hooks installed")
    else
        setError("")
    end
    log("hooks ready", State.Stats.Hooks, "gc", State.Stats.GcHooks, "new", installed)
end

local function repairKnownHooks()
    local repaired = 0
    for owner, methods in pairs(State.HookedTables) do
        if type(owner) == "table" and type(methods) == "table" then
            for methodName, record in pairs(methods) do
                if type(record) == "table" and type(record.Replacement) == "function" then
                    if rawget(owner, methodName) ~= record.Replacement then
                        local ok, err = pcall(rawset, owner, methodName, record.Replacement)
                        if ok then
                            repaired = repaired + 1
                        else
                            setError("hook repair failed " .. tostring(record.Label or methodName) .. ": " .. tostring(err))
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    if repaired > 0 then
        State.Stats.HookRepairs = State.Stats.HookRepairs + repaired
        State.Stats.LastRepairAt = os.clock()
        log("repaired hooks", repaired)
    end
    return repaired
end

local function retryDirectHooks()
    installGenerateCommandHook()
    installCommandBaseHook()
    installCommandLayoutHook()
    installHeartbeatAimShadowHook()
    installGenericRayHook()
end

trackConnection(UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, gameProcessed)
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
        State.Stats.LastShootHeld = true
        markFireRewriteWindow()
        if Config.Enabled then
            refreshTargetCache(true)
        elseif aimbotKeyActive() then
            refreshTargetCache(false)
        end
    end
    if gameProcessed then
        return
    end
    if input.KeyCode == Config.ToggleKey then
        Config.Enabled = not Config.Enabled
        if not Config.Enabled then
            State.CurrentTarget = nil
            State.ShotTarget = nil
            State.ShotTargetUntil = 0
            State.FireRewriteUntil = 0
        end
        log("enabled =", Config.Enabled)
    elseif input.KeyCode == Config.CleanupKey then
        State.Cleanup()
    end
end))

createVisuals()
installHooks()
trackConnection(RunService.Heartbeat:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if not State.Alive then
        return
    end
    local aimAssistActive = aimbotKeyActive()
    local shouldRefresh = Config.Enabled or aimAssistActive
    if Config.Enabled and shouldRefresh and Config.OnlyWhileFiring and not Config.ForcePrimaryFire and not testBurstActive() then
        local ok, mouseDown = pcall(function()
            return UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1)
        end)
        shouldRefresh = aimAssistActive or (ok and mouseDown == true)
    end

    if shouldRefresh then
        refreshTargetCache(false)
    else
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        State.CurrentTargetAt = 0
        State.ShotTarget = nil
        State.ShotTargetUntil = 0
        State.FireRewriteUntil = 0
    end
end)))

trackConnection(UserInputService.InputEnded:Connect(function(input)
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then
        State.Stats.LastShootHeld = false
    end
end))

if State.Highlight or State.StatusLabel then
    trackConnection(RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
        if not State.Alive then
            return
        end
        updateVisuals()
    end)))
end

task.spawn(function()
    local lastGcRescan = os.clock()
    while State.Alive do
        task.wait(math.max(2.0, tonumber(Config.SelfRepairInterval) or 8.0))
        if Config.SelfRepairHooks then
            repairKnownHooks()
            retryDirectHooks()
        end
        if Config.HookGcCommandTables and os.clock() - lastGcRescan >= (tonumber(Config.GcHookRescanInterval) or 45.0) then
            lastGcRescan = os.clock()
            installGcCommandHooks()
        end
    end
end)

log("daddy:", State.Status())

end)()

local function track(connection)
    table.insert(State.Connections, connection)
    return connection
end

local function safeRemove(object)
    if object then
        pcall(function()
            object.Visible = false
            object:Remove()
        end)
    end
end

local function newDrawing(kind, props)
    local object = Drawing.new(kind)
    for key, value in pairs(props or {}) do
        pcall(function()
            object[key] = value
        end)
    end
    return object
end

local function makeMarker()
    local marker = {
        Fill = newDrawing("Square", {
            Visible = false,
            Filled = true,
            Thickness = 0,
            Transparency = Config.FillTransparency,
        }),
        Box = newDrawing("Square", {
            Visible = false,
            Filled = false,
            Thickness = Config.BoxThickness,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        }),
        Name = newDrawing("Text", {
            Visible = false,
            Center = true,
            Outline = true,
            Size = Config.TextSize,
            Transparency = Config.TextTransparency,
        }),
        Health = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = 2,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        }),
        Snapline = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = Config.SnaplineThickness,
            Transparency = 0.65,
        }),
        Offscreen = newDrawing("Text", {
            Visible = false,
            Center = true,
            Outline = true,
            Size = Config.TextSize,
            Transparency = Config.TextTransparency,
        }),
        OffscreenArrow = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = 2,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        }),
        OffscreenArrowWingA = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = 2,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        }),
        OffscreenArrowWingB = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = 2,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        }),
        OffscreenArrowTail = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = 2,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        }),
        HeadDot = newDrawing("Circle", { Visible = false, Filled = true, Radius = 3, Transparency = Config.LineTransparency }),
        Direction = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = 1,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        }),
        TargetGlow = newDrawing("Square", {
            Visible = false,
            Filled = false,
            Thickness = 3,
            Transparency = 0.85,
        }),
        Chams = nil,
        PlayerOutline = nil,
        Skeleton = {},
        Corners = {},
        InfoParts = {},
        CornersWasVisible = false,
        SkeletonWasVisible = false,
        VisibleFrame = 0,
        Last = nil,
    }

    for index = 1, 8 do
        marker.Corners[index] = newDrawing("Line", {
            Visible = false,
            Thickness = Config.BoxThickness,
            Transparency = Config.LineTransparency,
        })
    end
    for index = 1, 14 do
        marker.Skeleton[index] = newDrawing("Line", { Visible = false, Thickness = 1, Transparency = Config.LineTransparency })
    end

    return marker
end

local function destroyMarker(marker)
    if not marker then
        return
    end
    safeRemove(marker.Fill)
    safeRemove(marker.Box)
    safeRemove(marker.Name)
    safeRemove(marker.Health)
    safeRemove(marker.Snapline)
    safeRemove(marker.Offscreen)
    safeRemove(marker.OffscreenArrow)
    safeRemove(marker.OffscreenArrowWingA)
    safeRemove(marker.OffscreenArrowWingB)
    safeRemove(marker.OffscreenArrowTail)
    safeRemove(marker.HeadDot)
    safeRemove(marker.Direction)
    safeRemove(marker.TargetGlow)
    if marker.Chams then pcall(function() marker.Chams:Destroy() end) end
    if marker.PlayerOutline then pcall(function() marker.PlayerOutline:Destroy() end) end
    for _, line in ipairs(marker.Skeleton or {}) do safeRemove(line) end
    if marker.Corners then
        for _, line in ipairs(marker.Corners) do
            safeRemove(line)
        end
    end
end

local hideMarker = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(marker)
    if not marker then
        return
    end
    marker.Last = nil
    if marker.Fill then marker.Fill.Visible = false end
    if marker.Box then marker.Box.Visible = false end
    if marker.Name then marker.Name.Visible = false end
    if marker.Health then marker.Health.Visible = false end
    if marker.Snapline then marker.Snapline.Visible = false end
    if marker.Offscreen then marker.Offscreen.Visible = false end
    if marker.OffscreenArrow then marker.OffscreenArrow.Visible = false end
    if marker.OffscreenArrowWingA then marker.OffscreenArrowWingA.Visible = false end
    if marker.OffscreenArrowWingB then marker.OffscreenArrowWingB.Visible = false end
    if marker.OffscreenArrowTail then marker.OffscreenArrowTail.Visible = false end
    if marker.HeadDot then marker.HeadDot.Visible = false end
    if marker.Direction then marker.Direction.Visible = false end
    if marker.TargetGlow then marker.TargetGlow.Visible = false end
    if marker.Chams then marker.Chams.Enabled = false end
    if marker.PlayerOutline then marker.PlayerOutline.Enabled = false end
    if marker.SkeletonWasVisible and marker.Skeleton then
        for index = 1, #marker.Skeleton do
            marker.Skeleton[index].Visible = false
        end
        marker.SkeletonWasVisible = false
    end
    if marker.CornersWasVisible and marker.Corners then
        for index = 1, #marker.Corners do
            local line = marker.Corners[index]
            line.Visible = false
        end
        marker.CornersWasVisible = false
    end
end)

local hideCornerLines = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(marker)
    if not marker or not marker.CornersWasVisible or not marker.Corners then
        return
    end
    for index = 1, #marker.Corners do
        marker.Corners[index].Visible = false
    end
    marker.CornersWasVisible = false
end)

local hideSkeletonLines = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(marker)
    if not marker or not marker.SkeletonWasVisible or not marker.Skeleton then
        return
    end
    for index = 1, #marker.Skeleton do
        marker.Skeleton[index].Visible = false
    end
    marker.SkeletonWasVisible = false
end)

local ESP_ROOT_PART_NAMES = {
    "HumanoidRootPart",
    "HitboxRoot",
    "HitboxTorso",
    "RootPart",
    "UpperTorso",
    "Torso",
    "HitboxHeadSmall",
    "HitboxHead",
    "Head",
}

local function cachedChildStillValid(model, child)
    return typeof(child) == "Instance" and child.Parent ~= nil and child:IsDescendantOf(model)
end

local function getPart(model)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return nil
    end
    local cached = State.PartCache[model]
    if cachedChildStillValid(model, cached) and cached:IsA("BasePart") then
        return cached
    end
    local part = typeof(model.PrimaryPart) == "Instance" and model.PrimaryPart:IsA("BasePart") and model.PrimaryPart or nil
    if not part then
        for _, name in ipairs(ESP_ROOT_PART_NAMES) do
            local found = model:FindFirstChild(name, true)
            if found and found:IsA("BasePart") then
                part = found
                break
            end
        end
    end
    State.PartCache[model] = part
    return part
end

local function getHumanoid(model)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    local cached = State.HumanoidCache[model]
    if cachedChildStillValid(model, cached) and cached:IsA("Humanoid") then
        return cached
    end
    local humanoid = model:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    State.HumanoidCache[model] = humanoid
    return humanoid
end

local function getStatesModule()
    if State.StatesModuleChecked then
        return State.StatesModule
    end

    State.StatesModuleChecked = true

    local modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
    local statesScript = modules and modules:FindFirstChild("States")
    if not statesScript then
        return nil
    end

    local ok, states = pcall(require, statesScript)
    if ok and type(states) == "table" and type(states.GetStateValue) == "function" then
        State.StatesModule = states
    end

    return State.StatesModule
end

local function espMatchActive()
    if Config.OnlyInMatches ~= true then
        return true
    end

    local playerGui = LocalPlayer and LocalPlayer:FindFirstChildOfClass("PlayerGui")
    local gameplay = playerGui and playerGui:FindFirstChild("Gameplay")
    local gameplayHud = gameplay and gameplay:FindFirstChild("HUD")
    if gameplayHud and gameplayHud:IsA("ScreenGui") then
        return gameplayHud.Enabled == true
    end

    local ok, clientModule = pcall(getChickynoidCM)
    if ok and type(clientModule) == "table" then
        if clientModule.gameRunning == true then
            return true
        end
        if clientModule.gameRunning == false then
            return false
        end
        if type(clientModule.worldState) == "table"
            and clientModule.worldState.serverTime ~= nil
            and clientModule.localChickynoid ~= nil
        then
            return true
        end
    end

    return false
end

local ESP_TEAM_KEYS = { "Team", "team", "TeamId", "teamId", "TeamID", "teamID", "Faction", "faction", "Side", "side" }

local function getGameplayHandler()
    if State.GameplayHandlerChecked then
        return State.GameplayHandler
    end
    State.GameplayHandlerChecked = true
    pcall(function()
        local modules = ReplicatedStorage:FindFirstChild("Modules")
        local handlers = modules and modules:FindFirstChild("Handlers")
        local gameplayScript = handlers and handlers:FindFirstChild("GameplayHandler")
        if gameplayScript then
            local gameplay = require(gameplayScript)
            if type(gameplay) == "table" then
                State.GameplayHandler = gameplay
            end
        end
    end)
    return State.GameplayHandler
end

local function getNeuronModule()
    if State.NeuronChecked then
        return State.Neuron
    end
    State.NeuronChecked = true
    pcall(function()
        local neuronScript = ReplicatedFirst:FindFirstChild("neuron")
        if neuronScript then
            local neuron = require(neuronScript)
            if type(neuron) == "table" then
                State.Neuron = neuron
            end
        end
    end)
    return State.Neuron
end

local function normalizedTeamToken(value)
    if value == nil then
        return nil
    end
    local valueType = typeof(value)
    if valueType == "Instance" then
        return string.lower(value.Name)
    end
    if valueType == "BrickColor" then
        return string.lower(value.Name)
    end
    if valueType == "Color3" then
        return string.format("%.3f,%.3f,%.3f", value.R, value.G, value.B)
    end
    if type(value) == "string" or type(value) == "number" or type(value) == "boolean" then
        local text = string.lower(tostring(value))
        return text ~= "" and text or nil
    end
    return nil
end

local function instanceTeamToken(inst)
    if typeof(inst) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    if inst:IsA("Player") then
        local teamToken = normalizedTeamToken(inst.Team)
        if teamToken then
            return teamToken
        end
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(ESP_TEAM_KEYS) do
        local ok, value = pcall(function()
            return inst:GetAttribute(key)
        end)
        local token = ok and normalizedTeamToken(value)
        if token then
            return token
        end
    end
    local leaderstats = inst:FindFirstChild("leaderstats")
    if leaderstats then
        for _, key in ipairs(ESP_TEAM_KEYS) do
            local obj = leaderstats:FindFirstChild(key)
            local token = obj and normalizedTeamToken(obj.Value)
            if token then
                return token
            end
        end
    end
    if inst:IsA("Player") and inst.Neutral == false then
        return normalizedTeamToken(inst.TeamColor)
    end
    return nil
end

local function tableTeamToken(tbl)
    if type(tbl) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    for _, key in ipairs(ESP_TEAM_KEYS) do
        local token = normalizedTeamToken(tbl[key])
        if token then
            return token
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function sameDuelTeam(a, b)
    if type(a) ~= "table" or type(b) ~= "table" then
        return false
    end
    if a == b then
        return true
    end
    local aId = a.id or a.ID or a.name or a.Name
    local bId = b.id or b.ID or b.name or b.Name
    return aId ~= nil and bId ~= nil and tostring(aId) == tostring(bId)
end

local function findDuelTeam(duel, player)
    if type(duel) ~= "table" or type(duel.teams) ~= "table" or not player then
        return nil
    end
    for _, team in ipairs(duel.teams) do
        if type(team) == "table" and type(team.players) == "table" and table.find(team.players, player) then
            return team
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function gameplaySameTeam(player)
    local gameplay = getGameplayHandler()
    if type(gameplay) ~= "table" or not player then
        return nil
    end
    local okDuel, localDuel, localDuelId = pcall(function()
        return gameplay:GetLocalDuel()
    end)
    if not okDuel or type(localDuel) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    local duelId = localDuel.id or localDuelId
    local okTargetDuel, targetDuelId = pcall(function()
        return gameplay:GetPlayerDuelId(player)
    end)
    if okTargetDuel and targetDuelId ~= nil and duelId ~= nil and tostring(targetDuelId) ~= tostring(duelId) then
        return false
    end

    local okTargetTeam, targetTeam = pcall(function()
        return gameplay:GetPlayerTeam(duelId, player)
    end)
    if not okTargetTeam then
        targetTeam = nil
    end
    targetTeam = targetTeam or findDuelTeam(localDuel, player)

    local okLocalTeam, localTeam = pcall(function()
        return gameplay:GetPlayerTeam(duelId, LocalPlayer)
    end)
    if not okLocalTeam then
        localTeam = nil
    end
    localTeam = localTeam or findDuelTeam(localDuel, LocalPlayer)

    if sameDuelTeam(localTeam, targetTeam) then
        return true
    end
    if type(targetTeam) == "table" then
        if targetTeam.enemy == true then
            return false
        end
        if targetTeam.enemy == false then
            return true
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function playerSameTeam(player, targetState)
    if Config.TeamCheck ~= true or not player or player == LocalPlayer then
        return false
    end
    local gameplayResult = gameplaySameTeam(player)
    if gameplayResult ~= nil then
        return gameplayResult == true
    end
    local localToken = instanceTeamToken(LocalPlayer)
    local targetToken = instanceTeamToken(player) or tableTeamToken(targetState)
    return localToken ~= nil and targetToken ~= nil and localToken == targetToken
end

local function resolvePlayerByName(name)
    if type(name) ~= "string" or name == "" then
        return nil
    end
    for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        if player.Name == name or player.DisplayName == name then
            return player
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local function resolveModelPlayer(model)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    if model:IsA("Player") then
        return model
    end
    if model:IsA("Model") then
        local player = Players:GetPlayerFromCharacter(model)
        if player then
            return player
        end
        local userId = tonumber(model:GetAttribute("player")) or tonumber(model:GetAttribute("userId")) or tonumber(model.Name)
        if userId then
            player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(userId)
            if player then
                return player
            end
        end
        local neuron = getNeuronModule()
        if neuron and type(neuron.get_player) == "function" then
            local ok, neuronPlayer = pcall(function()
                return neuron:get_player(model)
            end)
            if ok and typeof(neuronPlayer) == "Instance" and neuronPlayer:IsA("Player") then
                return neuronPlayer
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

-- This game intentionally does not populate Player.Character. The client-side
-- neuron resolver maps a Player instance to its randomized Workspace model.
local function readReplicatedHealth(model)
    if not Config.UseReplicatedStateHealth or typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end

    local states = getStatesModule()
    if not states then
        return nil
    end

    local okHealth, health = pcall(function()
        return states:GetStateValue(model, "Health", nil)
    end)
    if not okHealth then
        return nil
    end

    health = tonumber(health)
    if not health then

        return nil
    end

    local okMax, maxHealth = pcall(function()
        return states:GetStateValue(model, "MaxHealth", nil)
    end)
    maxHealth = okMax and tonumber(maxHealth) or nil

    local displayMax = maxHealth and maxHealth > 0 and maxHealth or Config.MaxHealth
    if Config.ForceDisplayMaxHealth and displayMax < Config.MaxHealth then
        displayMax = Config.MaxHealth
    end

    local okDead, dead = pcall(function()
        return states:GetStateValue(model, "Dead", false)
    end)
    if okDead and dead == true then
        health = 0
    end

    displayMax = math.max(1, displayMax)
    return math.clamp(health, 0, displayMax), math.floor(displayMax + 0.5)
end

local function getCameraSubjectModel()
    Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
    local subject = Camera and Camera.CameraSubject
    if typeof(subject) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    return subject:FindFirstAncestorOfClass("Model")
end

local function isSelfModel(model)
    if not Config.ExcludeSelf or typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return false
    end

    if LocalPlayer.Character and (model == LocalPlayer.Character or model:IsDescendantOf(LocalPlayer.Character)) then
        return true
    end

    local subjectModel = getCameraSubjectModel()
    if subjectModel and (model == subjectModel or model:IsDescendantOf(subjectModel) or subjectModel:IsDescendantOf(model)) then
        return true
    end

    return false
end

local function getEstimatedHealth(key, model)
    local replicatedHealth, replicatedMaxHealth = readReplicatedHealth(model)
    if replicatedHealth then
        State.HealthModel[key] = model
        State.EstimatedHealth[key] = replicatedHealth
        State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] = nil
        State.LastTargetPopupTotal[key] = nil
        return replicatedHealth, replicatedMaxHealth
    end

    if not Config.UseEstimatedHealth then
        local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
        if humanoid then
            return math.max(0, math.floor(humanoid.Health + 0.5)), math.max(1, math.floor(humanoid.MaxHealth + 0.5))
        end
        return Config.MaxHealth, Config.MaxHealth
    end

    if State.HealthModel[key] ~= model then
        State.HealthModel[key] = model
        State.EstimatedHealth[key] = Config.MaxHealth
        State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] = nil
        State.LastTargetPopupTotal[key] = nil
    elseif State.EstimatedHealth[key] == nil then
        State.EstimatedHealth[key] = Config.MaxHealth
    end

    if Config.ResetZeroAfterIdle
        and State.EstimatedHealth[key] <= 0
        and State.LastTargetDamageTime[key]
        and os.clock() - State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] >= Config.ZeroResetDelay
    then
        State.EstimatedHealth[key] = Config.MaxHealth
        State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] = nil
        State.LastTargetPopupTotal[key] = nil
    end

    return math.clamp(State.EstimatedHealth[key], 0, Config.MaxHealth), Config.MaxHealth
end

local function targetDeadForESP(key, model)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return false
    end
    local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
    if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return true
    end
    local replicatedHealth = readReplicatedHealth(model)
    if replicatedHealth ~= nil then
        if replicatedHealth <= 0 then
            return true
        end
        State.HealthModel[key] = model
        State.EstimatedHealth[key] = replicatedHealth
        State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] = nil
        State.LastTargetPopupTotal[key] = nil
        return false
    end
    local estimated = tonumber(State.EstimatedHealth[key])
    if estimated ~= nil and estimated <= 0 then
        local healthModel = State.HealthModel[key]
        if healthModel == nil or healthModel == model then
            local lastDamageTime = tonumber(State.LastTargetDamageTime[key])
            if Config.ResetZeroAfterIdle
                and (not lastDamageTime or os.clock() - lastDamageTime >= Config.ZeroResetDelay)
            then
                State.EstimatedHealth[key] = Config.MaxHealth
                State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] = nil
                State.LastTargetPopupTotal[key] = nil
                return false
            end
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

local function targetDeadForRender(key, model, marker)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return false
    end
    local clock = State.FrameClock > 0 and State.FrameClock or os.clock()
    local interval = math.max(0.05, tonumber(Config.HealthUpdateInterval) or 0.25)
    if marker
        and marker.LastDeadModel == model
        and clock - (tonumber(marker.LastDeadAt) or 0) < interval
        and marker.LastDeadValue ~= nil then
        return marker.LastDeadValue == true
    end

    local dead = targetDeadForESP(key, model)
    if marker then
        marker.LastDeadModel = model
        marker.LastDeadAt = clock
        marker.LastDeadValue = dead == true
    end
    return dead
end

local function getRenderHealth(key, model, marker)
    local clock = State.FrameClock > 0 and State.FrameClock or os.clock()
    local interval = math.max(0.05, tonumber(Config.HealthUpdateInterval) or 0.25)
    if marker
        and marker.LastHealthModel == model
        and marker.LastHealth ~= nil
        and marker.LastMaxHealth ~= nil
        and clock - (tonumber(marker.LastHealthAt) or 0) < interval then
        return marker.LastHealth, marker.LastMaxHealth
    end

    local health, maxHealth = getEstimatedHealth(key, model)
    if marker then
        marker.LastHealthModel = model
        marker.LastHealthAt = clock
        marker.LastHealth = health
        marker.LastMaxHealth = maxHealth
    end
    return health, maxHealth
end

local function applyDamageToTarget(target, amount)
    if not target or type(amount) ~= "number" or amount <= 0 then
        return
    end

    local key = target.Key
    local current = getEstimatedHealth(key, target.Model)
    State.EstimatedHealth[key] = math.clamp(current - amount, 0, Config.MaxHealth)
    State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] = os.clock()
end

local function setTargetHealthFromPopupTotal(target, popupTotal)
    if not target or type(popupTotal) ~= "number" or popupTotal <= 0 then
        return
    end

    local key = target.Key
    getEstimatedHealth(key, target.Model)

    local clampedTotal = math.clamp(popupTotal, 0, Config.MaxHealth)
    State.EstimatedHealth[key] = math.clamp(Config.MaxHealth - clampedTotal, 0, Config.MaxHealth)
    State.LastTargetDamageTime[key] = os.clock()
    State.LastTargetPopupTotal[key] = popupTotal
end

local function isDummy(model)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return false
    end
    if model:GetAttribute("IsDummy") == true or model:GetAttribute("Dummy") == true then
        return true
    end
    return string.find(string.lower(model.Name), "dummy", 1, true) ~= nil
end

local playerAllowed = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(player)
    if player == LocalPlayer and not Config.ShowLocalPlayer then
        return false
    end
    if playerSameTeam(player) then
        return false
    end
    return true
end)

local function chickynoidPositionFromData(CM, characterId, charData)
    if type(CM) ~= "table" or type(charData) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    local interpTable = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
    local interp = interpTable and (interpTable[characterId] or interpTable[tonumber(characterId)])
    if type(interp) == "table" and typeof(interp.pos) == "Vector3" then
        return interp.pos
    end
    if type(charData.characterData) == "table" and typeof(charData.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
        return charData.characterData.pos
    end
    if typeof(charData.position) == "Vector3" then
        return charData.position
    end
    return nil
end

local function chickynoidPositionById(characterId)
    local CM = getChickynoidCM()
    if not CM or type(CM.characters) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    local charData = CM.characters[characterId] or CM.characters[tonumber(characterId)] or CM.characters[tostring(characterId)]
    if not charData then
        return nil
    end
    return chickynoidPositionFromData(CM, characterId, charData)
end

local function isIgnoredHumanoidModel(model, world)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return true
    end
    if isDummy(model) then
        return true
    end
    if world and model:IsDescendantOf(world) then
        return true
    end
    local objects = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Objects")
    if objects and model:IsDescendantOf(objects) then
        return true
    end
    local lowered = string.lower(model.Name)
    return lowered == "viewmodel" or lowered == "noob"
end

local addTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(list, seen, key, model, kind, name, player)
    if not model or seen[model] then
        return
    end
    if key and seen[key] then
        return
    end
    if kind == "PLAYER" and player and seen[player] then
        return
    end
    if isSelfModel(model) then
        return
    end
    if kind == "PLAYER" then
        player = player or resolveModelPlayer(model) or resolvePlayerByName(name)
        if playerSameTeam(player) then
            return
        end
    end
    local part = getPart(model)
    if not part then
        return
    end
    local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
    if humanoid and humanoid.Health <= 0 then
        return
    end
    if targetDeadForESP(key or model, model) then
        return
    end
    seen[model] = true
    if key then seen[key] = true end
    if kind == "PLAYER" and player then seen[player] = true end
    table.insert(list, {
        Key = key or model,
        Model = model,
        Part = part,
        Humanoid = humanoid,
        Kind = kind,
        Name = name or model.Name,
        Player = player,
    })
end)

local addPositionTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(list, seen, key, position, kind, name, player, characterId)
    if key == nil or seen[key] or typeof(position) ~= "Vector3" then
        return
    end
    if kind == "PLAYER" and player and seen[player] then
        return
    end
    if player == LocalPlayer and not Config.ShowLocalPlayer then
        return
    end
    if kind == "PLAYER" and playerSameTeam(player) then
        return
    end
    seen[key] = true
    if kind == "PLAYER" and player then seen[player] = true end
    table.insert(list, {
        Key = key,
        Model = nil,
        Part = nil,
        Position = position,
        IsVirtual = true,
        ChickynoidCharacterId = characterId,
        Kind = kind,
        Name = name or tostring(key),
        Player = player,
    })
end)

local function directBasePart(model, name)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" or type(name) ~= "string" then
        return nil
    end
    local part = model:FindFirstChild(name)
    return part and part:IsA("BasePart") and part or nil
end

local function getDirectAvatarRoot(model)
    return directBasePart(model, "HumanoidRootPart")
        or directBasePart(model, "HitboxTorso")
        or directBasePart(model, "UpperTorso")
        or directBasePart(model, "LowerTorso")
end

local function isDirectAvatarModel(model)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" or not model:IsA("Model") then
        return false
    end
    if isDummy(model) then
        return false
    end

    local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    local entities = world and world:FindFirstChild("Entities")
    if entities and model:IsDescendantOf(entities) then
        return false
    end

    local objects = Workspace:FindFirstChild("Objects")
    if objects and model:IsDescendantOf(objects) then
        return false
    end

    local root = getDirectAvatarRoot(model)
    local head = directBasePart(model, "Head") or directBasePart(model, "HitboxHead") or directBasePart(model, "HitboxHeadSmall")
    local torso = directBasePart(model, "UpperTorso") or directBasePart(model, "Torso") or directBasePart(model, "HitboxTorso")
    if not root or not head or not torso then
        return false
    end

    -- Require real avatar limb parts so map props with a Head/Root cannot be matched as a player.
    return directBasePart(model, "LeftHand") ~= nil
        and directBasePart(model, "RightHand") ~= nil
        and directBasePart(model, "LeftUpperLeg") ~= nil
        and directBasePart(model, "RightUpperLeg") ~= nil
end

local function shouldScanAvatarRoot(root)
    if typeof(root) ~= "Instance" then
        return false
    end
    if root == Camera or root == Workspace.Terrain then
        return false
    end
    local name = root.Name
    return name ~= "World"
        and name ~= "Objects"
        and name ~= "Debris"
        and name ~= "VFX"
        and name ~= "Camera"
end

local refreshPlayerAvatarCandidates = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local now = os.clock()
    if now - State.LastPlayerAvatarScan < math.max(0.5, tonumber(Config.PlayerAvatarScanInterval) or 1.25) then
        return
    end
    State.LastPlayerAvatarScan = now

    local candidates = State.PlayerAvatarCandidates
    table.clear(candidates)
    local limit = math.max(8, tonumber(Config.MaxPlayerAvatarCandidates) or 80)

    local function consider(model)
        if #candidates >= limit then
            return true
        end
        if isDirectAvatarModel(model) then
            local root = getDirectAvatarRoot(model)
            if root then
                candidates[#candidates + 1] = {
                    Model = model,
                    Part = root,
                    UserId = tonumber(model.Name) or tonumber(model:GetAttribute("player")) or tonumber(model:GetAttribute("userId")),
                }
            end
        end
        return #candidates >= limit
    end

    for _, root in ipairs(Workspace:GetChildren()) do
        if shouldScanAvatarRoot(root) then
            if root:IsA("Model") and consider(root) then
                break
            end
            for _, inst in ipairs(root:GetDescendants()) do
                if inst:IsA("Model") and consider(inst) then
                    break
                end
            end
        end
        if #candidates >= limit then
            break
        end
    end
end)

local function localChickynoidPosition(CM)
    if type(CM) ~= "table" or type(CM.characters) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    for characterId, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
        if type(charData) == "table" and charData.localPlayer == true then
            return chickynoidPositionFromData(CM, characterId, charData)
        end
    end
    return nil
end

local targetWorldPosition = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(target)
    if type(target) ~= "table" then
        return nil
    end
    if typeof(target.Position) == "Vector3" then
        return target.Position
    end
    if typeof(target.Part) == "Instance" and target.Part:IsA("BasePart") then
        return target.Part.Position
    end
    return nil
end)

local sortTargetsByRankDistance = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(a, b)
    if a.SortRank ~= b.SortRank then
        return a.SortRank < b.SortRank
    end
    return a.SortDistance < b.SortDistance
end)

local sortByDistance = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(a, b)
    return a.Distance < b.Distance
end)

local function refreshWorkspaceCache(cameraPosition)
    if not Config.ShowWorkspaceHumanoidPlayers then
        table.clear(State.WorkspaceCache)
        return
    end
    if os.clock() - State.LastWorkspaceScan < Config.WorkspaceHumanoidScanInterval then
        return
    end
    State.LastWorkspaceScan = os.clock()
    local playerMaxDistance = math.min(tonumber(Config.MaxDistance) or 15000, tonumber(Config.PlayerMaxDistance) or 550)

    -- Build Chickynoid player positionÃ¢â€ â€™name map for name resolution
    local chickynoidNameMap = {}
    pcall(function()
        local CM = getChickynoidCM()
        if CM and CM.characters then
            -- Build userIdÃ¢â€ â€™name from worldState.players when available
            local uidToName = {}
            local uidToPlayer = {}
            if CM.worldState and CM.worldState.players then
                for _, pData in pairs(CM.worldState.players) do
                    if pData.userId and pData.name then
                        uidToName[tonumber(pData.userId)] = pData.name
                    end
                end
            end
            -- Fallback: use Players service for names
            for _, p in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
                uidToPlayer[p.UserId] = p
                if not uidToName[p.UserId] then
                    uidToName[p.UserId] = p.Name
                end
            end
            -- Collect real player positions
            for uid, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
                if charData.userId and charData.userId > 0 and not charData.localPlayer then
                    local name = uidToName[charData.userId]
                    if name then
                        local pos = nil
                        local interp = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter and CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter[uid]
                        if type(interp) == "table" and typeof(interp.pos) == "Vector3" then
                            pos = interp.pos
                        elseif type(charData.characterData) == "table" and typeof(charData.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
                            pos = charData.characterData.pos
                        elseif typeof(charData.position) == "Vector3" then
                            pos = charData.position
                        end
                        if pos then
                            table.insert(chickynoidNameMap, {pos = pos, name = name, player = uidToPlayer[charData.userId]})
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end)

    local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    local found = State.WorkspaceFound
    table.clear(found)
    local hasChickynoidData = #chickynoidNameMap > 0

    for _, inst in ipairs(Workspace:GetDescendants()) do
        if inst:IsA("Model") and not isIgnoredHumanoidModel(inst, world) then
            local humanoid = getHumanoid(inst)
            local part = getPart(inst)
            if humanoid and part and humanoid.Health > 0 then
                local distance = (part.Position - cameraPosition).Magnitude
                if distance <= playerMaxDistance then
                    -- Try to match this model to a Chickynoid player by position proximity
                    local displayName = nil
                    local matchedPlayer = false
                    local matchedPlayerInstance = nil
                    if hasChickynoidData then
                        local bestDist, bestName, bestPlayer = 20, nil, nil
                        for _, cp in ipairs(chickynoidNameMap) do
                            local d = (part.Position - cp.pos).Magnitude
                            if d < bestDist then
                                bestDist = d
                                bestName = cp.name
                                bestPlayer = cp.player
                            end
                        end
                        if bestName then
                            displayName = bestName
                            matchedPlayer = true
                            matchedPlayerInstance = bestPlayer
                        end
                    end
                    if hasChickynoidData and not matchedPlayer then
                        
                    else
                        if not displayName then
                            displayName = humanoid.DisplayName
                            if type(displayName) ~= "string" or displayName == "" then
                                displayName = inst.Name
                            end
                            matchedPlayerInstance = resolveModelPlayer(inst) or resolvePlayerByName(displayName)
                        end
                        if playerSameTeam(matchedPlayerInstance) then
                            continue
                        end
                        table.insert(found, {
                            Model = inst,
                            Part = part,
                            Humanoid = humanoid,
                            Name = displayName,
                            Player = matchedPlayerInstance,
                            Distance = distance,
                        })
                        if #found >= Config.MaxWorkspaceHumanoidTargets * 3 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    table.sort(found, sortByDistance)

    table.clear(State.WorkspaceCache)
    for index = 1, math.min(#found, Config.MaxWorkspaceHumanoidTargets) do
        table.insert(State.WorkspaceCache, found[index])
    end
end

local collectChickynoidPlayerTargets = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(targets, seen, entityChildren, cameraPosition)
    local CM = getChickynoidCM()
    if type(CM) ~= "table" or type(CM.characters) ~= "table" then
        return 0, false
    end

    local uidToPlayer = {}
    local uidToName = {}
    for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
        uidToPlayer[player.UserId] = player
        uidToName[player.UserId] = player.Name
    end
    if type(CM.worldState) == "table" and type(CM.worldState.players) == "table" then
        for _, playerData in pairs(CM.worldState.players) do
            local userId = tonumber(playerData.userId)
            if userId and type(playerData.name) == "string" and playerData.name ~= "" then
                uidToName[userId] = playerData.name
            end
        end
    end

    local entityModels = nil
    if entityChildren then
        entityModels = {}
        for _, model in ipairs(entityChildren) do
            if model:IsA("Model") and not isDummy(model) then
                local part = getPart(model)
                if part then
                    local modelUserId = tonumber(model.Name) or tonumber(model:GetAttribute("player")) or tonumber(model:GetAttribute("userId"))
                    entityModels[#entityModels + 1] = { Model = model, Part = part, UserId = modelUserId }
                end
            end
        end
    end
    refreshPlayerAvatarCandidates()
    local avatarModels = State.PlayerAvatarCandidates
    local localPosition = localChickynoidPosition(CM)

    local added = 0
    local playerMaxDistance = math.min(tonumber(Config.MaxDistance) or 15000, tonumber(Config.PlayerMaxDistance) or 550)
    for characterId, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
        local userId = type(charData) == "table" and tonumber(charData.userId) or nil
        if userId and userId > 0 and not charData.localPlayer then
            local player = uidToPlayer[userId] or Players:GetPlayerByUserId(userId)
            if playerAllowed(player) then
                local position = chickynoidPositionFromData(CM, characterId, charData)
                if position and (position - cameraPosition).Magnitude <= playerMaxDistance then
                    local bestModel, bestDist = nil, 35
                    if entityModels then
                        for _, item in ipairs(entityModels) do
                            if not seen[item.Model] then
                                if item.UserId == userId then
                                    bestModel = item.Model
                                    break
                                end
                                local dist = (item.Part.Position - position).Magnitude
                                if dist < bestDist then
                                    bestDist = dist
                                    bestModel = item.Model
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if avatarModels and #avatarModels > 0 then
                        local avatarBestDist = tonumber(Config.PlayerModelMatchDistance) or 18
                        for _, item in ipairs(avatarModels) do
                            local model = item.Model
                            local part = item.Part
                            if typeof(model) == "Instance"
                                and typeof(part) == "Instance"
                                and model.Parent ~= nil
                                and part.Parent ~= nil
                                and not seen[model]
                            then
                                if item.UserId == userId then
                                    bestModel = model
                                    bestDist = 0
                                    break
                                end
                                local localDist = localPosition and (part.Position - localPosition).Magnitude or math.huge
                                if localDist > 4 then
                                    local dist = (part.Position - position).Magnitude
                                    if dist < avatarBestDist and dist < bestDist then
                                        avatarBestDist = dist
                                        bestDist = dist
                                        bestModel = model
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if bestModel then
                        addTarget(targets, seen, player or ("chickynoid:" .. tostring(characterId)), bestModel, "PLAYER", uidToName[userId], player)
                    else
                        addPositionTarget(targets, seen, "chickynoid:" .. tostring(characterId), position, "PLAYER", uidToName[userId], player, characterId)
                    end
                    added += 1
                end
            end
        end
    end

    return added, true
end)

local refreshTargets = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
    if not Camera then
        return
    end
    local clock = os.clock()
    if clock - State.LastTargetScan < Config.ScanInterval then
        return
    end
    State.LastTargetScan = clock

    local targets = State.Targets
    local seen = State.ScanSeen
    table.clear(targets)
    table.clear(seen)
    local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    local entities = world and world:FindFirstChild("Entities")
    local entityChildren = entities and entities:GetChildren() or nil

    if Config.ShowDummies and entityChildren then
        for _, model in ipairs(entityChildren) do
            if isDummy(model) then
                addTarget(targets, seen, model, model, "DUMMY", model.Name)
            end
        end
    end

    if Config.ShowPlayers then
        local cameraPosition = Camera.CFrame.Position
        local _, hasChickynoidPlayers = collectChickynoidPlayerTargets(targets, seen, entityChildren, cameraPosition)

        for _, player in ipairs(Players:GetPlayers()) do
            if playerAllowed(player) and player.Character then
                addTarget(targets, seen, player, player.Character, "PLAYER", player.Name, player)
            end
        end

        if entityChildren and not hasChickynoidPlayers then
            local chickynoidPlayerModels = {}
            pcall(function()
                local CM = getChickynoidCM()
                if CM and CM.characters then
                    local interpTable = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
                    for uid, charData in pairs(CM.characters) do
                        if not charData.localPlayer and charData.userId and charData.userId > 0 then
                            local basePos
                            local interp = interpTable and interpTable[uid]
                            if type(interp) == "table" and typeof(interp.pos) == "Vector3" then
                                basePos = interp.pos
                            elseif type(charData.characterData) == "table" and typeof(charData.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
                                basePos = charData.characterData.pos
                            end
                            if basePos then
                                local player = Players:GetPlayerByUserId(charData.userId)
                                if player then
                                    local bestModel, bestDist = nil, 10
                                    for _, m in ipairs(entityChildren) do
                                        if m:IsA("Model") and not isDummy(m) then
                                            local p = getPart(m)
                                            if p then
                                                local dist = (p.Position - basePos).Magnitude
                                                if dist < bestDist then bestDist = dist; bestModel = m end
                                            end
                                        end
                                    end
                                    if bestModel then chickynoidPlayerModels[bestModel] = player end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                end
                end)

            for _, model in ipairs(entityChildren) do
                if model:IsA("Model") and not isDummy(model) then
                    local player = chickynoidPlayerModels[model]
                    if not player then
                        local uid = tonumber(model.Name) or tonumber(model:GetAttribute("player"))
                        player = uid and Players:GetPlayerByUserId(uid)
                    end
                    if player and player ~= LocalPlayer then
                        addTarget(targets, seen, player, model, "PLAYER", player.Name, player)
                    elseif not player and model.Name ~= LocalPlayer.Name then
                        addTarget(targets, seen, model, model, "PLAYER", targetDisplayName(model, nil), nil)
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        if hasChickynoidPlayers then
            table.clear(State.WorkspaceCache)
        else
            refreshWorkspaceCache(cameraPosition)
            for _, item in ipairs(State.WorkspaceCache) do
                addTarget(targets, seen, item.Model, item.Model, "PLAYER", item.Name, item.Player)
            end
        end
    end

    table.clear(State.TargetByKey)
    local shouldPrimeHealth = (Config.Health or Config.HealthBar ~= false)
        and clock - (tonumber(State.LastHealthPrime) or 0) >= math.max(0.1, tonumber(Config.PrimeHealthInterval) or 0.5)
    if shouldPrimeHealth then
        State.LastHealthPrime = clock
    end
    local cameraPosition = Camera.CFrame.Position
    for _, target in ipairs(targets) do
        State.TargetByKey[target.Key] = target
        local targetPosition = targetWorldPosition(target)
        target.SortDistance = typeof(targetPosition) == "Vector3" and (targetPosition - cameraPosition).Magnitude or math.huge
        target.SortRank = target.Kind == "PLAYER" and 0 or 1
        if shouldPrimeHealth then
            getEstimatedHealth(target.Key, target.Model)
        end
    end

    table.sort(targets, sortTargetsByRankDistance)
end)

local function clearDamageConnections()
    for _, connection in ipairs(State.DamageConnections) do
        pcall(function()
            connection:Disconnect()
        end)
    end
    table.clear(State.DamageConnections)
end

local function trackDamageConnection(connection)
    table.insert(State.DamageConnections, connection)
    return connection
end

local function parseDamageNumber(value)
    if type(value) == "number" then
        return math.abs(value)
    end
    if type(value) ~= "string" then
        return nil
    end

    local number = tonumber(value:match("[-+]?%d+%.?%d*"))
    return number and math.abs(number) or nil
end

local function getDamageContainer()
    local current = Workspace
    for _, name in ipairs(Config.DamageTagPath) do
        current = current and current:FindFirstChild(name)
        if not current then
            local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
            return world and world:FindFirstChild("FX") or nil
        end
    end
    return current
end

local function positionFromInstance(instance)
    if typeof(instance) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end

    if instance:IsA("BasePart") then
        return instance.Position
    end
    if instance:IsA("Attachment") then
        return instance.WorldPosition
    end
    if instance:IsA("Model") then
        local part = getPart(instance)
        return part and part.Position or nil
    end

    return nil
end

local function getDamageTagPosition(instance)
    local current = instance

    while current and current ~= State.DamageContainer do
        if current:IsA("BillboardGui") and current.Adornee then
            local pos = positionFromInstance(current.Adornee)
            if pos then
                return pos
            end
        end

        local pos = positionFromInstance(current)
        if pos then
            return pos
        end

        current = current.Parent
    end

    if State.DamageContainer then
        return positionFromInstance(State.DamageContainer)
    end

    return nil
end

local function findNearestTarget(position)
    if not position then
        return nil
    end

    local closest, closestDistance = nil, Config.DamageAssociationRange
    for _, target in ipairs(State.Targets) do
        local part = target.Part
        if typeof(part) == "Instance" and part.Parent then
            local distance = (part.Position - position).Magnitude
            if distance < closestDistance then
                closest = target
                closestDistance = distance
            end
        end
    end

    return closest
end

local inspectDamageTag

local function watchDamageProperty(instance, propertyName)
    local observed = State.DamageObserved[instance]
    if not observed then
        observed = {}
        State.DamageObserved[instance] = observed
    end
    if observed[propertyName] then
        return
    end
    observed[propertyName] = true
    trackDamageConnection(instance:GetPropertyChangedSignal(propertyName):Connect(function()
        inspectDamageTag(instance)
    end))
end

local function reportDamage(instance, damage, popupTotal)
    if not damage or damage <= 0 then
        return
    end

    local target = findNearestTarget(getDamageTagPosition(instance))
    if target then
        if Config.DamagePopupMode == "Total" and type(popupTotal) == "number" and popupTotal > 0 then
            setTargetHealthFromPopupTotal(target, popupTotal)
        else
            applyDamageToTarget(target, damage)
        end
        State.LastDamage = {
            Damage = damage,
            PopupTotal = popupTotal or damage,
            Target = target.Name,
            Time = os.clock(),
        }
    end
end

inspectDamageTag = function(instance)
    if not instance or not instance.Parent then
        return
    end

    if instance:IsA("TextLabel") or instance:IsA("TextButton") or instance:IsA("TextBox") then
        if instance.Name == "Damage" then
            watchDamageProperty(instance, "Text")
            watchDamageProperty(instance, "Visible")
            watchDamageProperty(instance, "TextTransparency")
            watchDamageProperty(instance, "TextStrokeTransparency")

            local amount = parseDamageNumber(instance.Text)
            if not amount or amount <= 0 then
                return
            end

            local now = os.clock()
            local textTransparency = instance.TextTransparency or 0
            local strokeTransparency = instance.TextStrokeTransparency or textTransparency
            local visibilityTransparency = math.min(textTransparency, strokeTransparency)
            local fadeTransparency = math.max(textTransparency, strokeTransparency)
            local active = instance.Visible ~= false and visibilityTransparency < 0.95 and instance.Text ~= ""
            local last = State.DamageLast[instance]
            local damageDelta = nil

            if not last then
                if active then
                    damageDelta = amount
                end
                last = {
                    Amount = amount,
                    CountedTotal = active and amount or 0,
                    Active = active,
                    Transparency = fadeTransparency,
                    LastCount = 0,
                }
                State.DamageLast[instance] = last
            else
                local idleReset = now - (last.LastCount or 0) >= Config.DamageTotalResetDelay
                local countedTotal = last.CountedTotal or last.Amount or 0
                local reappeared = active and not last.Active
                local resetFade = active
                    and type(last.Transparency) == "number"
                    and fadeTransparency + Config.DamageTransparencyReset < last.Transparency
                local newDamageSession = active and (amount < countedTotal or (idleReset and (reappeared or resetFade)))

                if newDamageSession then
                    damageDelta = amount
                    countedTotal = 0
                elseif active and amount > countedTotal then
                    damageDelta = amount - countedTotal
                elseif active and Config.DamagePopupMode == "Total" and amount == countedTotal then
                    damageDelta = 0
                end

                last.Amount = amount
                last.Active = active
                last.Transparency = fadeTransparency
            end

            if damageDelta and (damageDelta > 0 or Config.DamagePopupMode == "Total") then
                last.LastCount = now
                last.CountedTotal = amount
                reportDamage(instance, damageDelta, amount)
            end
        end
        return
    end

    if instance.Name == "Damage" and (instance:IsA("NumberValue") or instance:IsA("IntValue")) then
        watchDamageProperty(instance, "Value")
        local amount = parseDamageNumber(instance.Value)
        local now = os.clock()
        local last = State.DamageLast[instance]
        local damageDelta = nil

        if amount and amount > 0 then
            if not last then
                damageDelta = amount
                last = {
                    Amount = amount,
                    CountedTotal = amount,
                    Active = true,
                    LastCount = 0,
                }
                State.DamageLast[instance] = last
            else
                local countedTotal = last.CountedTotal or last.Amount or 0
                if amount < countedTotal or now - (last.LastCount or 0) >= Config.DamageTotalResetDelay then
                    damageDelta = amount
                    countedTotal = 0
                elseif amount > countedTotal then
                    damageDelta = amount - countedTotal
                end
                last.Amount = amount
            end

            if damageDelta and damageDelta > 0 then
                last.LastCount = now
                last.CountedTotal = amount
                reportDamage(instance, damageDelta, amount)
            end
        end
    elseif instance.Name == "Damage" and instance:IsA("StringValue") then
        watchDamageProperty(instance, "Value")
        local amount = parseDamageNumber(instance.Value)
        local now = os.clock()
        local last = State.DamageLast[instance]
        local damageDelta = nil

        if amount and amount > 0 then
            if not last then
                damageDelta = amount
                last = {
                    Amount = amount,
                    CountedTotal = amount,
                    Active = true,
                    LastCount = 0,
                }
                State.DamageLast[instance] = last
            else
                local countedTotal = last.CountedTotal or last.Amount or 0
                if amount < countedTotal or now - (last.LastCount or 0) >= Config.DamageTotalResetDelay then
                    damageDelta = amount
                    countedTotal = 0
                elseif amount > countedTotal then
                    damageDelta = amount - countedTotal
                end
                last.Amount = amount
            end

            if damageDelta and damageDelta > 0 then
                last.LastCount = now
                last.CountedTotal = amount
                reportDamage(instance, damageDelta, amount)
            end
        end
    end
end

local function bindDamageContainer(container)
    if container == State.DamageContainer then
        return
    end

    clearDamageConnections()
    State.DamageContainer = container

    if not container then
        return
    end

    for _, instance in ipairs(container:GetDescendants()) do
        inspectDamageTag(instance)
    end

    trackDamageConnection(container.DescendantAdded:Connect(inspectDamageTag))
    trackDamageConnection(container.AncestryChanged:Connect(function(_, parent)
        if not parent then
            State.DamageContainer = nil
            clearDamageConnections()
        end
    end))
end

local function updateDamageBinding()
    if not Config.UseEstimatedHealth then
        return
    end
    if Config.UseReplicatedStateHealth and getStatesModule() then
        bindDamageContainer(nil)
        return
    end
    if os.clock() - State.LastDamageBind < Config.DamageTagBindInterval then
        return
    end
    State.LastDamageBind = os.clock()

    bindDamageContainer(getDamageContainer())

end

local function isBodyBoxPart(part)
    if typeof(part) ~= "Instance" or not part:IsA("BasePart") then
        return false
    end
    local maxAxis = math.max(part.Size.X, part.Size.Y, part.Size.Z)
    if maxAxis > 12 then
        return false
    end
    if part:GetAttribute("ChickynoidHitbox") == true then
        return true
    end
    local name = string.lower(part.Name)
    return name:find("head", 1, true)
        or name:find("torso", 1, true)
        or name:find("root", 1, true)
        or name:find("leg", 1, true)
        or name:find("arm", 1, true)
        or name:find("hand", 1, true)
        or name:find("foot", 1, true)
        or name:find("upper", 1, true)
        or name:find("lower", 1, true)
end

local function includePartCorners(part)
    local size = part.Size
    local sx, sy, sz = size.X * 0.5, size.Y * 0.5, size.Z * 0.5
    local corners = {
        Vector3.new(-sx, -sy, -sz),
        Vector3.new(-sx, -sy, sz),
        Vector3.new(-sx, sy, -sz),
        Vector3.new(-sx, sy, sz),
        Vector3.new(sx, -sy, -sz),
        Vector3.new(sx, -sy, sz),
        Vector3.new(sx, sy, -sz),
        Vector3.new(sx, sy, sz),
    }

    local minX, minY = math.huge, math.huge
    local maxX, maxY = -math.huge, -math.huge
    local visiblePoints = 0

    for _, corner in ipairs(corners) do
        local point, onScreen = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint((part.CFrame * CFrame.new(corner)).Position)
        if point.Z > 0 then
            visiblePoints += 1
            minX = math.min(minX, point.X)
            minY = math.min(minY, point.Y)
            maxX = math.max(maxX, point.X)
            maxY = math.max(maxY, point.Y)
        elseif onScreen then
            visiblePoints += 1
        end
    end

    return minX, minY, maxX, maxY, visiblePoints
end

local getPositionBounds = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(rootPosition)
    if typeof(rootPosition) ~= "Vector3" then
        return nil
    end

    local height = 5.75
    local topPos = rootPosition + Vector3.new(0, height * 0.54, 0)
    local bottomPos = rootPosition - Vector3.new(0, height * 0.46, 0)
    local topPoint = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(topPos)
    local bottomPoint = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(bottomPos)
    if topPoint.Z <= 0 and bottomPoint.Z <= 0 then
        return nil
    end

    local minY = math.min(topPoint.Y, bottomPoint.Y)
    local maxY = math.max(topPoint.Y, bottomPoint.Y)
    local boxHeight = math.max(12, maxY - minY)
    local boxWidth = math.max(7, boxHeight * 0.43)
    local centerX = (topPoint.X + bottomPoint.X) * 0.5
    return centerX - (boxWidth * 0.5), minY, centerX + (boxWidth * 0.5), maxY
end)

local getFastBounds = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(model, rootPart)
    if Config.FastBounds == false then
        return nil
    end
    if typeof(rootPart) ~= "Instance" or not rootPart:IsA("BasePart") then
        rootPart = getPart(model)
    end
    if typeof(rootPart) ~= "Instance" or not rootPart:IsA("BasePart") then
        return nil
    end

    local root = rootPart
    if typeof(root) ~= "Instance" or not root:IsA("BasePart") then
        root = getPart(model)
    end

    local rootPos = root.Position
    local topPos
    local bottomPos
    if Config.StableBounds ~= false then
        local humanoid = getHumanoid(model)
        local height = 5.75
        if humanoid then
            height = math.clamp((tonumber(humanoid.HipHeight) or 2) * 2 + 2.35, 4.5, 7.5)
        end
        local rootName = string.lower(root.Name)
        if rootName:find("head", 1, true) then
            topPos = rootPos + Vector3.new(0, 0.35, 0)
            bottomPos = rootPos - Vector3.new(0, height, 0)
        else
            topPos = rootPos + Vector3.new(0, height * 0.54, 0)
            bottomPos = rootPos - Vector3.new(0, height * 0.46, 0)
        end
    else
        local head = model and (model:FindFirstChild("HitboxHeadSmall", true)
            or model:FindFirstChild("HitboxHead", true)
            or model:FindFirstChild("Head", true)) or nil
        if typeof(head) ~= "Instance" or not head:IsA("BasePart") then
            head = rootPart
        end
        local headPos = head.Position
        topPos = headPos + Vector3.new(0, 0.45, 0)
        if root == head then
            bottomPos = headPos - Vector3.new(0, 4.25, 0)
        else
            bottomPos = rootPos - Vector3.new(0, 2.75, 0)
        end
    end

    local topPoint = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(topPos)
    local bottomPoint = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(bottomPos)
    if topPoint.Z <= 0 and bottomPoint.Z <= 0 then
        return nil
    end

    local minY = math.min(topPoint.Y, bottomPoint.Y)
    local maxY = math.max(topPoint.Y, bottomPoint.Y)
    local height = math.max(12, maxY - minY)
    local width = math.max(7, height * 0.43)
    local centerX = (topPoint.X + bottomPoint.X) * 0.5

    return centerX - (width * 0.5), minY, centerX + (width * 0.5), maxY
end)

local getBounds = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(model, rootPart)
    local fMinX, fMinY, fMaxX, fMaxY = getFastBounds(model, rootPart)
    if fMinX then
        return fMinX, fMinY, fMaxX, fMaxY
    end

    local minX, minY = math.huge, math.huge
    local maxX, maxY = -math.huge, -math.huge
    local visiblePoints = 0
    local usedParts = 0

    for _, part in ipairs(model:GetDescendants()) do
        if isBodyBoxPart(part) then
            usedParts += 1
            local pMinX, pMinY, pMaxX, pMaxY, pVisible = includePartCorners(part)
            if pVisible > 0 then
                visiblePoints += pVisible
                minX = math.min(minX, pMinX)
                minY = math.min(minY, pMinY)
                maxX = math.max(maxX, pMaxX)
                maxY = math.max(maxY, pMaxY)
            end
        end
    end

    if usedParts == 0 then
        local part = getPart(model)
        if not part then
            return nil
        end
        minX, minY, maxX, maxY, visiblePoints = includePartCorners(part)
    end

    if visiblePoints == 0 or minX == math.huge then
        return nil
    end

    return minX, minY, maxX, maxY
end)

local function lerp(a, b, alpha)
    return a + ((b - a) * alpha)
end

local function snapPixel(value)
    if Config.PixelSnap == false then
        return value
    end
    return math.floor(value + 0.5)
end

local applyDeadzone = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(lastValue, value, deadzone)
    if deadzone > 0 and math.abs(value - lastValue) <= deadzone then
        return lastValue
    end
    return value
end)

local smoothRect = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(marker, x, y, w, h)
    local last = marker.Last
    if not last then
        x, y, w, h = snapPixel(x), snapPixel(y), snapPixel(w), snapPixel(h)
        marker.Last = { X = x, Y = y, W = w, H = h }
        return x, y, w, h
    end

    local deadzone = Config.PixelSnap == false and 0 or math.max(0, tonumber(Config.RectDeadzone) or 0.75)
    x = applyDeadzone(last.X, x, deadzone)
    y = applyDeadzone(last.Y, y, deadzone)
    w = applyDeadzone(last.W, w, deadzone)
    h = applyDeadzone(last.H, h, deadzone)

    local alpha = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.Smoothing) or 1, 0, 1)
    if alpha >= 0.995 then
        last.X, last.Y, last.W, last.H = x, y, w, h
    else
        last.X = lerp(last.X, x, alpha)
        last.Y = lerp(last.Y, y, alpha)
        last.W = lerp(last.W, w, alpha)
        last.H = lerp(last.H, h, alpha)
    end

    last.X, last.Y, last.W, last.H = snapPixel(last.X), snapPixel(last.Y), snapPixel(last.W), snapPixel(last.H)
    return last.X, last.Y, last.W, last.H
end)

local drawCornerBox = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(marker, x, y, w, h, color)
    local lenX = math.max(6, w * Config.CornerScale)
    local lenY = math.max(6, h * Config.CornerScale)
    local lines = marker.Corners

    local x2, y2 = x + w, y + h
    local line = lines[1]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x, y), Vector2.new(x + lenX, y), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    line = lines[2]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x, y), Vector2.new(x, y + lenY), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    line = lines[3]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x2, y), Vector2.new(x2 - lenX, y), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    line = lines[4]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x2, y), Vector2.new(x2, y + lenY), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    line = lines[5]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x, y2), Vector2.new(x + lenX, y2), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    line = lines[6]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x, y2), Vector2.new(x, y2 - lenY), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    line = lines[7]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x2, y2), Vector2.new(x2 - lenX, y2), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    line = lines[8]
    line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(x2, y2), Vector2.new(x2, y2 - lenY), color
    line.Thickness, line.Transparency, line.Visible = Config.BoxThickness, Config.LineTransparency, true
    marker.CornersWasVisible = true
end)

local setSkeletonLine = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(lines, index, fromPoint, toPoint, color)
    local line = lines[index]
    if line then
        line.From = fromPoint
        line.To = toPoint
        line.Color = color
        line.Visible = true
    end
end)

local drawVirtualSkeleton = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(marker, x, y, w, h, color)
    local cx = x + w * 0.5
    local head = Vector2.new(cx, y + h * 0.12)
    local neck = Vector2.new(cx, y + h * 0.24)
    local pelvis = Vector2.new(cx, y + h * 0.60)
    local leftShoulder = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.26, y + h * 0.30)
    local rightShoulder = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.74, y + h * 0.30)
    local leftElbow = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.16, y + h * 0.46)
    local rightElbow = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.84, y + h * 0.46)
    local leftHand = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.10, y + h * 0.62)
    local rightHand = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.90, y + h * 0.62)
    local leftHip = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.36, y + h * 0.62)
    local rightHip = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.64, y + h * 0.62)
    local leftKnee = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.30, y + h * 0.80)
    local rightKnee = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.70, y + h * 0.80)
    local leftFoot = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.24, y + h)
    local rightFoot = Vector2.new(x + w * 0.76, y + h)
    local lines = marker.Skeleton

    setSkeletonLine(lines, 1, head, neck, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 2, neck, pelvis, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 3, neck, leftShoulder, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 4, leftShoulder, leftElbow, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 5, leftElbow, leftHand, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 6, neck, rightShoulder, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 7, rightShoulder, rightElbow, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 8, rightElbow, rightHand, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 9, pelvis, leftHip, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 10, leftHip, leftKnee, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 11, leftKnee, leftFoot, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 12, pelvis, rightHip, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 13, rightHip, rightKnee, color)
    setSkeletonLine(lines, 14, rightKnee, rightFoot, color)
    marker.SkeletonWasVisible = true
end)

local ESP_SKELETON_LINKS = {
    { { "Head", "HitboxHead", "HitboxHeadSmall" }, { "UpperTorso", "Torso", "HitboxTorso" } },
    { { "UpperTorso", "Torso", "HitboxTorso" }, { "LowerTorso", "HumanoidRootPart", "HitboxTorso" } },
    { { "UpperTorso", "Torso", "HitboxTorso" }, { "LeftUpperArm", "Left Arm" } },
    { { "LeftUpperArm", "Left Arm" }, { "LeftLowerArm", "Left Arm" } },
    { { "LeftLowerArm", "Left Arm" }, { "LeftHand", "Left Arm" } },
    { { "UpperTorso", "Torso", "HitboxTorso" }, { "RightUpperArm", "Right Arm" } },
    { { "RightUpperArm", "Right Arm" }, { "RightLowerArm", "Right Arm" } },
    { { "RightLowerArm", "Right Arm" }, { "RightHand", "Right Arm" } },
    { { "LowerTorso", "HumanoidRootPart", "HitboxTorso" }, { "LeftUpperLeg", "Left Leg", "HitboxLeg" } },
    { { "LeftUpperLeg", "Left Leg", "HitboxLeg" }, { "LeftLowerLeg", "Left Leg", "HitboxLeg" } },
    { { "LeftLowerLeg", "Left Leg", "HitboxLeg" }, { "LeftFoot", "Left Leg", "HitboxLeg" } },
    { { "LowerTorso", "HumanoidRootPart", "HitboxTorso" }, { "RightUpperLeg", "Right Leg", "HitboxLeg" } },
    { { "RightUpperLeg", "Right Leg", "HitboxLeg" }, { "RightLowerLeg", "Right Leg", "HitboxLeg" } },
    { { "RightLowerLeg", "Right Leg", "HitboxLeg" }, { "RightFoot", "Right Leg", "HitboxLeg" } },
}

local getMarkerPart = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(marker, model, slot, names)
    if typeof(model) ~= "Instance" then
        return nil
    end
    if marker.PartCacheModel ~= model then
        marker.PartCacheModel = model
        marker.PartCache = {}
        marker.PartCacheMissAt = {}
