    end
    local cache = marker.PartCache
    local cached = cache and cache[slot]
    if cached == false then
        local missAt = marker.PartCacheMissAt and marker.PartCacheMissAt[slot] or 0
        if os.clock() - missAt < 0.75 then
            return nil
        end
    end
    if cachedChildStillValid(model, cached) and cached:IsA("BasePart") then
        return cached
    end
    if type(names) == "string" then
        names = { names }
    end
    if type(names) == "table" then
        for _, name in ipairs(names) do
            local part = model:FindFirstChild(name)
            if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
                cache[slot] = part
                return part
            end
        end
        for _, name in ipairs(names) do
            local part = model:FindFirstChild(name, true)
            if part and part:IsA("BasePart") then
                cache[slot] = part
                return part
            end
        end
    end
    cache[slot] = false
    marker.PartCacheMissAt[slot] = os.clock()
    return nil
end)

local function hideOffscreenArrow(marker)
    if marker.OffscreenArrow then marker.OffscreenArrow.Visible = false end
    if marker.OffscreenArrowWingA then marker.OffscreenArrowWingA.Visible = false end
    if marker.OffscreenArrowWingB then marker.OffscreenArrowWingB.Visible = false end
    if marker.OffscreenArrowTail then marker.OffscreenArrowTail.Visible = false end
end

local function setOffscreenLine(line, fromPoint, toPoint, color, thickness)
    if not line then
        return
    end
    line.From = fromPoint
    line.To = toPoint
    line.Color = color
    line.Thickness = thickness
    line.Transparency = Config.LineTransparency
    line.Visible = true
end

local function drawOffscreen(marker, target, rootPosition, color)
    if not Config.ShowOffscreen then
        hideMarker(marker)
        return
    end

    local viewport = State.FrameViewportSize or Camera.ViewportSize
    local center = Vector2.new(viewport.X * 0.5, viewport.Y * 0.5)
    local projected = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(rootPosition)
    local delta = Vector2.new(projected.X - center.X, projected.Y - center.Y)

    if projected.Z < 0 then
        delta = -delta
    end

    if delta.Magnitude <= 1 then
        local objectSpace = Camera.CFrame:PointToObjectSpace(rootPosition)
        delta = Vector2.new(objectSpace.X, -objectSpace.Y)
        if delta.Magnitude <= 1 then
            delta = Vector2.new(0, 1)
        end
    end

    local dir = delta / delta.Magnitude
    local padding = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.OffscreenArrowEdgePadding) or 44, 16, 160)
    local halfX = math.max(8, (viewport.X * 0.5) - padding)
    local halfY = math.max(8, (viewport.Y * 0.5) - padding)
    local tx = math.abs(dir.X) > 0.001 and (halfX / math.abs(dir.X)) or math.huge
    local ty = math.abs(dir.Y) > 0.001 and (halfY / math.abs(dir.Y)) or math.huge
    local edge = center + (dir * math.min(tx, ty))
    edge = Vector2.new(
        math.clamp(edge.X, padding, viewport.X - padding),
        math.clamp(edge.Y, padding, viewport.Y - padding)
    )

    if Config.OffscreenArrow and marker.OffscreenArrow then
        local distance = (rootPosition - (State.FrameCameraPosition or Camera.CFrame.Position)).Magnitude
        local maxDistance = target.Kind == "PLAYER"
            and math.min(tonumber(Config.MaxDistance) or 15000, tonumber(Config.PlayerMaxDistance) or 550)
            or (tonumber(Config.MaxDistance) or 15000)
        local distanceAlpha = 1 - math.clamp(distance / math.max(1, maxDistance), 0, 1)
        local size = math.clamp((tonumber(Config.OffscreenArrowSize) or 18) + (distanceAlpha * 6), 10, 34)
        local shaftLength = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.OffscreenArrowShaftLength) or 28, size + 4, 64)
        local wingLength = size
        local wingWidth = size * 0.58
        local thickness = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.OffscreenArrowThickness) or 2, 1, 5)
        local perp = Vector2.new(-dir.Y, dir.X)
        local tip = edge
        local base = tip - (dir * shaftLength)
        local wingBase = tip - (dir * wingLength)
        local wingA = wingBase + (perp * wingWidth)
        local wingB = wingBase - (perp * wingWidth)
        local tailHalf = math.max(4, size * 0.34)

        setOffscreenLine(marker.OffscreenArrow, base, tip, color, thickness)
        setOffscreenLine(marker.OffscreenArrowWingA, tip, wingA, color, thickness)
        setOffscreenLine(marker.OffscreenArrowWingB, tip, wingB, color, thickness)
        setOffscreenLine(marker.OffscreenArrowTail, base - (perp * tailHalf), base + (perp * tailHalf), color, math.max(1, thickness - 0.5))
    else
        hideOffscreenArrow(marker)
    end

    if Config.OffscreenName then
        local textParts = {}
        local offName = target.Name
        if target.Kind == "PLAYER" then
            if target.Player and type(target.Player.Name) == "string" then
                offName = target.Player.Name
            elseif target.Model then
                offName = targetDisplayName(target.Model, target)
            end
        else
            offName = "Dummy"
        end
        local cameraPosition = State.FrameCameraPosition or Camera.CFrame.Position
        if Config.Names then
            table.insert(textParts, offName)
        end
        if Config.Distance then
            table.insert(textParts, string.format("%dm", math.floor((rootPosition - cameraPosition).Magnitude + 0.5)))
        end
        marker.Offscreen.Text = #textParts > 0 and table.concat(textParts, "  ") or ""
        local textOffset = (tonumber(Config.OffscreenArrowShaftLength) or 28) + (tonumber(Config.OffscreenArrowTextOffset) or 18)
        local labelPoint = edge - (dir * textOffset)
        marker.Offscreen.Position = Vector2.new(
            math.clamp(labelPoint.X, padding, viewport.X - padding),
            math.clamp(labelPoint.Y, padding, viewport.Y - padding)
        )
        marker.Offscreen.Color = color
        marker.Offscreen.Size = math.max(8, tonumber(Config.TextSize) or 13)
        marker.Offscreen.Visible = marker.Offscreen.Text ~= ""
    else
        marker.Offscreen.Visible = false
    end
end

local function updateModelHighlights(marker, target, color)
    if Config.Chams and typeof(target.Model) == "Instance" then
        if not marker.Chams or marker.Chams.Parent == nil then
            local highlight = Instance.new("Highlight")
            highlight.Name = "IronFrostChams"
            highlight.Enabled = false
            highlight.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
            pcall(function()
                highlight.Parent = target.Model
            end)
            if not highlight.Parent then
                pcall(function()
                    highlight.Parent = game:GetService("CoreGui")
                end)
            end
            marker.Chams = highlight
            marker.ChamsParent = highlight.Parent
        elseif marker.ChamsParent ~= target.Model then
            pcall(function()
                marker.Chams.Parent = target.Model
            end)
            marker.ChamsParent = marker.Chams.Parent
        end
        if marker.ChamsAdornee ~= target.Model then
            marker.Chams.Adornee = target.Model
            marker.ChamsAdornee = target.Model
        end
        local chamsUseTargetColor = Config.ChamsUseTargetColor ~= false
        local chamsFillColor = chamsUseTargetColor and color or (Config.ChamsFillColor or color)
        local chamsOutlineColor = chamsUseTargetColor and color or (Config.ChamsOutlineColor or chamsFillColor)
        if marker.ChamsFillColor ~= chamsFillColor then
            marker.Chams.FillColor = chamsFillColor
            marker.ChamsFillColor = chamsFillColor
        end
        if marker.ChamsOutlineColor ~= chamsOutlineColor then
            marker.Chams.OutlineColor = chamsOutlineColor
            marker.ChamsOutlineColor = chamsOutlineColor
        end
        local chamsFillTransparency = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.ChamsFillTransparency) or 0.48, 0, 1)
        local chamsOutlineTransparency = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.ChamsOutlineTransparency) or 0, 0, 1)
        if marker.ChamsFillTransparency ~= chamsFillTransparency then
            marker.Chams.FillTransparency = chamsFillTransparency
            marker.ChamsFillTransparency = chamsFillTransparency
        end
        if marker.ChamsOutlineTransparency ~= chamsOutlineTransparency then
            marker.Chams.OutlineTransparency = chamsOutlineTransparency
            marker.ChamsOutlineTransparency = chamsOutlineTransparency
        end
        marker.Chams.Enabled = true
    elseif marker.Chams then
        marker.Chams.Enabled = false
    end

    if Config.PlayerOutline and not Config.Chams and target.Kind == "PLAYER" and typeof(target.Model) == "Instance" then
        if not marker.PlayerOutline or marker.PlayerOutline.Parent == nil then
            local outline = Instance.new("Highlight")
            outline.Name = "IronFrostPlayerOutline"
            outline.Enabled = false
            outline.DepthMode = Enum.HighlightDepthMode.AlwaysOnTop
            pcall(function()
                outline.Parent = target.Model
            end)
            if not outline.Parent then
                pcall(function()
                    outline.Parent = game:GetService("CoreGui")
                end)
            end
            marker.PlayerOutline = outline
            marker.PlayerOutlineParent = outline.Parent
        elseif marker.PlayerOutlineParent ~= target.Model then
            pcall(function()
                marker.PlayerOutline.Parent = target.Model
            end)
            marker.PlayerOutlineParent = marker.PlayerOutline.Parent
        end
        local outlineColor = Config.PlayerOutlineColor or color
        local outlineTransparency = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.PlayerOutlineTransparency) or 0, 0, 1)
        if marker.PlayerOutlineAdornee ~= target.Model then
            marker.PlayerOutline.Adornee = target.Model
            marker.PlayerOutline.FillTransparency = 1
            marker.PlayerOutlineAdornee = target.Model
        end
        if marker.PlayerOutlineTransparency ~= outlineTransparency then
            marker.PlayerOutline.OutlineTransparency = outlineTransparency
            marker.PlayerOutlineTransparency = outlineTransparency
        end
        if marker.PlayerOutlineColor ~= outlineColor then
            marker.PlayerOutline.OutlineColor = outlineColor
            marker.PlayerOutlineColor = outlineColor
        end
        marker.PlayerOutline.Enabled = true
    elseif marker.PlayerOutline then
        marker.PlayerOutline.Enabled = false
    end
end

local renderTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(target)
    local key = target.Key
    local marker = State.Drawings[key]
    if not marker then
        marker = makeMarker()
        State.Drawings[key] = marker
    end

    if target.Kind == "PLAYER" and playerSameTeam(target.Player) then
        hideMarker(marker)
        return false
    end

    if target.IsVirtual then
        local livePosition = chickynoidPositionById(target.ChickynoidCharacterId)
        if livePosition then
            target.Position = livePosition
        end
        if typeof(target.Position) ~= "Vector3" then
            hideMarker(marker)
            return false
        end
    else
        if not target.Model.Parent or not target.Part.Parent then
            hideMarker(marker)
            return false
        end
        if targetDeadForRender(key, target.Model, marker) then
            hideMarker(marker)
            return false
        end
    end

    local rootPosition = target.IsVirtual and target.Position or target.Part.Position
    local cameraPosition = State.FrameCameraPosition or Camera.CFrame.Position
    local distance = (rootPosition - cameraPosition).Magnitude
    local maxDistance = tonumber(Config.MaxDistance) or 15000
    if target.Kind == "PLAYER" then
        maxDistance = math.min(maxDistance, tonumber(Config.PlayerMaxDistance) or 550)
    end
    if distance > maxDistance then
        hideMarker(marker)
        return false
    end

    local color = target.Kind == "PLAYER" and Config.PlayerColor or Config.DummyColor
    updateModelHighlights(marker, target, color)
    local minX, minY, maxX, maxY
    if target.IsVirtual then
        minX, minY, maxX, maxY = getPositionBounds(rootPosition)
    else
        minX, minY, maxX, maxY = getBounds(target.Model, target.Part)
    end
    if not minX then
        drawOffscreen(marker, target, rootPosition, color)
        marker.Fill.Visible = false
        marker.Box.Visible = false
        marker.Name.Visible = false
        marker.Health.Visible = false
        marker.Snapline.Visible = false
        marker.HeadDot.Visible = false
        marker.Direction.Visible = false
        marker.TargetGlow.Visible = false
        hideCornerLines(marker)
        hideSkeletonLines(marker)
        return true
    end

    local viewport = State.FrameViewportSize or Camera.ViewportSize
    if maxX < 0 or minX > viewport.X or maxY < 0 or minY > viewport.Y then
        drawOffscreen(marker, target, rootPosition, color)
        marker.Fill.Visible = false
        marker.Box.Visible = false
        marker.Name.Visible = false
        marker.Health.Visible = false
        marker.Snapline.Visible = false
        marker.HeadDot.Visible = false
        marker.Direction.Visible = false
        marker.TargetGlow.Visible = false
        hideCornerLines(marker)
        hideSkeletonLines(marker)
        return true
    end

    minX = math.clamp(minX, -100, viewport.X + 100)
    maxX = math.clamp(maxX, -100, viewport.X + 100)
    minY = math.clamp(minY, -100, viewport.Y + 100)
    maxY = math.clamp(maxY, -100, viewport.Y + 100)

    local x, y = minX, minY
    local w, h = math.max(4, maxX - minX), math.max(8, maxY - minY)
    x, y, w, h = smoothRect(marker, x, y, w, h)

    marker.Offscreen.Visible = false
    hideOffscreenArrow(marker)
    local renderHealth
    local renderMaxHealth
    local renderHealthLoaded = false

    local virtualChams = Config.Chams == true and target.IsVirtual == true
    if Config.Fill or virtualChams then
        marker.Fill.Position = Vector2.new(x, y)
        marker.Fill.Size = Vector2.new(w, h)
        marker.Fill.Color = color
        marker.Fill.Transparency = virtualChams and math.max(tonumber(Config.FillTransparency) or 0.1, 0.18) or Config.FillTransparency
        marker.Fill.Visible = true
    else
        marker.Fill.Visible = false
    end

    if Config.Box and not Config.CornerBox then
        marker.Box.Position = Vector2.new(x, y)
        marker.Box.Size = Vector2.new(w, h)
        marker.Box.Color = color
        marker.Box.Thickness = Config.BoxThickness
        marker.Box.Transparency = Config.LineTransparency
        marker.Box.Visible = true
    else
        marker.Box.Visible = false
    end

    if Config.Box and Config.CornerBox then
        drawCornerBox(marker, x, y, w, h, color)
    else
        hideCornerLines(marker)
    end

    do
        local infoParts = marker.InfoParts
        infoParts[1], infoParts[2], infoParts[3] = nil, nil, nil
        local infoCount = 0
        if Config.Names then
            local espName = target.Name
            if target.Player and type(target.Player.Name) == "string" then
                espName = target.Player.Name
            elseif (not espName or espName == "") and target.Model then
                espName = targetDisplayName(target.Model, target)
            end
            infoCount += 1
            infoParts[infoCount] = espName or target.Kind
        end
        if Config.Distance then
            infoCount += 1
            infoParts[infoCount] = tostring(math.floor(distance + 0.5)) .. "m"
        end
        if Config.Health then
            if not renderHealthLoaded then
                renderHealth, renderMaxHealth = getRenderHealth(target.Key, target.Model, marker)
                renderHealthLoaded = true
            end
            infoCount += 1
            infoParts[infoCount] = tostring(math.max(0, math.floor(renderHealth + 0.5))) .. "/" .. tostring(renderMaxHealth) .. "HP"
        end
        if infoCount > 0 then
            marker.Name.Text = table.concat(infoParts, "  ")
            marker.Name.Size = math.max(8, tonumber(Config.TextSize) or 13)
            marker.Name.Position = Vector2.new(x + (w * 0.5) + (tonumber(Config.TextOffsetX) or 0), y + (tonumber(Config.TextOffsetY) or -15))
            marker.Name.Color = color
            marker.Name.Visible = true
        else
            marker.Name.Visible = false
        end
    end

    if Config.HealthBar ~= false then
        if not renderHealthLoaded then
            renderHealth, renderMaxHealth = getRenderHealth(target.Key, target.Model, marker)
            renderHealthLoaded = true
        end
        local healthAlpha = math.clamp(renderHealth / math.max(1, renderMaxHealth), 0, 1)
        local barHeight = h * healthAlpha
        marker.Health.From = Vector2.new(x - 5, y + h)
        marker.Health.To = Vector2.new(x - 5, y + h - barHeight)
        marker.Health.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255 - (healthAlpha * 255), healthAlpha * 255, 70)
        marker.Health.Visible = true
    else
        marker.Health.Visible = false
    end

    if Config.Snapline then
        local origin = tostring(Config.SnaplineOrigin or "Bottom")
        local fromPoint
        if origin == "Center" then
            fromPoint = Vector2.new(viewport.X * 0.5, viewport.Y * 0.5)
        elseif origin == "Mouse" then
            local mousePos = State.FrameMousePosition or UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
            fromPoint = Vector2.new(mousePos.X, mousePos.Y)
        else
            fromPoint = Vector2.new(viewport.X * 0.5, viewport.Y - 8)
        end
        marker.Snapline.From = fromPoint
        marker.Snapline.To = Vector2.new(x + (w * 0.5), y + h)
        marker.Snapline.Color = color
        marker.Snapline.Visible = true
    else
        marker.Snapline.Visible = false
    end

    if Config.DirectionLine and not target.IsVirtual and typeof(target.Part) == "Instance" and target.Part:IsA("BasePart") then
        local length = math.max(2, tonumber(Config.DirectionLineLength) or 7)
        local from3 = rootPosition + Vector3.new(0, 1.15, 0)
        local to3 = from3 + (target.Part.CFrame.LookVector * length)
        local from2, fromVisible = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(from3)
        local to2, toVisible = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(to3)
        if from2.Z > 0 and to2.Z > 0 and (fromVisible or toVisible) then
            marker.Direction.From = Vector2.new(from2.X, from2.Y)
            marker.Direction.To = Vector2.new(to2.X, to2.Y)
            marker.Direction.Color = color
            marker.Direction.Thickness = 1
            marker.Direction.Transparency = Config.LineTransparency
            marker.Direction.Visible = true
        else
            marker.Direction.Visible = false
        end
    else
        marker.Direction.Visible = false
    end

    if Config.HeadDot and target.IsVirtual then
        marker.HeadDot.Position = Vector2.new(x + (w * 0.5), y + (h * 0.12))
        marker.HeadDot.Color = color
        marker.HeadDot.Visible = true
    elseif Config.HeadDot then
        local head = target.Model and getMarkerPart(marker, target.Model, "head", { "Head", "HitboxHead", "HitboxHeadSmall" })
        if head and head:IsA("BasePart") then
            local point, visible = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(head.Position)
            marker.HeadDot.Position = Vector2.new(point.X, point.Y)
            marker.HeadDot.Color = color
            marker.HeadDot.Visible = visible and point.Z > 0
        else
            marker.HeadDot.Visible = false
        end
    else
        marker.HeadDot.Visible = false
    end

    if Config.Skeleton and target.IsVirtual then
        drawVirtualSkeleton(marker, x, y, w, h, color)
        marker.SkeletonWasVisible = true
    elseif Config.Skeleton then
        for index, line in ipairs(marker.Skeleton) do
            local link = ESP_SKELETON_LINKS[index]
            local a = link and target.Model and getMarkerPart(marker, target.Model, "skelA" .. index, link[1])
            local b = link and target.Model and getMarkerPart(marker, target.Model, "skelB" .. index, link[2])
            if a and b and a:IsA("BasePart") and b:IsA("BasePart") then
                local pa, va = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(a.Position)
                local pb, vb = Camera:WorldToViewportPoint(b.Position)
                line.From, line.To, line.Color = Vector2.new(pa.X, pa.Y), Vector2.new(pb.X, pb.Y), color
                line.Visible = va and vb and pa.Z > 0 and pb.Z > 0
            else
                line.Visible = false
            end
        end
        marker.SkeletonWasVisible = true
    elseif marker.SkeletonWasVisible then
        hideSkeletonLines(marker)
    end

    if Config.TargetHighlight and marker.TargetGlow then
        local isCurrentTarget = false
        local suppliedAim = rawget(_G, "XenoSilentAimPrivate")
        local currentTarget = suppliedAim and suppliedAim.CurrentTarget
        if currentTarget and typeof(currentTarget.Model) == "Instance" and currentTarget.Model == target.Model then
            isCurrentTarget = true
        elseif currentTarget and target.IsVirtual then
            local targetUserId = target.Player and target.Player.UserId or tostring(target.Key):match("chickynoid:(%d+)")
            if currentTarget.ChickynoidPlayer and target.Player and currentTarget.ChickynoidPlayer == target.Player then
                isCurrentTarget = true
            elseif targetUserId and tostring(currentTarget.ChickynoidUserId or "") == tostring(targetUserId) then
                isCurrentTarget = true
            elseif currentTarget.ChickynoidCharacterId and tostring(currentTarget.ChickynoidCharacterId) == tostring(target.ChickynoidCharacterId) then
                isCurrentTarget = true
            end
        end
        if not isCurrentTarget then
            local mainState = nil
            for _, key in ipairs({"x_"}) do
                -- Check all _G keys for the main state
            end
            pcall(function()
                local host = (getgenv and getgenv()) or _G
                for k, v in pairs(host) do
                    if type(k) == "string" and k:sub(1, 2) == "x_" and type(v) == "table" and v.CurrentTarget then
                        if typeof(v.CurrentTarget.Model) == "Instance" and v.CurrentTarget.Model == target.Model then
                            isCurrentTarget = true
                        elseif target.IsVirtual then
                            local targetUserId = target.Player and target.Player.UserId or tostring(target.Key):match("chickynoid:(%d+)")
                            if v.CurrentTarget.ChickynoidPlayer and target.Player and v.CurrentTarget.ChickynoidPlayer == target.Player then
                                isCurrentTarget = true
                            elseif targetUserId and tostring(v.CurrentTarget.ChickynoidUserId or "") == tostring(targetUserId) then
                                isCurrentTarget = true
                            elseif v.CurrentTarget.ChickynoidCharacterId and tostring(v.CurrentTarget.ChickynoidCharacterId) == tostring(target.ChickynoidCharacterId) then
                                isCurrentTarget = true
                            end
                        end
                        break
                    end
                end
            end)
        end
        if isCurrentTarget then
            local pad = 4
            marker.TargetGlow.Position = Vector2.new(x - pad, y - pad)
            marker.TargetGlow.Size = Vector2.new(w + pad * 2, h + pad * 2)
            marker.TargetGlow.Color = Config.TargetHighlightColor
            marker.TargetGlow.Thickness = 3
            marker.TargetGlow.Transparency = Config.LineTransparency
            marker.TargetGlow.Visible = true
        else
            marker.TargetGlow.Visible = false
        end
    else
        if marker.TargetGlow then marker.TargetGlow.Visible = false end
    end

    return true
end)


local render = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if not State.Alive then
        return
    end

    local clock = os.clock()
    local renderInterval = math.max(0, tonumber(Config.RenderInterval) or 0.033)
    if renderInterval > 0 and clock - State.LastRender < renderInterval then
        return
    end
    State.LastRender = clock
    State.FrameClock = clock
    State.FrameId = (State.FrameId or 0) + 1

    Camera = Workspace.CurrentCamera
    if not Camera then
        return
    end
    State.FrameCameraPosition = Camera.CFrame.Position
    State.FrameViewportSize = Camera.ViewportSize
    State.FrameMousePosition = nil

    if not Config.Enabled then
        if clock - State.LastHideSweep >= math.max(0.1, tonumber(Config.HideSweepInterval) or 0.2) then
            State.LastHideSweep = clock
            for _, marker in pairs(State.Drawings) do
                hideMarker(marker)
            end
        end
        return
    end

    if Config.OnlyInMatches == true and not espMatchActive() then
        if clock - State.LastHideSweep >= math.max(0.1, tonumber(Config.HideSweepInterval) or 0.2) then
            State.LastHideSweep = clock
            for _, marker in pairs(State.Drawings) do
                hideMarker(marker)
            end
        end
        return
    end

    refreshTargets()
    updateDamageBinding()

    local rendered = 0
    local maxRendered = math.max(1, tonumber(Config.MaxRenderTargets) or 18)
    if tostring(Config.SnaplineOrigin or "Bottom") == "Mouse" then
        State.FrameMousePosition = UserInputService:GetMouseLocation()
    end
    for _, target in ipairs(State.Targets) do
        if rendered < maxRendered then
            if renderTarget(target) then
                local marker = State.Drawings[target.Key]
                if marker then
                    marker.VisibleFrame = State.FrameId
                end
                rendered += 1
            end
        end
    end

    if clock - State.LastHideSweep >= math.max(0.1, tonumber(Config.HideSweepInterval) or 0.2) then
        State.LastHideSweep = clock
        local frameId = State.FrameId
        for _, marker in pairs(State.Drawings) do
            if marker.VisibleFrame ~= frameId then
                hideMarker(marker)
            end
        end
    end
end)

function State.SetEnabled(enabled)
    Config.Enabled = enabled == true
    if not Config.Enabled then
        for _, marker in pairs(State.Drawings) do
            hideMarker(marker)
        end
    end
end

function State.Cleanup()
    if not State.Alive then
        return
    end
    State.Alive = false
    Config.Enabled = false

    for _, connection in ipairs(State.Connections) do
        pcall(function()
            connection:Disconnect()
        end)
    end
    table.clear(State.Connections)
    clearDamageConnections()

    for _, marker in pairs(State.Drawings) do
        destroyMarker(marker)
    end
    table.clear(State.Drawings)

    if Environment[RUN_KEY] == State then
        Environment[RUN_KEY] = nil
    end
end

track(UserInputService.InputBegan:Connect(function(input, processed)
    if processed then
        return
    end
    if input.KeyCode == Config.ToggleKey then
        State.SetEnabled(not Config.Enabled)
    elseif input.KeyCode == Config.CleanupKey then
        State.Cleanup()
    end
end))

track(RunService.RenderStepped:Connect(render))

end)()

-- The retained UI controls supplied components only.
-- Private-test UI controller: camera assist, FOV, trigger and provided-ESP config bridge.
local AssistCircle = typeof(Drawing) == "table" and type(Drawing.new) == "function" and Drawing.new("Circle") or nil
if AssistCircle then
    AssistCircle.Filled = false
    AssistCircle.NumSides = 64
    AssistCircle.Thickness = math.max(1, Config.FOVThickness or 2)
    AssistCircle.Color = Config.FOVColor
    AssistCircle.Transparency = 1 - math.clamp(Config.FOVTransparency or .22, 0, .95)
end

local BODY_PARTS = {
    "Head", "Neck", "UpperTorso", "LowerTorso", "Torso", "HumanoidRootPart",
    "LeftUpperArm", "LeftLowerArm", "LeftHand", "RightUpperArm", "RightLowerArm", "RightHand",
    "LeftUpperLeg", "LeftLowerLeg", "LeftFoot", "RightUpperLeg", "RightLowerLeg", "RightFoot",
    "Left Arm", "Right Arm", "Left Leg", "Right Leg",
}

local function selectedPartNames()
    local mode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Whole Body")
    if mode == "Whole Body" or mode == "Random" then
        local names = table.clone(BODY_PARTS)
        for i = #names, 2, -1 do
            local j = math.random(i)
            names[i], names[j] = names[j], names[i]
        end
        table.insert(names, 1, "HitboxHead")
        return names
    end
    if mode == "Root" then return { "HumanoidRootPart", "RootPart", "HitboxRoot" } end
    if mode == "Torso" then return { "UpperTorso", "LowerTorso", "Torso", "Chest" } end
    return { mode, "HitboxHead", "Head", "UpperTorso", "HumanoidRootPart" }
end

local cachedAimPartMode = nil
local cachedAimPartNames = nil
local function selectedPartNamesCached()
    local mode = tostring(Config.AimPartMode or "Whole Body")
    if mode == "Random" then
        return selectedPartNames()
    end
    if cachedAimPartMode ~= mode or not cachedAimPartNames then
        cachedAimPartMode = mode
        cachedAimPartNames = selectedPartNames()
    end
    return cachedAimPartNames
end

-- Perfect wall check for the trigger/aim tail. Only real map geometry
-- (Workspace.World.Map) can block a shot, exactly matching the game's own
-- line-of-sight model. The view model / FX / characters are never occluders.
local triggerLosParams = RaycastParams.new()
triggerLosParams.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include
triggerLosParams.RespectCanCollide = true
triggerLosParams.IgnoreWater = true

local function triggerMapOccluder()
    local w = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    return w and w:FindFirstChild("Map")
end

local mapWallClear = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(fromPos, toPos)
    local map = triggerMapOccluder()
    if not map then return true end
    local dir = toPos - fromPos
    local dist = dir.Magnitude
    if dist < 0.05 then return true end
    triggerLosParams.FilterDescendantsInstances = { map }
    return Workspace:Raycast(fromPos, dir * 0.985, triggerLosParams) == nil
end)

local visibleTarget = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(target)
    if not target then return false end
    local pos = target.Position or target.PositionOverride or (target.Part and target.Part.Position)
    if not pos then return false end
    local cam = camera()
    local origin = cam and cam.CFrame.Position
    if not origin then return false end
    return mapWallClear(origin, pos)
end)

-- Exact camera-assist path from the supplied UI: update the compatible camera
-- handler when present, then apply the same bounded CFrame lerp.
local suppliedAimAngles = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(origin, targetPosition)
    local direction = targetPosition - origin
    if direction.Magnitude <= 0.001 then return nil end
    direction = direction.Unit
    return math.asin(math.clamp(direction.Y, -1, 1)), math.atan2(-direction.X, -direction.Z)
end)

local suppliedCameraHandlerCache = false
local suppliedCameraHandler = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if suppliedCameraHandlerCache ~= false then
        return suppliedCameraHandlerCache
    end
    local ok, handler = pcall(function()
        return require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Handlers.CameraHandler)
    end)
    suppliedCameraHandlerCache = ok and type(handler) == "table" and handler or nil
    return suppliedCameraHandlerCache
end)

runAimAssist = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local cam = camera()
    if AssistCircle and cam then
        AssistCircle.Position = Config.FOVFromMouse and UserInputService:GetMouseLocation() or cam.ViewportSize * .5
        AssistCircle.Radius = Config.AimFOVRadius
        AssistCircle.Visible = Config.AimAssistEnabled == true and Config.AimShowFOV == true
    end
    if Config.AimAssistEnabled ~= true then return end
    if antiKatanaShootBlocked() then return end
    if not aimbotKeyActive() then return end

    local suppliedAim = rawget(_G, "XenoSilentAimPrivate")
    local target = (suppliedAim and suppliedAim.CurrentTarget) or getTarget()
    if target and not targetStillAlive(target) then
        if suppliedAim then
            suppliedAim.CurrentTarget = nil
        end
        State.CurrentTarget = nil
        target = nil
    end
    if Config.SniperScopeCheck and suppliedAim and type(suppliedAim.SniperScopeReady) == "function" then
        local ok, ready = pcall(suppliedAim.SniperScopeReady)
        if ok and ready == false then return end
    end
    if not target or not target.Position or not cam then return end
    if Config.VisibilityCheck then
        if not mapWallClear(cam.CFrame.Position, target.Position) then return end
    end
    if Config.AimAssistRequireHold and not UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Config.AimAssistHoldButton) then return end

    local origin = cam.CFrame.Position
    local delta = target.Position - origin
    if delta.Magnitude <= 0.001 then return end
    local rawSmooth = math.max(1, tonumber(Config.AimAssistSmoothness) or 5)
    local speed = math.max(0.01, tonumber(Config.AimAssistMaxStep) or 0.25)
    local alpha = math.clamp(speed / rawSmooth, 0.001, 1)
    local pitch, yaw = suppliedAimAngles(origin, target.Position)
    local handler = pitch and yaw and suppliedCameraHandler()
    if handler and handler.currentRotation ~= nil then
        local current = handler.currentRotation
        local currentPitch = tonumber(current.X) or pitch
        local currentYaw = tonumber(current.Y) or yaw
        local yawDelta = math.atan2(math.sin(yaw - currentYaw), math.cos(yaw - currentYaw))
        local nextPitch = currentPitch + (pitch - currentPitch) * alpha
        local nextYaw = currentYaw + yawDelta * alpha
        handler.currentRotation = (type(vector) == "table" and type(vector.create) == "function")
            and vector.create(nextPitch, nextYaw, 0)
            or Vector3.new(nextPitch, nextYaw, 0)
    else
        cam.CFrame = cam.CFrame:Lerp(CFrame.lookAt(origin, target.Position), alpha)
    end
end)

local function fallbackBindName(input)
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1 then return "MB1" end
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then return "MB2" end
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton3 then return "MB3" end
    if input.KeyCode and input.KeyCode ~= Enum.KeyCode.Unknown then return input.KeyCode.Name end
    return nil
end

local function fallbackBindMatches(input)
    local inputName = fallbackBindName(input)
    return inputName ~= nil and inputName == normalizeBindKey(Config.AimbotKeybind, "MB2")
end

State.AimFallback = State.AimFallback or { Held = false, Toggled = false, Capturing = false }
connect(UserInputService.InputBegan, function(input, processed)
    local fallback = State.AimFallback
    if fallback.Capturing then
        local name = fallbackBindName(input)
        if name then
            Config.AimbotKeybind = name
            fallback.Capturing = false
            fallback.Held = false
            fallback.Toggled = false
            if State.RefreshAimKeybind then State.RefreshAimKeybind() end
        end
        return
    end
    if processed or not fallbackBindMatches(input) then return end
    local mode = normalizeBindMode(Config.AimbotKeyMode)
    if mode == "Hold" then fallback.Held = true end
    if mode == "Toggle" then fallback.Toggled = not fallback.Toggled end
end)

connect(UserInputService.InputEnded, function(input)
    if fallbackBindMatches(input) and normalizeBindMode(Config.AimbotKeyMode) == "Hold" then
        State.AimFallback.Held = false
    end
end)

-- The merged script's older loops can be disabled by a later State cleanup.
-- Keep world effects bound to the active full-UI state so every World control
-- applies immediately in both fallback and Linoria UI modes.
local lastWorldVisualsApply = 0
connect(RunService.Heartbeat, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if State.Alive and not State.WorldBridgeOwnsVisuals then
        local clock = os.clock()
        local interval = math.max(0.1, tonumber(Config.WorldBridgeRate) or 0.25)
        if clock - lastWorldVisualsApply >= interval then
            lastWorldVisualsApply = clock
            applyWorldVisuals()
        end
    end
end))

-- ============================================================
-- TRIGGERBOT  (rebuilt for this Chickynoid game)
--
--   FIRE PATH: the game has no Roblox Tools, so Tool:Activate() did nothing
--   (this is why the old triggerbot never shot). Weapons fire through the
--   game's action system, so we drive that directly:
--       InputHandler:beginAction("Shoot")  -> start firing
--       InputHandler:stopAction("Shoot")   -> stop firing
--   This is exactly how the game's own AutoShoot module fires, so ammo,
--   fire-rate, spread and recoil are all handled by the game just like a
--   real click. mouse1press/mouse1release is kept as an executor fallback.
--
--   TARGETING: enemies are read straight from DummyClient.rigsByUserId, so
--   the obfuscated / reparented character names never matter.
--
--   WALL CHECK: a shot only counts when the crosshair ray reaches the enemy
--   hit box AND no Workspace.World.Map geometry is in the way (mapWallClear).
--   That is a true, by-construction perfect wall check.
-- ============================================================
;(function()
local TB_Players = game:GetService("Players")
local TB_LocalPlayer = TB_Players.LocalPlayer

local InputHandlerRef, DummyClientRef, StatesRef, GameplayRef
local function resolveModules()
    if not InputHandlerRef then
        pcall(function() InputHandlerRef = require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Handlers.InputHandler) end)
    end
    if not DummyClientRef then
        pcall(function() DummyClientRef = require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.DummyClient) end)
    end
    if not StatesRef then
        pcall(function() StatesRef = require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.States) end)
    end
    if not GameplayRef then
        pcall(function() GameplayRef = require(ReplicatedStorage.Modules.Handlers.GameplayHandler) end)
    end
end

-- fire primitives -------------------------------------------------------
local shootHeld = false
local releaseShoot
local triggerScopeStartedAt = 0
local triggerScopeInputStartedAt = 0
local TRIGGER_SNIPER_WORDS = {
    "sniper", "marksman", "dmr", "scout", "awp", "awm", "m24", "m40",
    "m200", "intervention", "barrett", "dragunov", "svd", "l96", "r700",
    "railgun", "mosin", "kar98"
}
local function triggerTextLooksSniper(value)
    local text = string.lower(tostring(value or ""))
    if text == "" then return false end
    for _, word in ipairs(TRIGGER_SNIPER_WORDS) do
        if text:find(word, 1, true) then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end
local function localWeaponState()
    local CM
    pcall(function() CM = getChickynoidCM() end)
    local state = CM
        and CM.localChickynoid
        and CM.localChickynoid.simulation
        and CM.localChickynoid.simulation.state
    return type(state) == "table" and state or nil
end
local function sniperScopeDelaySeconds()
    return math.max(0, tonumber(Config.SniperScopeDelayMs) or 30) / 1000
end
local function scopeStateValueActive(value)
    return value == true or value == 1 or value == "true" or value == "scoped" or value == "ads" or value == "aiming"
end
local function markTriggerScopeActive(assumeAlreadyScoped)
    if triggerScopeInputStartedAt <= 0 then
        local clock = os.clock()
        triggerScopeInputStartedAt = assumeAlreadyScoped and (clock - sniperScopeDelaySeconds()) or clock
    end
end
local function clearTriggerScopeTimer()
    triggerScopeStartedAt = 0
    triggerScopeInputStartedAt = 0
end
local function currentTriggerWeaponNeedsScope()
    if Config.SniperScopeCheck ~= true then
        return false
    end
    local state = localWeaponState()
    if state then
        local slot = tonumber(state.equippedSlot)
        if slot then
            local prefix = "slot" .. tostring(slot) .. "_"
            if triggerTextLooksSniper(state[prefix .. "weaponID"])
                or triggerTextLooksSniper(state[prefix .. "itemID"])
                or triggerTextLooksSniper(state[prefix .. "name"])
                or triggerTextLooksSniper(state[prefix .. "mode"]) then
                return true
            end
        end
        if triggerTextLooksSniper(state.weaponID)
            or triggerTextLooksSniper(state.itemID)
            or triggerTextLooksSniper(state.weaponName)
            or triggerTextLooksSniper(state.currentWeapon) then
            return true
        end
    end
    local world = Workspace:FindFirstChild("World")
    local fx = world and world:FindFirstChild("FX")
    local viewModel = fx and fx:FindFirstChild("ViewModel")
    if viewModel then
        local model = viewModel:FindFirstChild("model")
        if model then
            for _, child in ipairs(model:GetChildren()) do
                if triggerTextLooksSniper(child.Name) then
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return false
end
local function localScopedForTriggerbot()
    local state = localWeaponState()
    if state then
        for _, key in ipairs({ "aiming", "scoped", "ads", "zoomed", "isAiming", "isScoped", "scope", "scopeActive", "adsActive" }) do
            local value = state[key]
            if scopeStateValueActive(value) then
                markTriggerScopeActive(true)
                return true
            end
        end
        local slot = tonumber(state.equippedSlot)
        if slot then
            local prefix = "slot" .. tostring(slot) .. "_"
            for _, key in ipairs({ "aiming", "scoped", "ads", "zoomed", "isAiming", "isScoped", "scope", "scopeActive", "adsActive" }) do
                if scopeStateValueActive(state[prefix .. key]) then
                    markTriggerScopeActive(true)
                    return true
                end
            end
        end
    end
    resolveModules()
    if InputHandlerRef and type(InputHandlerRef.IsPressed) == "function" then
        for _, action in ipairs({ "Aim", "ADS", "Scope", "Secondary", "AimDownSights" }) do
            local ok, pressed = pcall(InputHandlerRef.IsPressed, InputHandlerRef, action)
            if ok and pressed then
                markTriggerScopeActive(true)
                return true
            end
        end
    end
    local okMouse, mouseDown = pcall(function()
        return UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2)
    end)
    if okMouse and mouseDown == true then
        markTriggerScopeActive(true)
        return true
    end
    clearTriggerScopeTimer()
    return false
end
local primeSniperScopeTimer = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(clock)
    if Config.SniperScopeCheck ~= true then
        clearTriggerScopeTimer()
        return false
    end
    if not currentTriggerWeaponNeedsScope() then
        clearTriggerScopeTimer()
        return false
    end
    if not localScopedForTriggerbot() then
        clearTriggerScopeTimer()
        return false
    end
    clock = clock or os.clock()
    if triggerScopeStartedAt <= 0 then
        triggerScopeStartedAt = triggerScopeInputStartedAt > 0 and triggerScopeInputStartedAt or clock
    end
    return true
end)
local sniperScopeReadyForHelpers = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if Config.SniperScopeCheck ~= true then
        clearTriggerScopeTimer()
        return true
    end
    if not currentTriggerWeaponNeedsScope() then
        clearTriggerScopeTimer()
        return true
    end
    local clock = os.clock()
    if not primeSniperScopeTimer(clock) then
        return false
    end
    local startedAt = triggerScopeStartedAt
    if triggerScopeInputStartedAt > 0 and triggerScopeInputStartedAt < startedAt then
        startedAt = triggerScopeInputStartedAt
    end
    return clock - startedAt >= sniperScopeDelaySeconds()
end)

connect(UserInputService.InputBegan, function(input)
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then
        triggerScopeInputStartedAt = os.clock()
        triggerScopeStartedAt = triggerScopeInputStartedAt
    end
end)

connect(UserInputService.InputEnded, function(input)
    if input.UserInputType == Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton2 then
        clearTriggerScopeTimer()
    end
end)

local fireDown = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if antiKatanaShootBlocked() then
        return false
    end
    if not sniperScopeReadyForHelpers() then
        return false
    end
    resolveModules()
    local fired = false
    if InputHandlerRef and InputHandlerRef.beginAction then
        fired = pcall(function() InputHandlerRef:beginAction("Shoot") end)
    end
    if not fired and typeof(mouse1press) == "function" then
        pcall(mouse1press)
        fired = true
    end
    return fired
end)
local fireUp = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if InputHandlerRef and InputHandlerRef.stopAction then
        pcall(function() InputHandlerRef:stopAction("Shoot") end)
    end
    if typeof(mouse1release) == "function" then
        pcall(mouse1release)
    end
end)
local holdShoot = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if antiKatanaShootBlocked() or not sniperScopeReadyForHelpers() then
        releaseShoot()
        return
    end
    if not shootHeld then
        shootHeld = true
        fireDown()
    end
end)
releaseShoot = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if shootHeld then
        shootHeld = false
        fireUp()
    end
end)
releaseShootForAntiKatana = releaseShoot

-- death check -----------------------------------------------------------
local function rigAlive(rig)
    if not rig or not rig.Parent then return false end
    local hum = rig:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    if hum and hum.Health <= 0 then return false end
    if StatesRef and StatesRef.GetStateValue then
        local ok, dead = pcall(function() return StatesRef:GetStateValue(rig, "Dead") end)
        if ok and dead then return false end
    end
    return true
end

-- team / target filter, mirroring the WORKING aimbot's player check
-- (simple team comparison -- the duel-data path was what made real players
-- fail). A player counts as an enemy unless team check is on and we share a
-- team with them.
local function playerIsEnemy(plr)
    if not plr or plr == TB_LocalPlayer then return false end
    if not Config.TargetPlayers then return false end
    if playerSameTeam(plr) then
        return false
    end
    return true
end

-- shortest distance between the crosshair ray (origin o, unit dir d, forward
-- only) and a vertical body segment [a,b]. Returns distance, ray-param (studs
-- along the ray), and the closest point on the segment.
local raySegDistance = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function(o, d, a, b)
    -- d is a unit vector. A=d:Dot(d)=1.
    local v = b - a
    local w = o - a
    local B = d:Dot(v)
    local C = v:Dot(v)
    local D = d:Dot(w)
    local E = v:Dot(w)
    local denom = C - B * B            -- = A*C - B^2 with A=1

    -- infinite-line closest ray parameter
    local rayT = (denom > 1e-6) and ((B * E - C * D) / denom) or (-D)
    if rayT < 0 then rayT = 0 end      -- ray is forward-only

    -- closest point on the segment to that ray point, clamped to [0,1]
    local segT = (C > 1e-6) and ((E + B * rayT) / C) or 0
    segT = math.clamp(segT, 0, 1)

    -- re-project onto the ray for an accurate closest pair
    rayT = (a + v * segT - o):Dot(d)
    if rayT < 0 then rayT = 0 end

    local pRay = o + d * rayT
    local pSeg = a + v * segT
    return (pRay - pSeg).Magnitude, rayT, pSeg
end)

-- collect every enemy body position from the Chickynoid client module.
-- This is the SAME source the aimbot uses, and it contains BOTH the training
-- dummies (negative userId) AND real players (positive userId) as interpolated
-- world positions -- so the trigger now works on real players, not just dummies.
local collectEnemyBodies = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local list = {}
    local CM
    pcall(function() CM = getChickynoidCM() end)
    if CM and type(CM.characters) == "table" then
        local interp = CM.interpolatedStateByCharacter
        for uid, cd in pairs(CM.characters) do
            if type(cd) == "table" and cd.userId and cd.userId ~= TB_LocalPlayer.UserId then
                local pos
                local ip = interp and interp[uid]
                if type(ip) == "table" and typeof(ip.pos) == "Vector3" then
                    pos = ip.pos
                elseif type(cd.characterData) == "table" and typeof(cd.characterData.pos) == "Vector3" then
                    pos = cd.characterData.pos
                elseif typeof(cd.position) == "Vector3" then
                    pos = cd.position
                end
                if pos and pos.Y == pos.Y and math.abs(pos.Y) < 1e9 then -- guard NaN / garbage
                    local include
                    local stateRef = (type(ip) == "table" and ip) or cd.characterData or cd
                    if cd.userId < 0 then
                        include = Config.TargetNPCs ~= false and not (Config.DeathCheck == true and stateLooksDead(stateRef))
                    else
                        local player = TB_Players:GetPlayerByUserId(cd.userId)
                        include = playerIsEnemy(player) and chickynoidPlayerAlive(player, cd, stateRef)
                    end
                    if include then
                        list[#list + 1] = pos
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
    return list
end)

-- body capsule dimensions relative to the Chickynoid position (root height).
-- The aim-part offsets in this game span roughly head +1.8 to feet -2.9.
local BODY_TOP = 2.0
local BODY_BOTTOM = -3.0
local BODY_RADIUS = 2.2

-- pure crosshair body check (no FOV circle): fire when the crosshair line
-- passes through ANY visible enemy's body volume. Returns the body point to
-- wall-check against, or nil.
local enemyUnderCrosshair = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local cam = camera()
    if not cam then return nil end
    local bodies = collectEnemyBodies()
    if #bodies == 0 then return nil end

    local center = Config.FOVFromMouse and UserInputService:GetMouseLocation() or (cam.ViewportSize * 0.5)
    local ray = cam:ViewportPointToRay(center.X, center.Y, 0)
    local origin = cam.CFrame.Position
    local dir = ray.Direction.Unit
    local maxDist = tonumber(Config.MaxDistance) or 5000

    local best, bestT
    for _, pos in ipairs(bodies) do
        local a = pos + Vector3.new(0, BODY_BOTTOM, 0)
        local b = pos + Vector3.new(0, BODY_TOP, 0)
        local dist, rayT, pSeg = raySegDistance(origin, dir, a, b)
        if dist <= BODY_RADIUS and rayT > 0 and rayT <= maxDist then
            if (not bestT or rayT < bestT) and mapWallClear(origin, pSeg) then
                best, bestT = pSeg, rayT
            end
        end
    end
    return best
end)

-- trigger state machine -------------------------------------------------
local trig = { seenSince = 0, lastSeen = 0, lastPress = 0 }
connect(RunService.Heartbeat, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if antiKatanaShootBlocked() then
        releaseShoot()
        trig.seenSince = 0
        return
    end
    if not Config.TriggerbotTest or not State.Alive then
        releaseShoot()
        trig.seenSince = 0
        return
    end

    local now = os.clock()
    primeSniperScopeTimer(now)
    local on = enemyUnderCrosshair() ~= nil

    if on then
        trig.lastSeen = now
        if trig.seenSince == 0 then trig.seenSince = now end
    else
        local forget = tonumber(Config.TriggerForgetTime) or 0.5
        if now - trig.lastSeen > forget then trig.seenSince = 0 end
        releaseShoot()
        return
    end

    -- reaction time (set TriggerReactionMs = 0 for true 0 ms)
    local reaction = math.max(0, tonumber(Config.TriggerReactionMs) or 0) / 1000
    if trig.seenSince == 0 or (now - trig.seenSince) < reaction then
        return
    end

    -- press/re-tap so semi-auto keeps firing and auto stays continuous
    local delay = math.max(0, (tonumber(Config.TriggerShootDelayMs) or 0)) / 1000
    local retap = math.max(delay, 0.03)
    if shootHeld then
        if now - trig.lastPress >= retap then
            releaseShoot()
        end
    else
        if now - trig.lastPress >= delay then
            holdShoot()
            trig.lastPress = now
        end
    end
end))

-- never leave the trigger stuck down if we die mid-burst
connect(RunService.Heartbeat, LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    if shootHeld and (antiKatanaShootBlocked() or not sniperScopeReadyForHelpers() or not Config.TriggerbotTest or not State.Alive) then
        releaseShoot()
    end
end))
end)()

-- ============================================================
-- WEAPON STAT MODIFICATION: No Spread + No Recoil at runtime
-- Modifies weapon item stats in-place so the simulation reads
-- zero spread/recoil. Originals stored for restore on toggle off.
-- ============================================================
State.WeaponStatOriginals = State.WeaponStatOriginals or {}
State.WeaponStatCache = State.WeaponStatCache or {}
State.WeaponStatModules = State.WeaponStatModules

function State.GetItemDirectory()
    local ok, dir = pcall(function()
        return game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage").Milk.Directory.Items
    end)
    return ok and dir or nil
end

function State.GetWeaponStatModules()
    if State.WeaponStatModules then
        return State.WeaponStatModules
    end

    local dir = State.GetItemDirectory()
    if not dir then
        return nil
    end

    local modules = {}
    for _, category in ipairs(dir:GetChildren()) do
        for _, itemModule in ipairs(category:GetChildren()) do
            if itemModule:IsA("ModuleScript") then
                modules[#modules + 1] = itemModule
            end
        end
    end
    State.WeaponStatModules = modules
    return State.WeaponStatModules
end

State.ModifyWeaponStats = LPH_NO_VIRTUALIZE(function()
    local modules = State.GetWeaponStatModules()
    if not modules then return end

    for _, itemModule in ipairs(modules) do
        local item = State.WeaponStatCache[itemModule]
        if item == nil then
            local ok, required = pcall(require, itemModule)
            item = ok and required or false
            State.WeaponStatCache[itemModule] = item
        end
        if type(item) == "table" and item.stats then
            local id = item.ID or itemModule.Name

            -- Save originals once
            if not State.WeaponStatOriginals[id] then
                State.WeaponStatOriginals[id] = {
                    spread = item.stats.firing and item.stats.firing.spread,
                    aimingSpread = item.stats.firing and item.stats.firing.aimingSpread,
                    burstSpread = item.stats.firing and item.stats.firing.burstSpread,
                    noSpread = item.stats.firing and item.stats.firing.noSpread,
                    recoilBase = item.stats.recoil and type(item.stats.recoil) == "table" and item.stats.recoil.base,
                    recoilRecover = item.stats.firing and item.stats.firing.recoilRecover,
                    rate = item.stats.firing and item.stats.firing.rate,
                }
            end

            local orig = State.WeaponStatOriginals[id]

            -- No Spread
            if item.stats.firing then
                if Config.GunNoSpreadTest then
                    item.stats.firing.noSpread = true
                    item.stats.firing.spread = 0
                    item.stats.firing.aimingSpread = 0
                    item.stats.firing.burstSpread = 0
                else
                    item.stats.firing.noSpread = orig.noSpread
                    item.stats.firing.spread = orig.spread
                    item.stats.firing.aimingSpread = orig.aimingSpread
                    item.stats.firing.burstSpread = orig.burstSpread
                end

                -- Rapid Fire: nuke weapon cooldown when enabled
                if Config.GunRapidFireTest then
                    local scale = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.GunRapidFireScale) or 6, 1, 16)
                    local origRate = orig.rate or item.stats.firing.rate or 0.1
                    -- Divide weapon rate by scale (at 16x: rate/16 = near instant)
                    item.stats.firing.rate = math.max(origRate / (scale * 3), 0.001)
                else
                    if orig.rate then
                        item.stats.firing.rate = orig.rate
                    end
                end

                -- No Recoil (firing stats)
                if Config.GunNoRecoilTest then
                    item.stats.firing.recoilRecover = 0
                else
                    item.stats.firing.recoilRecover = orig.recoilRecover
                end
            end

            -- No Recoil (visual recoil)
            if type(item.stats.recoil) == "table" then
                if Config.GunNoRecoilTest then
                    item.stats.recoil.base = 0
                else
                    item.stats.recoil.base = orig.recoilBase
                end
            end
        end
    end
end)

-- Run weapon stat mods periodically (not every frame Ã¢â‚¬â€ stats don't change that fast)
task.spawn(function()
    while State.Alive do
        pcall(State.ModifyWeaponStats)
        task.wait(math.max(0.25, tonumber(Config.WeaponStatUpdateRate) or 0.75))
    end
end)

task.spawn(function()
    local host = (getgenv and getgenv()) or _G
    while State.Alive do
        task.wait(math.max(0.1, tonumber(Config.CompanionSyncRate) or 0.25))
        local suppliedAim = rawget(_G, "XenoSilentAimPrivate")
        if type(suppliedAim) == "table" and type(suppliedAim.Config) == "table" then
            suppliedAim.Config.Enabled = Config.Enabled
            suppliedAim.Config.TargetPlayers = Config.TargetPlayers
            suppliedAim.Config.TargetNamedDummies = Config.TargetNPCs
            suppliedAim.Config.TargetOtherNPCs = Config.TargetNPCs
            suppliedAim.Config.AuthorizedPlayersOnly = Config.AuthorizedPlayersOnly
            suppliedAim.Config.AuthorizedUserIds = Config.AuthorizedUserIds
            suppliedAim.Config.TeamCheck = Config.TeamCheck == true
            suppliedAim.Config.DeathCheck = Config.DeathCheck
            suppliedAim.Config.FOVRadius = Config.FOVRadius
            suppliedAim.Config.MaxDistance = Config.MaxDistance
            suppliedAim.Config.TargetMode = Config.TargetMode
            suppliedAim.Config.GenericRayHook = false
            suppliedAim.Config.WallbangTest = Config.WallbangTest
            suppliedAim.Config.HitChance = Config.HitChance
            suppliedAim.Config.OnlyWhileFiring = Config.OnlyCurveWhileFiring ~= false
            suppliedAim.Config.TargetRefreshRate = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.10 or 0.06
            suppliedAim.Config.HookTargetMaxAge = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.22 or 0.18
            suppliedAim.Config.PredictionSeconds = Config.PredictionSeconds
            suppliedAim.Config.LivePositionLead = Config.PredictionSeconds
            suppliedAim.Config.ShotTargetLockSeconds = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.14 or 0.12
            suppliedAim.Config.ImmediateShotRefreshCooldown = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.04 or 0.03
            suppliedAim.Config.FireRewriteGraceSeconds = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.11 or 0.08
            suppliedAim.Config.HeartbeatShadowMinInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.016 or 0.016
            suppliedAim.Config.CommandAngleCacheSeconds = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.008 or 0.006
            suppliedAim.Config.CommandRewriteCacheSeconds = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.014 or 0.010
            suppliedAim.Config.CommandRewriteCloneCacheSeconds = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.006 or 0.004
            suppliedAim.Config.SniperCheckInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.25 or 0.10
            suppliedAim.Config.HookCommandLayout = true
            suppliedAim.Config.HookHeartbeatAimShadow = true
            suppliedAim.Config.AimPartNames = selectedPartNamesCached()
            suppliedAim.Config.AimPartMode = Config.AimPartMode
            -- Weapon mod sync (was missing Ã¢â‚¬â€ caused rapid fire to never trigger)
            suppliedAim.Config.GunRapidFireTest = Config.GunRapidFireTest
            suppliedAim.Config.GunAutoFireTest = Config.GunAutoFireTest
            suppliedAim.Config.GunRapidFireScale = Config.GunRapidFireScale
            suppliedAim.Config.GunRapidFireRPM = Config.GunRapidFireRPM
            suppliedAim.Config.GunNoSpreadTest = Config.GunNoSpreadTest
            suppliedAim.Config.GunNoRecoilTest = Config.GunNoRecoilTest
            suppliedAim.Config.GunForceAim = Config.GunForceAim
            suppliedAim.Config.AimAssistEnabled = Config.AimAssistEnabled
            suppliedAim.Config.ForcePrimaryFire = Config.ForcePrimaryFire
            suppliedAim.Config.SniperScopeCheck = Config.SniperScopeCheck
            suppliedAim.Config.SniperScopeDelayMs = Config.SniperScopeDelayMs
        end
        local suppliedESP = rawget(host, "XenoCleanDrawingESP_v1")
        if type(suppliedESP) == "table" and type(suppliedESP.SetEnabled) == "function" then suppliedESP.SetEnabled(Config.ESPEnabled) end
        if type(suppliedESP) == "table" and type(suppliedESP.Config) == "table" then
            local ec = suppliedESP.Config
            ec.ShowPlayers, ec.ShowDummies = Config.ESPPlayers, Config.ESPNPCs
            ec.ShowWorkspaceHumanoidPlayers = Config.ESPPlayers and Config.ESPPlayerWorkspaceFallback == true
            ec.ScanInterval = math.max(Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.2 or 0.05, tonumber(Config.ESPRefreshRate) or ec.ScanInterval or 0.2)
            ec.PlayerAvatarScanInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 1.5 or 1.0
            ec.PlayerModelMatchDistance = 18
            ec.WorkspaceHumanoidScanInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 2.5 or 1.0
            ec.MaxWorkspaceHumanoidTargets = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 6 or 18
            ec.MaxRenderTargets = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 12 or 24
            ec.RenderInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.016 or 0.016
            ec.FastPlayerScan = false
            ec.StableBounds = true
            ec.PixelSnap = true
            ec.RectDeadzone = 0.75
            ec.Smoothing = 1
            ec.HealthUpdateInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.25 or 0.12
            ec.PrimeHealthInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.5 or 0.25
            ec.HideSweepInterval = Config.ObfuscationSafeMode and 0.2 or 0.1
            ec.Box, ec.CornerBox = Config.ESPBoxes, Config.ESPBoxes
            ec.Names, ec.Distance, ec.Health = Config.ESPNames, Config.ESPDistance, Config.ESPHealth
            ec.HealthBar = Config.ESPHealthBars
            ec.Snapline, ec.MaxDistance = Config.ESPTracers, Config.ESPMaxDistance
            ec.PlayerMaxDistance = tonumber(Config.ESPPlayerMaxDistance) or 550
            ec.OnlyInMatches = Config.ESPOnlyInMatches == true
            ec.TeamCheck = Config.TeamCheck == true
            ec.Chams = Config.ChamsEnabled
            ec.ChamsFillTransparency = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.ChamsFillTransparency) or 0.35, 0, 1)
            ec.ChamsOutlineTransparency = math.clamp(tonumber(Config.ChamsOutlineTransparency) or 0.08, 0, 1)
            ec.ChamsFillColor = Config.ChamsFillColor
            ec.ChamsOutlineColor = Config.ChamsOutlineColor
            ec.ChamsUseTargetColor = true
            ec.PlayerOutline = Config.ESPPlayerOutline
            ec.PlayerOutlineColor = Config.ESPPlayerColor
            ec.PlayerOutlineTransparency = 0
            ec.Skeleton = Config.ESPSkeleton
            ec.HeadDot = Config.ESPHeadDots
            ec.ShowOffscreen = Config.ESPOffscreenArrows == true
            ec.OffscreenArrow = Config.ESPOffscreenArrows == true
            ec.OffscreenName = Config.ESPOffscreenArrows == true and (Config.ESPNames == true or Config.ESPDistance == true)
            ec.OffscreenArrowSize = 18
            ec.OffscreenArrowShaftLength = 28
            ec.OffscreenArrowEdgePadding = 44
            ec.OffscreenArrowTextOffset = 18
            ec.OffscreenArrowThickness = 2
            ec.DirectionLine = Config.ESPDirectionLines == true
            ec.Fill = (tonumber(Config.ESPFillTransparency) or 2) < 2
            ec.FillTransparency = math.clamp(1 - ((tonumber(Config.ESPFillTransparency) or 2) / 2), 0, 1)
            ec.DummyColor, ec.PlayerColor = Config.ESPNPCColor, Config.ESPPlayerColor
            ec.TextSize = math.max(8, tonumber(Config.ESPTextSize) or 13)
            ec.TextOffsetX = tonumber(Config.ESPTextOffsetX) or 0
            ec.TextOffsetY = tonumber(Config.ESPTextOffsetY) or -15
            ec.SnaplineOrigin = tostring(Config.ESPTracerOrigin or "Bottom")
            ec.TargetHighlight = Config.ESPTargetHighlight == true
            ec.TargetHighlightColor = Config.ESPTargetHighlightColor
        end
    end
end)
